name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: We're not going to accept less.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is about who we are as a society.
#
When you see someone like Donald Trump bragging about how profitable they are, what they are actually bragging about is how much lower they pay their workers than what those workers deserve.
What we should _actually_ be bragging about are the people that have made record wages for the working class possible. The union leaders, workers, and everyday people that are standing up and knocking on their neighbors doors to demand a better world, and saying:
“We’re not going to accept being priced out of our home.”
“We’re not going to accept bad health insurance.”
“We’re not going to accept not being able to afford to live because our job isn’t paying us enough.”
**“This is what we’re going to accept, and we’re not going to accept less.”**
And when we come together to say that, then these massive corporations that are making record profits and delivering those in record compensations to CEO’s — that are not working the backbreaking jobs that the bartenders, the cleaners, and all these workers that actually make these companies possible — when we rebalance those wages and shift them back to everyday people, then **we actually restore the American dream**.
Because this isn’t just about a job — this is about who we are as a society.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
**Together, our movement is fighting for transformative change for all.**
[If you can, will you make a $5 today to keep our movement strong?
Every dollar goes to our campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240201.7PQLiQ&refcode=em20240201-5748-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5748%2E2526796%2E-zAimS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240201.7PQLiQ&refcode=em20240201-5748-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5748%2E2526796%2E-zAimS)**

name: Ann Scott
subject: I wanted to reach out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | [](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11e661be82a9477fbff58306db2549cc&_e=ByUt_uMFtyzqA2SnBkZSQ_1nOfG5ube0L5vyUbH-fCMOoGUaTpUbeHAbBgfxEU8e5PgRhMpNMYZ96j4aLv8bB7puNGHc9UDunl8cVbo7UBvlV-nGwQOrFAyWjVYD3O8kPysbQ3eXjC4p2NzH7djd1EFqUA6ESwjVaPBdnJ0ow7KL59qgbK4bqy3SHXqN6WrfpM_zLfWkjRoObcj_Y6eqdxhAn638IO1QTwadeJY0ssgwbYrUVdpinqJsabEGsDovCC6Q5pumpUaoT0WVrc0uVFnuUsecWKQfBn0iAL9v3woFEcZ_m0Wj0cgDF3O6Pg7vv-q7AXvliFfHlOvQwNeDdwpAQT0Lfvdq4zwNulXgITg%3D)
---
Peter, I know you normally hear from my husband Rick, but today, I wanted to make sure I took a moment to personally thank you for supporting him during this critical election.

Rick is so dedicated to the people of Florida, and your continued support means everything to him.

My husband is the most loving father and grandfather I know. He would truly do anything for his children and grandchildren. That’s why he’s fighting so hard to create the future that the next generation deserves.

Rick doesn’t answer to anyone but to the people of Florida, and me, of course.

He is so honored to represent you and the American people, and I couldn't be more proud of the work he has done.

---
[ **SUPPORT RICK SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11e661be82a9477fbff58306db2549cc&_e=ByUt_uMFtyzqA2SnBkZSQ_1nOfG5ube0L5vyUbH-fCMOoGUaTpUbeHAbBgfxEU8e5PgRhMpNMYZ96j4aLv8bB7puNGHc9UDunl8cVbo7UBvlV-nGwQOrFAyWjVYD3O8kPysbQ3eXjC4p2NzH7djd1EFqUA6ESwjVaPBdnJ0ow7KL59qgbK4bqy3SHXqN6WrfpM_zLfWkjRoObcj_Y6eqdza9mHjneX8uyG0W8FXw2Zg-6m8EyHHKCWs5ndgweGcXU_zEvtbxOIfxn5Q9tZVpKwCkbpWV57jImn6QrxSpqBr1Ehz4E3oEBYhIGia5r4uDBzJa2IedcEbOn7Js_8OGq7FgeFmuninJtZd7bms390A%3D)
---
You see, Rick didn’t grow up with a lot. His family lived in public housing and lived paycheck to paycheck. But his parents raised him with strong faith and hard work.

After serving our country in the U.S. Navy, we opened our first business - a small donut shop. Never could we have imagined that that donut shop would lead us to where we are today. But I will admit, I do miss those delicious donuts.

Only in America are stories like ours possible. It’s why we love this country so much, and why we’ll do whatever it takes to defend it.

**[**Right now, my husband is in one of the tightest Senate races in America. Will you join me today in supporting Rick?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11e661be82a9477fbff58306db2549cc&_e=ByUt_uMFtyzqA2SnBkZSQ_1nOfG5ube0L5vyUbH-fCMOoGUaTpUbeHAbBgfxEU8e5PgRhMpNMYZ96j4aLv8bB7puNGHc9UDunl8cVbo7UBvlV-nGwQOrFAyWjVYD3O8kPysbQ3eXjC4p2NzH7djd1EFqUA6ESwjVaPBdnJ0ow7KL59qgbK4bqy3SHXqN6WrfpM_zLfWkjRoObcj_Y6eqd4JtIH8x8BbBxPFbpoBeLhoiMZkCdeqAGejNR-MFdC6GKUsPoN9YIZMFXS5XeTmMVYkuUG_bV2zLTZVfM40wvaEeDoqiwZO-6OZ5MmaZH_BITpRzn1XLkTLPMIBYNeAFq40VswyaAAJiPlneNUF8cVM%3D)**

---
[ **STAND WITH RICK SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=11e661be82a9477fbff58306db2549cc&_e=ByUt_uMFtyzqA2SnBkZSQ_1nOfG5ube0L5vyUbH-fCMOoGUaTpUbeHAbBgfxEU8e5PgRhMpNMYZ96j4aLv8bB7puNGHc9UDunl8cVbo7UBvlV-nGwQOrFAyWjVYD3O8kPysbQ3eXjC4p2NzH7djd1EFqUA6ESwjVaPBdnJ0ow7KL59qgbK4bqy3SHXqN6WrfpM_zLfWkjRoObcj_Y6eqd9dd49KnS7TIVO-A0bspA4V96TfpK0wK7snQmMeh4lEL8qBPQK-4uMUv15rE1t9Bs6c6fNshrW3gxv9jxEY3YYffXcY4sKE_C6ylq2KTbaqIjCBVHiDs_3vjB5GEphrc9iCkV_dowSZyynrMW0Ua91I%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now? Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him. They are pulling out ALL the stops. But clearly, it’s not working. New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states. I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW. I’ve set a goal of identifying 1,776 conservatives in the next 30 minutes who stand ready and willing to help put President Trump back in office. America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast.America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast. name: Biden Campaign
subject: Would $25 be worth keeping Trump out of the White House...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Can President Biden count on you today? | | |
---
$25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $25 -- or whatever you can afford -- today? This is a new year, so every single one of those $25 contributions today really adds up when we are all pitching in.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiKBGSsLIh-Lm5N121W7ksO8D0PaTCAmRKFdARxgSMxfzCptlkMVLcfZVzPeMMtBF9cQVBEnlwHavxZbQQJ4RFRZmCT-tjASZdCniTVTIcMkkYKVjJl4hNoDOTAsWzgffwmPobJtX0kGMMU7_IUY-b39nRsYa1VXuTDKZ5lgaucZcYZIdDdFFQmjaNs60iDZpVfb03fyksT5fYT5I8JFolNVbRWTad7ElMHQGW-r72fnu_sc1dS6zHRprNuwrEdsiHQ1RO2xZ3myqCYdC_m7vZCfEQ4JjvMmWAQvcPgJP_Tchss_HZhEpwG2pMGBBHmMf-3m8OWnEz12ZnkVbq7G4JZKjJnhzLH9YvqHmAH97E4hLti7pgYr8Jza3GIZTdYLogSK0cj3-zUc8s16lB2gX_aaTrduflukMZYs4cm0n6XsagHBCl5RmWlZxQ4gI3hIA7uSgV7X3QCO2Q0J8x_dsG1In5vq_jeRx9o_P3ptxzScmcIolFJzHTRgooUWZ3-lPiZSA036D_pqjWRcxdUoNa_B6TSf8y9hE0xIO4TJh1ztEGeZgU5ancxCfXg5oBCKCFKAEsYgOn6CvIopEif2a9iYp8eDWW3UexYguIbWOC0a2_Wcr4wa0_V9MmxQCpERfV0eepdG0pOde0-fjbezRFI04-23WH479Kc7RNOwusrpzZotX2yJbHgmPsY3wxDwbda_pSLKD7r_rW_n7Xc50ZJU6-0MSRjjL0yAh_71fkWd9h-6Urj2IvQFtSTQrFsO7qR_5HF806B2MGjEv14oYw0JtKWz5XfjBctmcnQvCCUn0ovwA75qSGOr1-JLWtu5Gio/43i/g9jgdiSjTTCuiJgt01hHxw/h0/F2ym45j5mudqm-W_wrHqXPXVEBaUXlMwO11KobNyQ5s) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Can President Biden count on you today? | | | $25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you very much, Biden Campaign

body:
| **_Breaking news:_** The Sacramento Bee just endorsed Representative Ami Bera’s campaign.

**__[Click here to read the full endorsement from the Sacramento Bee.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78234753/452825131/-1695520639?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240201_FR_1.1_6MO_hq_NA_NA_endorsement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjE5MzZjZC02YWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A830EqPvdWYz7-gHr0MsJwqdZFOgf2dVvtyRAqElugs=&emci=be85bc89-40c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=d21936cd-6ac1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=32394541)__**
* * *

Peter, The Sacramento Bee–a staple for the daily news in the Sacramento community–just endorsed Ami because he consistently leads with compassion and finds effective solutions for his constituents.

Here’s the bottom line: Ami’s humanistic approach to leading on issues such as housing and homelessness provides much needed resources. Those include housing vouchers, mental health resources, and substance abuse resources.

**We need more leaders like Ami in Congress.**

subject: John Duarte Secures Endorsement from Turlock Associated Police Officers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Duarte For Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ac1aec618be/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-9654385?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
February 1st, 2024
Contact: Duane Dichiara
Phone: (916) 997-4784
---
| **John Duarte Secures Endorsement from Turlock Associated Police Officers**
---
| | **Modesto **— Today, John Duarte announces an endorsement from the Turlock Associated Police Officers.

Following the endorsement, John Duarte commented, “It’s my privilege to have received an endorsement from the Turlock Associated Police Officers and its members who courageously serve on the front lines every day. Their support is a testament to our commitment to backing local law enforcement, holding criminals accountable, and serving our community. I look forward to continuing to work with the Turlock Associated Police Officers to make Turlock a safer city.”

John Duarte has consistently supported policies that prioritize public safety, law enforcement, and the well-being of the Valley. The Turlock Associated Police Officers add their name to a growing list of public safety organizations and leaders who have endorsed John’s campaign. For more information about John Duarte or the campaign, please visit [www.johnduarteforcongress.com](https://johnduarteforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d614871a572868b235b65477d&id=b5a3eb2aaa&e=76a47b375f).

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: “These ads from Schiff will do more to promote Garvey than anything Garvey can do on his own.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A deliberate strategy to consolidate conservative support behind Steve Garvey.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)
Derek, did you see this?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240201-2?refcode=em20240201-37205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37205_3422442_BnaQ4o&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)
Adam Schiff is running ads to boost a Republican and keep us out of this race. **[Can you chip in right now to help us respond?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240201-2?refcode=em20240201-37205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37205_3422442_BnaQ4o&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)**
The Schiff ad may look harmless at first watch, but it’s a deliberate strategy to consolidate conservative support behind Steve Garvey. Because of California’s open top-two primary system, **if enough Republicans vote for Garvey, Katie will come in third, and be out of this race—and out of Congress—for good.**
As one strategist was quoted in Politico saying, _“These ads from Schiff will do more to promote Garvey than anything Garvey can do on his own.”_
A poll released today shows Steve Garvey and Katie tied for second place, so these ads really could be the difference in this race. Californians deserve better.
**With roughly a quarter of voters still undecided, this race is far from over.** Can you help us run our own ads highlighting Katie’s record and priorities by contributing $5 today?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240201-2?refcode=em20240201-37205&refcode2=37205_3422442_BnaQ4o&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)
Thanks so much,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240201-37205&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37205_3422442_BnaQ4o&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37205%2E3422442%2EBnaQ4o)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: Did you hear about this betrayal?
body:
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-y/) [](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-j/) [](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-t/) [](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-i/)
Pro-Life Friend,

You'll never believe what Pennsylvania Republicans did to stab pro-lifers in the back.

**As you may have heard, the _University of Pittsburgh_ was caught performing barbaric research into aborted fetuses. As a result, there was a strong grassroots push from the pro-life movement to strip the university of their public funding.**

Through grassroots activism and dedicated work by pro-life legislators like Rep. Joe D'Orsie, Rep. Dave Zimmerman, and Rep. Aaron Bernstine, funding for Pitt was successfully held up in protest of these barbaric practices...

**..._until Republican leadership pulled a sneaky trick and betrayed the pro-life movement_.**

I'll let Rep. Zimmerman himself explain to you what Majority Leader Bryan Cutler did:

_" Pennsylvania House Republican leadership played political games, along with House Democrats, to fund the University of Pittsburgh after the revelation of the university's barbaric fetal research practices. Republican and Democrat leaders combined funding for three universities, including Pitt, into one bill rather than voting on each university separately as is typically done. This pressured legislators to vote for the funding rather than to deny funding for all three universities."

-Rep. David Zimmerman_
It is outrageous that Republican leadership would snatch defeat from the jaws of victory and give taxpayer money to a school that is engaging in grotesque research using aborted fetuses.

**Make no mistake,_Students for Life Action_ is not taking this lightly, and we will hold ALL Republicans accountable who turned their backs on the pro-life movement and took this disgusting action.**

Pro-lifers need to send the message that the interests of preborn babies must be held higher than the political ambition of certain politicians.

**_Students for Life Action_ will be letting pro-lifers across the state of Pennsylvania know what Republican leadership, including Majority Leader Bryan Cutler, did to support Pitt's barbaric research into aborted fetuses.**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. -- [**Will you please chip in $15 or $25 today so that we can spread the word about how Republican leadership betrayed the pro-life movement in Pennsylvania**](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-d/)?
---
* * *
Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St. #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401.

To help Students for Life Action grow, please **forward this** to a friend.

To view as a web page, please click this link: [view online](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdukio-duchtdja-h/).
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you are no longer interested you can [unsubscribe instantly](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sdukio-duchtdja-l/).
clean_body: Pro-Life Friend, You'll never believe what Pennsylvania Republicans did to stab pro-lifers in the back. As you may have heard, the University of Pittsburgh was caught performing barbaric research into aborted fetuses. As a result, there was a strong grassroots push from the pro-life movement to strip the university of their public funding. Through grassroots activism and dedicated work by pro-life legislators like Rep. Joe D'Orsie, Rep. Dave Zimmerman, and Rep. Aaron Bernstine, funding for Pitt was successfully held up in protest of these barbaric practices... ...until Republican leadership pulled a sneaky trick and betrayed the pro-life movement. I'll let Rep. Zimmerman himself explain to you what Majority Leader Bryan Cutler did: " Pennsylvania House Republican leadership played political games, along with House Democrats, to fund the University of Pittsburgh after the revelation of the university's barbaric fetal research practices. Republican and Democrat leaders combined funding for three universities, including Pitt, into one bill rather than voting on each university separately as is typically done. This pressured legislators to vote for the funding rather than to deny funding for all three universities." -Rep. David Zimmerman It is outrageous that Republican leadership would snatch defeat from the jaws of victory and give taxpayer money to a school that is engaging in grotesque research using aborted fetuses. Make no mistake,Students for Life Action is not taking this lightly, and we will hold ALL Republicans accountable who turned their backs on the pro-life movement and took this disgusting action. Pro-lifers need to send the message that the interests of preborn babies must be held higher than the political ambition of certain politicians. Students for Life Action will be letting pro-lifers across the state of Pennsylvania know what Republican leadership, including Majority Leader Bryan Cutler, did to support Pitt's barbaric research into aborted fetuses. For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action P.S. -- ? Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St. #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. subject: Our newest free online course, “The ExodusStory”
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4oa227mqchtf2q8kv6um0mijfr92pvt3l3l8bu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8or5chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqpgp3kd70ef8q32qdn5754qb89a379p5von73h0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8or5chh2bs)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/exodus**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7v9d2u7pqi32jjije9spk0rv8ed03gjlhejght0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8or5chh2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg0ln37p9b1v14n986qlr0ekrp50n9rpt3tsh5po_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8pr6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z86fbm09o8pj1ugjuh091kkbe0mdsah01j572bgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8pr6c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhbpgrj2dctoimoafvn97d4atlvcggphka9v0i0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8pr6c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbu2rnmlin83mmm73ops8ovt6e11hp8l9fgu51bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3jm8pr6c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkEGP2yAUhH8NvhHhhwPk4EO2TnLZVFUabY_oAc8OknEiwLvqv69SpedeP82M9M2vsz1jnOMyfcdEfc3V5mJdsG7ixd_iOFoQ0HEBXIBtm9B3GoJUDfWtFsoopbVobr1wiowOChRi64Pzu26HaqvBGWEkUBP7544AAcJ0Wwkb4wTqEWW3MwraXcs6gTPlWjb1Rpkeq5ujx6USpo2_p2bub7U-CpN7BkcGx0J-zbT5ikum8Ew8WaVP4hPmT_rNx3vma-GFFqzE4BjItQYkbT2O0uGWyeNaky33NXticngbTvxy-GCgnjhRiGticjicX8RjemCcFiaHl0pr34aT_Xn6trfv7_Zy-LA_9vx6ub4K1TM5XC9X_s-8yX14fMV5jkVp1okpYZz_ytX_Pv8nAAD__6n-g_4)

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Senator Tuberville Just Endorsed Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow Conservative, Did you see the news? **Senator Tommy Tuberville has endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate in Nevada!** I’m deeply honored to receive Senator Tuberville’s endorsement. His dedication to America First principles and his commitment to working tirelessly for the American people are qualities I admire. And I look forward to fighting by his side in the United States Senate to protect our freedoms, cut taxes, close the border, end illegal immigration, and keep Americans safe. **_Will you join Tommy Tuberville in supporting my campaign and chipping in a generous contribution today?_**
---
[ **DONATE NOW TO FUEL OUR FIGHT**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
As a tried-and-true conservative leader, Senator Tuberville understands the vital importance of flipping Nevada red, taking back the Senate from Chuck Schumer, and sending Joe Biden packing. **[So please, chip in today.](http://trk.secureandprosper.) **Together, we can secure a great victory for freedom in this do-or-die battle for our nation’s future. Thanks so much for your support, Jim Marchant
---
[ **DONATE NOW TO FUEL OUR FIGHT**](http://trk.secureandprosper._WYwIR1mXMtiDk1Q)

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow Conservative, Did you see the news? Senator Tommy Tuberville has endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate in Nevada! I’m deeply honored to receive Senator Tuberville’s endorsement. His dedication to America First principles and his commitment to working tirelessly for the American people are qualities I admire. And I look forward to fighting by his side in the United States Senate to protect our freedoms, cut taxes, close the border, end illegal immigration, and keep Americans safe. Will you join Tommy Tuberville in supporting my campaign and chipping in a generous contribution today? As a tried-and-true conservative leader, Senator Tuberville understands the vital importance of flipping Nevada red, taking back the Senate from Chuck Schumer, and sending Joe Biden packing. Together, we can secure a great victory for freedom in this do-or-die battle for our nation’s future. subject: Watch the trailer for our newest course, “The Exodus Story”
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95411fd42924371b121e6f691de0355&_e=hkLAZcYCkdpzFRTiOyCWC4HyZLAjAIG3xKpif6Ks4MmZeNIWyJ9knXEhMoi3tEmfzPi1k8yj7UH_dN6kPPfeJEUXZiBqhE1ARVLr6exfY5GEIoMdvS6Rp3dz-FtSRqL3GLvDVIfgXtFqnjs8ol54RMtcxnmQ6eu0y_bisaM20rb_6-zCZwO4NXrpTc_g2jSUHv974s3poF_B7iXIrcoEA2us-VlKZLgj-IlJZ7ZGokuPzQn0wWW4iYpmdDE5MXu-opT9clBiKRh9yzTKOUT2L73EIQxfm9XbzcMWBoRvWzdhEINReRy5-sY-evN2ezqsN50Pr4TXK45qA__e0rL8GyJjd3Em97pDNrD-kuyw9rAEkeS3iYrnZqhQIgwK4w-TztiVU6iMuQ3OlARj_THHRg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95411fd42924371b121e6f691de0355&_e=hkLAZcYCkdpzFRTiOyCWC4HyZLAjAIG3xKpif6Ks4MmZeNIWyJ9knXEhMoi3tEmfzPi1k8yj7UH_dN6kPPfeJEUXZiBqhE1ARVLr6exfY5GEIoMdvS6Rp3dz-FtSRqL3GLvDVIfgXtFqnjs8ol54RMtcxnmQ6eu0y_bisaM20rb_6-zCZwO4NXrpTc_g2jSUHv974s3poF_B7iXIrcoEA2us-VlKZLgj-IlJZ7ZGoksor5NOpnHtlILrjSa4QN-p3skNO_u_IOGH-DG3JDQbKSAe15NHD8PK4ifNJYWycWuit8n0-VosymDqPs-Gvnz-w9xe5JnzKGe-h9CjNm9aQ7QVee295aCIm3Vk4ANbZqRUxH5IAwEwOIW9OOuDY-4h6w9sgMkqQRqY6TRKYQSsQQ%3D%3D)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/exodus**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e95411fd42924371b121e6f691de0355&_e=hkLAZcYCkdpzFRTiOyCWC4HyZLAjAIG3xKpif6Ks4MmZeNIWyJ9knXEhMoi3tEmfzPi1k8yj7UH_dN6kPPfeJEUXZiBqhE1ARVLr6exfY5GEIoMdvS6Rp3dz-FtSRqL3GLvDVIfgXtFqnjs8ol54RMtcxnmQ6eu0y_bisaM20rb_6-zCZwO4NXrpTc_g2jSUHv974s3poF_B7iXIrcoEA2us-VlKZLgj-IlJZ7ZGokv1-FcgfMq4O16w2XvEil_LTFadNPBqNK6LxMswMkrVKw4ENTjiyCTEDGbxkMcyFF11Dsgx-0ScpOj1gC3h_KYhSIPA-AGz5LzTUGHWjYuSAzGev4O3a5jNhNDdW89Cy_IE7RVy2RraqGSab9n6CpywHx1hnALmNXiHc2yYQcVWyg%3D%3D)

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation. These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13. As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively? With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts. Please help us reach our $500,000 goal. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below: Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Adam Stein
subject: A proud dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Asking you to donate to Josh’s campaign for Governor.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta863b9b6-8718-4874-91fe-dace6bf5a210/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi Peter, I'm Adam Stein, Josh's dad. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T920a5fcc-aadd-4ab3-b5e0-9c5cfea8cc9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m so proud of him and so grateful that so many of you have joined our team. We are working hard to ensure Josh is North Carolina’s next governor. **Defeating Josh’s extremist GOP opponents won’t be easy. Together, we can do it.[Pitch in any amount to say you’re with Josh and Blue Amp Action.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5a1abe7-4547-4052-ad5b-adc9b2446870/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc23b38c-cd71-4fbe-80c8-3a7c3b0335ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **My wife Jane and I taught our kids that it’s important to fight for what’s right, even if it isn’t easy.** Back in the mid-1960s, my partners and I founded North Carolina’s first integrated law firm. We fought for civil rights and against segregation and discrimination. We faced intense resistance. Racist extremists firebombed our firm’s offices. We continued fighting to vindicate people’s civil rights. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14a6869e-a1b4-4db1-95ac-b2fa971e5771/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now, new extremists are working to undo so much of the progress we’ve made for civil rights, women’s rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more. **Right-wing extremism is a threat to the values we share, Peter, but I know that Josh is ready to hold the line and fight for what’s right. But to succeed, he needs your help.** [**Josh and his GOP opponent are neck-and-neck in the polls. We can’t afford to let the outcome of this race come down to chance. Josh urgently needs your support NOW to deliver a victory for North Carolina. We can’t wait.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te02e0a91-82b1-4f32-ac69-f311402351f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f00cc1a-766b-423c-83a0-39807622fb66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you, Adam Stein
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

name: Conservative Broadcast
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sxs3dbEN7odng7g2m9QqRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sxs3dbEN7odng7g2m9QqRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sxs3dbEN7odng7g2m9QqRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sxs3dbEN7odng7g2m9QqRQ~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 2, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1936, the first five baseball legends elected to the new Hall of Fame in Cooperstown were announced: Babe Ruth, Ty Cobb, Christy Mathewson, Walter Johnson, and Honus Wagner. ([See Group Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnwRsWPgNOBoYu3tK1o3WGI1yFQwQoUd6-SqcOXT_9hk__r8t2Qc58u37iQa7HsqHv_KANJEjQmx6Ci0RA80BuWpQ9nbQCPSTnDZzVeVZ6NqitnwwGMtoQ2BCn3YSBHSjQChRMylijxsXHabEBDUUV4gmFVhS4lzp-F771RDG_yoPq6MsxZJd6vzcxfwhYBaw7Ntox54Q5j6VeBayBm397eZRKAtbWS2Vqf7BM_B5fAtbItXW5709EmUqUlMl3Ljc5nWc7VBfuT86Zm12EVtcDOf_e6P81-QkAAP__ss9kPQ)) Shivering Flyover readers (_like your Editor!_) turn our eyes this morning to Pennsylvania, where Punxsutawney Phil will look for his shadow and predict the winter. Of course, [he's usually wrong.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnMdshczhABg9d2NK1I3LxGV_l2AhfQvP2VTt3_pdf38dtuTlOnLd3dycroSxuFX7SgoCAZjGNt4EIqW_IdqMepsloNE204dqZKRjvet0P3pDpdddfTTe44dME9A1b1Gg0auz0ZbjodlxDNw7eXShoHyanjCbPUo72q3CWSCG9ypOOdi33JtkoslfVvymcFc6UW1d_i8I5OaEqS6azKpxjOaEEoQy-UIX9kb_rQ9yZ6QV75AQbCUgk2A_yvAqXDAdvUaBk2I7yyD6WDbx7QVY4N4f1-8kpcR1GZfR2d5z-luQ_n58AAAD__7GAaWY) In case you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can do that here [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS3WcYDxwlAp8lR37WgROOxrsYkcmqp_X1Udk_0t732ap8CF9-UtbORbrnOIje804wlPaGYjk89ESFqSVw76YTCARq5eq0zgjANlc1KA4XJBq5yzMKgU0Un2CGgAARXY3kLnYlauT8FShpSHIAxQ4laP7qPy3lbK5afe6ehi3WTxa2vXm9AvAkeB4yMROE5h4fjK--ef0SMJfU7Xby6Fb70TBpYtcPm3_VfbhD4bkId_bmR79v8NAAD__xpYWns). Have you ever wanted to learn a new language but thought you didn't have time? Babbel can get you started with 10-minute lessons! [Check them out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2umzAYxvGrMdtB5rUxnIHhRAE1apw2pE2UyTLmhTjlK2BBwtVX6dztGX7Do_9FKqltY7v6oFtMXNUrbZydUcEHfABX3CuTChGQeZgEERVxzClw75ZEMTO0oFBgYd7jk4ERodEsBNRgjGcToMApUAhoKELqR6YKIlHqECtaVrEmnGJpXT_699527oZV8-pnHH3Tt16T3JwbJsK-CGQEsmVZ_BZt53A0OLi3IZCx6JPBkUAWhlKc3pJlSmH1IGxL2b749suyepsPHYO0fjw3yyxi-VRp7_KzrE96R0XRvNLztVNHJ3dyk-b5WmzGdg6GWk7x4ef6-_k13k-reOXt9H2f_umu_Aea_XrxxqQcFts0dhIR4bRutW3-fXf_C_k3AAD__-U5c6k).

## U.S. Plans to Hit Iranian Targets
The U.S. has approved plans [to attack Iranian targets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u4yAQxfGnwR0WGfDHFhTbuMu2W1qYGZJJCHiBjZW3v_Ktb3ekX3P0_3tdr44jp9sf9yLbQl6db_ymFSRIMKvp0AYiIN2RvUxqnGejwHR3qwLCOAczmEmh17_0GJD8pjdjUGvcOragwChQcFHDOKh-8uEyjegGCgrD7IRRhNxy6R-ZU7tTiJ_8ptL7_Oqivbe2V6F_C1gELMdx9H6riY56uoDlnAKW_1XWVvhJVXJxSe5Uak6JogzOc-TGp6QT_8n6Keyk2_eS34TykQu6JLHkRNK15vxTwNIVi_vBMXIdJ2HU7eU4fp9qPxX6CgAA__9pQms3) in Syria and Iraq in a series of strikes staged over several days, government officials told CBS News. The strikes are in retaliation for a drone attack in the region that killed three U.S. troops and injured dozens more. The targets will include Iranian personnel and facilities, officials said. Weather will be a major factor in the timing of the strikes. While the military can attack in bad weather, officials said they [prefer good visibility](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GNlvH-Qx0YOiSLV07WgSOmAqbyKZB_fsqnbu-Jz3pfV6Xq88l7_cPv7FrqS4-tPzkBQcckBaS0SVm5EmyUwa0tQRIcnWEkwoxKMvBJNR6gtlqRahpSkj2TWaHgAQIqGDWM4wmJGV09DMniMl6QcAxt3qMXzXvbeVUfuqTjzHUTRa3tvY4xfQu8CLw0nsfb7fwcgIvO_fzBetR4vB9DsHvPvpBW2UUWpCHi4-eS8mnNoLgvvlc_rLtv8ffAAAA__9OYVB-) to avoid inadvertently hitting civilian targets.
## 'Pineapple Express' Storms Into California
California is in the midst of back-to-back large "atmospheric river" storms projected to produce heavy rains, snow, and damaging winds. [Radar images of the weather](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v9CAQhH8N7rBgjT-uoHgbd_e2Ka09vJw3wgYBspN_Hzl1utGMNHr0fDyXJ3Lg4_0fd7LVxwVd5ZMWkCDBLKZZrScC6hqyelTDNBkFptlsP1GHnl4TwuD8o9NaT9rR464frlMNW1BgFCjQqh961Y7O63FYsSevVj-hMIpWrjG3n5GPupEP3_Gk3Lq4N8FutaYiun8CZgHzdV2te5WDrnLvAuY7CpgLVgqBK0ne8U1FYt1jSRtldjLzSVk6DOxjPhjlRaVKF7FUmfggTCmQpK-UqdxnTbZrujgELsMojHrvyOGXp_4l5ycAAP__TRJpoQ) system can be seen here. The phenomenon is called the ["Pineapple Express"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL9utDAQxJ8GukXGmD9XUHz3SXSXNkqFFrM-NjEY2XuHkqePSNpUI_1GmtHM6228IXve7i-4Ui8ujGiFnzRq0KDNaPK5d0Saqpz6slVN1xmlTb70F7TtVJmJ2stUmY5MbTtbK62cqSdqXM69VtoorXSp6qZWRWtd2TYz1uTU7DrMjKKZJcTiPfAmCzn_GZ4UCxvW3PeLyJ6y6l-mh0wPx3EUa9pOL9MDbfBIJyWUhWKmBwl7khCZTuw4JoHgYEL7ARJ-FWUNaV8osoXIT4oJ9kdaKAFvEsCiZxfixgjBObaMPsEj3gnO4BX2SDtGFA7b2YERrtdy-fr_pvLYz_vB3nNq2syo-4rsf1bIX5d-BwAA__9sZ3yI) because the long ribbon of storm-triggering moisture originated near Hawaii and flowed like a river toward the West Coast. [The first wave ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2unDAQRp_GdIPMYH5SUGQLmmjTRkqDBntYJjI2sq0l-_ZXe3XL237fKY7On_tyJ_ESHr_p4KlscSFb5MkLAgKaxVRu2piR24qnZtD9OBqNptqnzvKPYR15bGldO2e4IYekm7XF1jK7SibUaDRqbHTXd7oe7NYMvaOON-22kZTR7KTEVP-LEsrOm3_FJ6faxqPy017KmVX7U-GscL6uqz5yeH8KZw7wWN8rU9k5KZxLPHOJSTgrnC152WIKQvBFwCmB6Tw9A_8_E-cM2dOR4eJcwEbKBS4pO-xMzxckkgAUHFwSnMKZEtxuzf769ddWaXLnJd5L7gdl9OMg8Z_K5bt-HwEAAP__8kV10g)of severe weather made landfall Wednesday in northern California and is expected to intensify as it works its way into central and southern parts of the state.
## List: Ranking Cities by Speed of Commute
Car commutes are [getting slower in major cities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAQhn8N3rDOF2z4BoZv8ZauHa0LHMlVECJM4_bfV-nc5V1e6Xmk5_28nUmy3K9vVNj3VDcKXZ68oUaNZjND9IkZ-TSwnywszhlAM9y8vcQJLcDiKDGFyxwdBUP_0mzSRA4G8QhoAAEnmJcZRhvSZJdIMyeIyZEywFF6beNHlXu_ccrf9cltDLUM2d96f-zq9F_hqnA9jmOkL6n761W4vtgKV8DXTApXKtwk0F0H6cK7DtR0b5SSBB3qU6IOtZTPzkPz8XFIzrIvVhm4FpL86-x_BfgJAAD__xmSXCs) across America, according to a new survey that ranks commute times in 80 cities in the U.S. Out of the U.S. cities ranked, the slowest average commutes are in New York City (25 minutes), Washington D.C. (21 minutes), and San Francisco (20 minutes). The fastest were Oklahoma City, Knoxville and San Diego at around nine minutes. The ranking by _TomTom_ , a mapping-location tech company, measures the time it takes to drive six miles through a city center. The full chart, sortable by continent, country, and size of city, [can be found here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFv8yAQQH8NbLGOAxtnYPikT97Spao6WgiO5FoMEaFx8--rdO78nvT03k_ryXPmcn7xG7me6upD5zuteMADmtXI6BIRkpbklIVpng2gkReH-qj8DCPOZLUKFoI_WjUGZSlYBJLsENAAAioYpxEGG5KyU_QjJYhp9sIARe61DR-VS79Qyo96pzaEusnsLr1fb0L_E7gIXPZ9H3rdet2eWODSm0-Jw4FLpG-BS_Plk8v5aesl1K_S20Po_2-vsrl43Tlnvk1WGDhvnvNvo_81_BMAAP__KrhWoA)

The strikes are in retaliation for a drone attack in the region that killed three U.S. troops and injured dozens more. The targets will include Iranian personnel and facilities, officials said. Weather will be a major factor in the timing of the strikes. While the military can attack in bad weather, officials said they - to avoid inadvertently hitting civilian targets. 'Pineapple Express' Storms Into California California is in the midst of back-to-back large "atmospheric river" storms projected to produce heavy rains, snow, and damaging winds. system can be seen here. The phenomenon is called the because the long ribbon of storm-triggering moisture originated near Hawaii and flowed like a river toward the West Coast. severe weather made landfall Wednesday in northern California and is expected to intensify as it works its way into central and southern parts of the state. List: Ranking Cities by Speed of Commute Car commutes are across America, according to a new survey that ranks commute times in 80 cities in the U.S. Out of the U.S. cities ranked, the slowest average commutes are in New York City (25 minutes), Washington D.C. (21 minutes), and San Francisco (20 minutes). The fastest were Oklahoma City, Knoxville and San Diego at around nine minutes. The ranking by TomTom , a mapping-location tech company, measures the time it takes to drive six miles through a city center. subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5RrnTR_adxa3NwIGSZAX4W6FnOxGwzZpM9kqj37kW9M7BH1T97HfPHZJCtfMVJWoWiNYeQ20le8SjWvRRUzXxeN72DDu8222wJg3Z6r2AvVl8OFB8OXjz3AlbUCteJEN4J0j3r6j1esvs9sI0kG6F_-UgvtmS6zGb-BN9zielfRHA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5TD2Bw-zndwGBtYt8IeN6CeQxCIOhWC7GWYzLrMM_lLl8fJCNwWlofp-XqhqTYjkBbG1d-Lwopw1_DSvh5aHwDxVyQ-yhC43mMkAxU5vqdyRTIanPYtopPD_LzSQXbZYVQk-vyi01Iv0TYR27xtmnGraGmo_PaEjoShQrq6XXKHUA%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5STGMmT0feRnANxvU_NJkPscBTKGp1RrGirctlgerSkTRtOBO6-fURval3BPW-zVnCO_6r1zkwJfWFdcMr_8Wzc3kTILEmdT5YRkDydJ2WekTPOO8qe3BvQ4Ja-IipdMwgR5VAQSpg73FobMFiBTPmm2TgAZKO2RbkgqmsNQbqrzQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5RY4BiNhvleJaGsnVFrtwdzEnaoYVt9ZvMbLEWWHoq-pTt-eE2MnbKdk9fP8E6zCC4Ijvj6mSIYYvfEKJizl92XQcotcNPc8M4CgfAE9Ij60HCLblwAaBCxLit8DLUXGU3Jem7EKtZeJyu8bJYLHmFaGdweTQJwn-qn2iPqNt59YA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5QFz2uMlNVHcdkSUcgApoN_OAK_yNSpOm_-caQpbv5xzkOWrtyzDjXKV73DNKMv7Wi7jS82JWnFWXWQKkdgnkXXrkHD3j8b-UKKMbotCI6z4zsceyBTG-r0QD00GOymPZ_P7aoR0aiphaOYWy_qZqUpZYcrs9fwML8Lhfz6_bBQgA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=66a864a3cf674c819dd6407be3f1a0fc&_e=Rb6_Wt-csRAn40B0sUm2mHiaeing50F8gko5J_oJeJ1AeLmXen6uHXO51g7LcQ8GYqgHhuyL-ZuAR8A5szlWBIBNwBbZkOXUIwtWcwsDlQnQ228C3tdmcCdAoCuDDt0IcVkeWp8NMBNIJx02OUDxtIYstEK5nkBKLU7ktn5AxvJFyANN3IRIYSzFDl-WutOPUIOJxf2bINdCuGpjd7zlSzRDc_-kPuvosfm64i0eZ5SbeL7AByBs18m6vxhTHBU8g3pcJXKt7cQo2zbqe21_ky1SBo0Au8IGyD4Wp3b5GnI-Er-XEIZjN49SJF-tV-NMS9zH2QZuqtBm7uxiAL8TNmNPGE6Is2NWkTuY4XKw7P58n4hDMbmeV-tZcbUYkxfmdUhhVvugm7klMhLMatq4pQ%3D%3D)

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f4c90745704fa5ae6bdceb47e668ed&_e=r9WNO7GgA39OWC8j1WZeJD7t5wBtIEml8zMjSj8mJh6ISDmJCYYuXVihOK-MIzwgFFlj1Q29GamhYot67KtsTAT5uW-JAgdLLXUV_Hy-l9CySYztedepPePiveULNKxSCUCfFKug8SrHR6lEJsbc5KBtOU06u6sY3-BndbXERHjGauI79OpIK_jFMmuVqMl8hY3trkmxcfi3KslzpUgpOeA7H-n-sFWOro3jF_lMGEOnvP5g02eIzVbZTrbOXvNdFo-552L5td3F3xcWULmHnyk__BGi8uEob0YD7rSgDMvBwryVi7lLAJQKDeW5sayS1v1QoJMYkgSKV3RN4eboqd5Y8rjhu1oiC_TPzjt3OwNUPX77yfh5NCyz04oCF3w3QyZHncVyFcyDRWSy2shrhEdXIa2zdGGO8Ne9Oy0vuQfCftHlS0JzOz9kLBbBuH48)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f4c90745704fa5ae6bdceb47e668ed&_e=r9WNO7GgA39OWC8j1WZeJD7t5wBtIEml8zMjSj8mJh6ISDmJCYYuXVihOK-MIzwgFFlj1Q29GamhYot67KtsTAT5uW-JAgdLLXUV_Hy-l9CySYztedepPePiveULNKxSCUCfFKug8SrHR6lEJsbc5KBtOU06u6sY3-BndbXERHjGauI79OpIK_jFMmuVqMl8hY3trkmxcfi3KslzpUgpOeA7H-n-sFWOro3jF_lMGEOnvP5g02eIzVbZTrbOXvNdFo-552L5td3F3xcWULmHnyk__BGi8uEob0YD7rSgDMviTmOPjQtrQqON4DOthrJgU5apo0UOn7vqmDNt3qFm2ybqbrPXQSYvtyeDq2DF43qWnIfHxzLAymO_rRqptQGUiJpqu7Q8J6qaSDawsZCnF6VttMNvA8-pPJjO-3JbGMnsOqgdr3nBkRJhceWM3-nE)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f4c90745704fa5ae6bdceb47e668ed&_e=r9WNO7GgA39OWC8j1WZeJD7t5wBtIEml8zMjSj8mJh6ISDmJCYYuXVihOK-MIzwgFFlj1Q29GamhYot67KtsTAT5uW-JAgdLLXUV_Hy-l9CySYztedepPePiveULNKxSCUCfFKug8SrHR6lEJsbc5KBtOU06u6sY3-BndbXERHjGauI79OpIK_jFMmuVqMl8hY3trkmxcfi3KslzpUgpOeA7H-n-sFWOro3jF_lMGEOnvP5g02eIzVbZTrbOXvNdFo-552L5td3F3xcWULmHnyk__BGi8uEob0YD7rSgDMvTTvozpWt5Lfx4XZWTf2vrtmKI8n85M12RBvXtc6CQsSn0Lpia08R-6MRVXDg4QaXfxYAlAUnqr2342LQiaVPBAfCc5RH2I0QifppOxCQrZHM3Garbg6BzMjIdLkiooA9Hhx81BZIJ0nV1Zz-j9nr_)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f4c90745704fa5ae6bdceb47e668ed&_e=r9WNO7GgA39OWC8j1WZeJD7t5wBtIEml8zMjSj8mJh6ISDmJCYYuXVihOK-MIzwgFFlj1Q29GamhYot67KtsTAT5uW-JAgdLLXUV_Hy-l9CySYztedepPePiveULNKxSCUCfFKug8SrHR6lEJsbc5KBtOU06u6sY3-BndbXERHjGauI79OpIK_jFMmuVqMl8hY3trkmxcfi3KslzpUgpOeA7H-n-sFWOro3jF_lMGEOnvP5g02eIzVbZTrbOXvNdFo-552L5td3F3xcWULmHnyk__BGi8uEob0YD7rSgDMtxpm2s1tL4RZZogKLwsIzCcQ6oSxV89R5v2nDuc-S6JZd7ojVjMh1x3MC6tD8QFp25HZkKxtqNF8tBIYAk8ZjjyYgZtQpLZnADkBnGTASyJX4or-mSEyaEuYkd1ha4hpGtMmZiPhfCzU_-eK65YtXw).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Just one month away
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
Our primary election here in Texas is happening next month in March, and I need your help to be successful in this first step of my journey towards re-election.
If you're willing [to send even a small contribution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SaZJ74vTqCkg4jGNKR3wWqu84ie7a-ikWyHFuCOGS95hWprBqvsRudkRAZDkaRA-7ngfX1MuJop32-XfGlsVHYVqIlZ-4fbv__75AvlyXZH0EonYCoa4vEZaE94UGFCnimTLY146ZTz8Bp-e45IGi_FQMUz7wmIHipXhCqH1OLbv5tnRc45IqgzxG1h6Kvt-zaY5fkEFdfrIXzJO6pe8l-wmtf4Fg6Y-2zp02C76SQ-RPx3PMAq_1P3JntIeiB4Nl_sEooxuPtKAMIUkm8QQoZe6ItPTqA63phbPXSPFQs1WgKoTwvZIB6YzAhMy90suOs6fjImIfAdqwfbPT00mt25hU4lSbd_NRjRX1Hs-eUoz4eESimQBAQ==&c=7XJpb3ZC4Va6mFwYLstbybW74XbKGurtYDSDzmHwzb9zqcfiP5Z54g==&ch=YubkPyZXHSI_yemQkxkxcHlZWWrwyuo1jqN1s-n20k1luoOpqC7B2w==), it will go a long way to help ensure I can continue fighting on the issues that matter most to you.
First, let me explain why I am running for re-election.
Many are choosing not to run for reelection to Congress. That is understandable, quite frankly. Congress, like the rest of American politics, has become a toxic place. The incentive structure that exists in Congress rewards provocateurs on social media and cable news rather than serious legislators. Many of the serious legislators, and real leaders in Congress, have opted not to seek reelection because of how disillusioned they've become with the institution.
But, for me, that is all the more reason to stay in the fight. We need real, conservative leadership focused on serious policymaking at a time when Congress is devoid of it. And that is exactly the type of leadership I've tried to provide since being elected in 2018 - principled, conservative leadership that delivers serious policy wins for our country.
I sit on the Energy and Commerce Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress. I use my position on that committee to fight for the vital oil and gas industry, and I've passed legislation into law to protect and expand American energy independence. As Chairman of the Task Force to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels, I'm developing concrete solutions to destroy those responsible for killing tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl poison. I also serve on the House Intelligence Committee, where I'm working to address the always-evolving national security challenges of the United States.
And, as a Texan, I'm leading the effort in Congress to develop concrete policy solutions to secure our southern border.
I take this job seriously. It has been an honor to serve my state and country these past few years, and I am genuinely excited to continue that service even in the face of this challenging and often toxic political environment.
But I cannot win re-election without resources. That's why I'm asking committed patriots like you from across the country to please stand with me as I seek re-election. If you are able to contribute even a small donation to my campaign, it will go a long way to help me win. You can donate at the link below.
Thank you for your continued support.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY 2024 RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SaZJ74vTqCkg4jGNKR3wWqu84ie7a-ikWyHFuCOGS95hWprBqvsRudkRAZDkaRA-7ngfX1MuJop32-XfGlsVHYVqIlZ-4fbv__75AvlyXZH0EonYCoa4vEZaE94UGFCnimTLY146ZTz8Bp-e45IGi_FQMUz7wmIHipXhCqH1OLbv5tnRc45IqgzxG1h6Kvt-zaY5fkEFdfrIXzJO6pe8l-wmtf4Fg6Y-2zp02C76SQ-RPx3PMAq_1P3JntIeiB4Nl_sEooxuPtKAMIUkm8QQoZe6ItPTqA63phbPXSPFQs1WgKoTwvZIB6YzAhMy90suOs6fjImIfAdqwfbPT00mt-O0dF0CGb3BnQYYKQgN-Iw=&c=7XJpb3ZC4Va6mFwYLstbybW74XbKGurtYDSDzmHwzb9zqcfiP5Z54g==&ch=YubkPyZXHSI_yemQkxkxcHlZWWrwyuo1jqN1s-n20k1luoOpqC7B2w==)
---
| In service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter - Our primary election here in Texas is happening next month in March, and I need your help to be successful in this first step of my journey towards re-election. If you're willing ==, it will go a long way to help ensure I can continue fighting on the issues that matter most to you. First, let me explain why I am running for re-election. Many are choosing not to run for reelection to Congress. That is understandable, quite frankly. Congress, like the rest of American politics, has become a toxic place. The incentive structure that exists in Congress rewards provocateurs on social media and cable news rather than serious legislators. Many of the serious legislators, and real leaders in Congress, have opted not to seek reelection because of how disillusioned they've become with the institution. But, for me, that is all the more reason to stay in the fight. We need real, conservative leadership focused on serious policymaking at a time when Congress is devoid of it. And that is exactly the type of leadership I've tried to provide since being elected in 2018 - principled, conservative leadership that delivers serious policy wins for our country. I sit on the Energy and Commerce Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress. I use my position on that committee to fight for the vital oil and gas industry, and I've passed legislation into law to protect and expand American energy independence. As Chairman of the Task Force to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels, I'm developing concrete solutions to destroy those responsible for killing tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl poison. I also serve on the House Intelligence Committee, where I'm working to address the always-evolving national security challenges of the United States. And, as a Texan, I'm leading the effort in Congress to develop concrete policy solutions to secure our southern border. I take this job seriously. It has been an honor to serve my state and country these past few years, and I am genuinely excited to continue that service even in the face of this challenging and often toxic political environment. But I cannot win re-election without resources. That's why I'm asking committed patriots like you from across the country to please stand with me as I seek re-election. If you are able to contribute even a small donation to my campaign, it will go a long way to help me win. You can donate at the link below. Thank you for your continued support. | | | == | In service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Our newest free online course, "The Exodus Story"
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60b025419fec4a39be4f882cff05d8e7&_e=a03tTtwY6zqWQb2Oqtr1W4Rcj2XUg-vw1JcbqjpzqDeXtwK8_VVVVos9poB3FdSrVC7_peUhmUxfaDmnkFgc87c-fehGC25a-kKc4xHgstkZn1coU6eKFewTySPsVkTlJ80Z5Dlio3ommz1Lemk1I4N55J_DhG9o4CKrMdF2p8tD9zVNpn6doZSwzwULA4F0VhJgfW26PWm4NVtefX8mGzo4lVxenK0_Ai2ktleeOAx6qUxag5c8CzrVsP9CqOWZ_Zxt0ZzvtVk8GIwbrBJuGNiWXGU1yyaErdFeEVIKanFVljlb2EuIPWp8DjcTR3ANaXBPTpMSkTG04fg3PcS5JsVCcXvfcd9MHgGahrP39jPus_5PT5y9oOneC9kSkvasRGvVogNRtq2BSBuYJkemsA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60b025419fec4a39be4f882cff05d8e7&_e=a03tTtwY6zqWQb2Oqtr1W4Rcj2XUg-vw1JcbqjpzqDeXtwK8_VVVVos9poB3FdSrVC7_peUhmUxfaDmnkFgc87c-fehGC25a-kKc4xHgstkZn1coU6eKFewTySPsVkTlJ80Z5Dlio3ommz1Lemk1I4N55J_DhG9o4CKrMdF2p8tD9zVNpn6doZSwzwULA4F0VhJgfW26PWm4NVtefX8mGzo4lVxenK0_Ai2ktleeOAzJ0P0EFSxPhYHMvpja45LojGWKVF0FLaEVV9L9mJxmzrEngJH9vWnI31AN4UfltewKMYZQhFOM9zwFEqCTWTjrvOemMqBO7FCeKuP7ivwVSJEecH3pyK-rhdyDCu3Hms-DTrcou48lnd-s3r20PSoGizrmThl5PMIZRIJSw4bYYQ%3D%3D)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/exodus**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60b025419fec4a39be4f882cff05d8e7&_e=a03tTtwY6zqWQb2Oqtr1W4Rcj2XUg-vw1JcbqjpzqDeXtwK8_VVVVos9poB3FdSrVC7_peUhmUxfaDmnkFgc87c-fehGC25a-kKc4xHgstkZn1coU6eKFewTySPsVkTlJ80Z5Dlio3ommz1Lemk1I4N55J_DhG9o4CKrMdF2p8tD9zVNpn6doZSwzwULA4F0VhJgfW26PWm4NVtefX8mGzo4lVxenK0_Ai2ktleeOAwQky3uZwQKj-5_F3U2AxlmCVyCR1brIxNWHa0BQXbv0MGRrNt6NCZmA_bllSG3BCJAwoSetLR1O9Rf7X9nlUXSifEFwcOpdMW21TGJ8B-fSDHKXw4Ztf4Wsm20Uvp_xEN1ipT0u4syi8ggCG3cXXkOW8gp4Aq7tNNu0cOIQv0hxg%3D%3D)

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**
**

---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: MA Republican Senator Lets Us Down...Again
body:
Taking away our rights
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4o6uazJ3GCutMN87YXlPJhzo6cnRRtMt7od4x7YcIErwO2fzBM_hL9sSUpWk0fAjaVrXpvOvuKho-SfRzZzxdq4x3Ra1c65Qu9cgq3iDPGYAAuAO2h6i3vir74BEJ8hM791h3pENgA8bPLZutNfv1sOsXiJsrqzsLRyMlb2E9aVRIZJaWTzfxy8gMdwCMGCYnqjP68QhqUY8y51fXLIxw==&c=e7ych9QEKjiIZI-D6tkQFhbCoYLlCwts9IFUD6Hvxe4DFiSu1frlLg==&ch=9LOI_6rcBVaGuUZCfa-gscV84objzQywUHCQHsGc99Ju3xASc4RosQ==)
---
| | [CLICK HERE to support our campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O4o6uazJ3GCutMN87YXlPJhzo6cnRRtMt7od4x7YcIErwO2fzBM_hL9sSUpWk0fAjaVrXpvOvuKho-SfRzZzxdq4x3Ra1c65Qu9cgq3iDPGYAAuAO2h6i3vir74BEJ8hM791h3pENgA8bPLZutNfv1sOsXiJsrqzsLRyMlb2E9aVRIZJaWTzfxy8gMdwCMGCYnqjP68QhqUY8y51fXLIxw==&c=e7ych9QEKjiIZI-D6tkQFhbCoYLlCwts9IFUD6Hvxe4DFiSu1frlLg==&ch=9LOI_6rcBVaGuUZCfa-gscV84objzQywUHCQHsGc99Ju3xASc4RosQ==)
---
| February 2, 2024
Friend,
Last night, the Massachusetts State Senate voted for one of the most extreme anti-gun bills in the United States. The bill passed 37-3.
But it gets worse. Republican Senator Bruce Tarr, who is the Senate Minority Leader, voted WITH the Democrats.
With Republicans like these, who needs Democrats?
I served as a State Representative for 8 years. Before an important vote, the Republican House Minority Leader's office would typically send us Republican Representatives a briefing on the legislation, which includes research on the legislation, and why it is a good idea to vote for or against the specific bill of the day.
That makes you wonder: was the Republican Minority Leader encouraging the other three Republican Senators to vote with the Democrats as well? If so, I applaud the three Republican Senators who were the lone votes against this horrible bill.
KathyJo and I have two daughters. Whenever the politicians on Beacon Hill vote for even more gun control, while at the same time vote for laws to allow criminals back on the streets, I worry for the safety of my daughters and their ability to defend themselves.
KathyJo and I are not hunters. We aren't avid sportsmen. But self-defense is a human right, and we have taken our daughters to the local sportsmen club to train them about firearm safety and handling.
---
|
---
|
---
| If you were ever in Boy Scouts, like I was, one of the many skills you learned was the basics of gun safety. If this bill becomes a law, lessons such as that will now be illegal.
Other bad parts of this bill include: Essentially bans hunting on private property. Bans anyone under 15 from training or shooting sports. Mandatory serialization and registration of all feeding devices not just magazines. Any changes or repairs to a gun must be approved by the state. The definition of "Firearm" would mean any gun, frame, receiver or barrel. Enough is enough. We need more Republican Senators and Representatives, ones who will vote Republican on issues, unlike many of our current elected officials like Senator Bruce Tarr.
To do this, we need a Republican Party that aggressively recruits candidates, and provides resources to support these candidates.
That's why KathyJo and I are running for Republican State Committee. The Republican Establishment, like Senator Bruce Tarr, has failed you and would rather align with the Democrats than you.
