clean_body: Taking away our rights | | | | == | | == | February 2, 2024 Friend, Last night, the Massachusetts State Senate voted for one of the most extreme anti-gun bills in the United States. The bill passed 37-3. But it gets worse. Republican Senator Bruce Tarr, who is the Senate Minority Leader, voted WITH the Democrats. With Republicans like these, who needs Democrats? I served as a State Representative for 8 years. Before an important vote, the Republican House Minority Leader's office would typically send us Republican Representatives a briefing on the legislation, which includes research on the legislation, and why it is a good idea to vote for or against the specific bill of the day. That makes you wonder: was the Republican Minority Leader encouraging the other three Republican Senators to vote with the Democrats as well? If so, I applaud the three Republican Senators who were the lone votes against this horrible bill. KathyJo and I have two daughters. Whenever the politicians on Beacon Hill vote for even more gun control, while at the same time vote for laws to allow criminals back on the streets, I worry for the safety of my daughters and their ability to defend themselves. KathyJo and I are not hunters. We aren't avid sportsmen. But self-defense is a human right, and we have taken our daughters to the local sportsmen club to train them about firearm safety and handling. | | | If you were ever in Boy Scouts, like I was, one of the many skills you learned was the basics of gun safety. If this bill becomes a law, lessons such as that will now be illegal. Other bad parts of this bill include: Essentially bans hunting on private property. Bans anyone under 15 from training or shooting sports. Mandatory serialization and registration of all feeding devices not just magazines. Any changes or repairs to a gun must be approved by the state. The definition of "Firearm" would mean any gun, frame, receiver or barrel. Enough is enough. We need more Republican Senators and Representatives, ones who will vote Republican on issues, unlike many of our current elected officials like Senator Bruce Tarr. To do this, we need a Republican Party that aggressively recruits candidates, and provides resources to support these candidates. That's why KathyJo and I are running for Republican State Committee. The Republican Establishment, like Senator Bruce Tarr, has failed you and would rather align with the Democrats than you. == == Join our team, == and encourage your friends and family to vote for Diehl and Boss for Republican State Committee on March 5th. As always, thank you for your support. Geoff Diehl Donate here: == Checks can be mailed to: Geoff Diehl & KathyJo Boss 10 Village Way Whitman, MA 02382 | | == | PS Do you live outside of our district? name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7mlgidehbecijulf6dg2r67aejl9lsq977g5hd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3iecoj1cph2bs)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7cuinnqurl820ab0jlvmd2p1jfakgr10paib3vg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3iecoj1cph2bs)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zepsobhkujdfhm68ica6b4uipa9tavva9msiniu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3iecoj1cph2bs)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuu10rccdmobd3ha3ltg07va4alj46joonqflimo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3iecoj1cph2bs)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvumihhu1g053nf50m66fum7mvhs6nf5icfo2hi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33c3iecoj1cph2bs)

Former President Donald Trump’s election interference trial no longer
appears on the public calendar for the federal district court in
Washington, D.C. The precise date the trial was removed is unclear,
though a federal official told The Washington Post that it was still
included on an internal master calendar from Jan. 26. Trump’s trial
was scheduled for March 4, but proceedings in the case are

body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a03c900cbbce4e0c992826f22dcd1e3d&_e=BEwW2iCi7KMmkLoQDZKmx4FtVfkVr-fc12gQQLC5-1uBLVvcCVBxNEp5t4L1eS-6DXwZWCSkzH3h6pmeAXPU6ej83_JBHNemj3bWKjrKy1pbyP8UeTdAVCg_mS8Wlj1cWTe5V4vZKHw7C_jy-Sx0cY1e7z6DyeQRsIE4CtK7jvK5Z6PEHD24N4YOLkgdeKAmxIrRx9ZEdvlP2ULqAVujQ4Vn7Y6Qn7nGiDCMrwvNzPgLyMS8GLYzlq6_u7j2c6Zq6kXnHapEpsb0C23QryZyhCgHGHVx7X2tKOcgqqMV0wZLdvy_sD9eCE5WvOwccIGGVZHfUUtWWjiUjqa4O0EPeg1P1uhsZeN8nt7w8R2WlLarysrbYghYfttFvpJJ0gNhxTTid8Aa0yiYFiCxq6dwVrPC_N9QhA0ttS2KitY-Xil6mCNq_AlbiuSB7OVSNFQl)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a03c900cbbce4e0c992826f22dcd1e3d&_e=BEwW2iCi7KMmkLoQDZKmx4FtVfkVr-fc12gQQLC5-1uBLVvcCVBxNEp5t4L1eS-6DXwZWCSkzH3h6pmeAXPU6ej83_JBHNemj3bWKjrKy1pbyP8UeTdAVCg_mS8Wlj1cWTe5V4vZKHw7C_jy-Sx0cY1e7z6DyeQRsIE4CtK7jvK5Z6PEHD24N4YOLkgdeKAmxIrRx9ZEdvlP2ULqAVujQ4Vn7Y6Qn7nGiDCMrwvNzPgLyMS8GLYzlq6_u7j2c6Zq6kXnHapEpsb0C23QryZyhCgHGHVx7X2tKOcgqqMV0wbnkrmOtiQxDiTgofRPmddhlfHQTPSoQj30w5DZBEYG30PoRZXfc-DhfTXnNMLlfWwy10fzj26EtDl2d8DYAuYrQkxNgjLGm6mxdSo48pTZjz0xuMTF1CPNT6zzI0DwFrBLCoiCuRET47IPRhplnsxX)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a03c900cbbce4e0c992826f22dcd1e3d&_e=BEwW2iCi7KMmkLoQDZKmx4FtVfkVr-fc12gQQLC5-1uBLVvcCVBxNEp5t4L1eS-6DXwZWCSkzH3h6pmeAXPU6ej83_JBHNemj3bWKjrKy1pbyP8UeTdAVCg_mS8Wlj1cWTe5V4vZKHw7C_jy-Sx0cY1e7z6DyeQRsIE4CtK7jvK5Z6PEHD24N4YOLkgdeKAmxIrRx9ZEdvlP2ULqAVujQ4Vn7Y6Qn7nGiDCMrwvNzPgLyMS8GLYzlq6_u7j2c6Zq6kXnHapEpsb0C23QryZyhCgHGHVx7X2tKOcgqqMV0wYCh92lqCnWT6EAbiRFbIPTtQrTjBN7S-LCf6a-cFtF45g6xiZlXSd3_L8K4WK7-rf3sv-155TMsfIrjKv4CcQYm3p2xXF-rh66SN8GDMwY3kp11e5DTzpVAHlznDNOcFEmeif8GpdIUPT3gIqUGhhY)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a03c900cbbce4e0c992826f22dcd1e3d&_e=BEwW2iCi7KMmkLoQDZKmx4FtVfkVr-fc12gQQLC5-1uBLVvcCVBxNEp5t4L1eS-6DXwZWCSkzH3h6pmeAXPU6ej83_JBHNemj3bWKjrKy1pbyP8UeTdAVCg_mS8Wlj1cWTe5V4vZKHw7C_jy-Sx0cY1e7z6DyeQRsIE4CtK7jvK5Z6PEHD24N4YOLkgdeKAmxIrRx9ZEdvlP2ULqAVujQ4Vn7Y6Qn7nGiDCMrwvNzPgLyMS8GLYzlq6_u7j2c6Zq6kXnHapEpsb0C23QryZyhCgHGHVx7X2tKOcgqqMV0wYL95g0iwV_M9I7wGKaWSh35mfKaQ7Bnt_RdSjbJmRlE3EGu1TZKClVUWK7yzsKaf0DjWsPYTSPdRE5ae9KUT29mHwx4-UQNqjBqOB3xRL6Nx23JvU3VNCvz_yVcK9o9LqTe9L5urui882Zkx-veA7I).

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | | | | | | | |
## Senate District Executive Committee
_(Texas)_
I had the honor of joining the Texas Democratic Party leadership at the Senate District Executive Committee meeting.
As a former county chair and a current candidate, I am truly grateful by the tireless work and commitment of all committee members and county chairs. Their dedication is the heart and soul of our party.
---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=e17dee6bf5&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| | | | | | | | |
# Food Drive
_(Huntsville, Texas)_
Every month, I have the privilege of volunteering at the MannaFest food pantry in Polk County. It's an opportunity to listen to and connect with the wonderful people in this community. I believe that true representation starts with these meaningful conversations.
How can we serve without understanding?
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=b595b620c7&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
## Faith and Fellowship
_(Onalaska, Texas)_
I joined a wonderful group dedicated to serving those in need through worship services at First United Methodist Church. It was an incredibly uplifting experience to gather together in faith and fellowship.

[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=93c999955a&e=a2a46ff12c)

## Community Center Sale
_(Houston, Texas)_
I attended an event supporting Bill Burch for Texas Railroad Commissioner. It's crucial to have a commissioner who prioritizes environmental protection and strengthens regulations for the well-being of all Texans.

| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=aec8060679&e=a2a46ff12c)

|

**Legislative Update**
H.R. 7024, titled "Tax Relief for American Families and Workers," was passed on January 31st with a vote of 357 in favor, 70 against, and 6 members present but not voting. The bill includes adjustments in tax credits for children, low-income housing, and natural disasters. Representative Luttrell voted yes on this bill. H.R. 6679, titled "No Immigration Benefits for Hamas Terrorists," also passed on January 31st with overwhelming support, gaining 422 votes in favor, 2 against, and 7 members present but not voting. Luttrell voted yes on this legislation as well. Another bill, H.R. 6678, titled "Consequences for Social Security Fraud," was passed on the same day with a vote of 272 in favor, 155 against, and 5 members present but not voting. It entails deportation for non-U.S. nationals producing false IDs. Representative Luttrell supported this bill. Furthermore, H.R. 5585, known as the "Raul Gonzales Officer Safety Act," passed on January 30th with a vote of 271 in favor, 154 against, and 7 members present but not voting. The bill aims to impose stronger federal criminal penalties for fleeing in a vehicle from federal, state, or local officers within 100 miles of the border. Luttrell voted yes on this measure. Additionally, H.R. 5528, titled "Safe and Smart Federal Purchasing," passed on January 29th with a unanimous vote of 397-0, with 34 members present but not voting. Representative Luttrell supported this bill. S. 3427, which concerns "Overtime Pay for Protective Services," passed on the same day with a vote of 379 in favor, 20 against, and 32 members present but not voting. Luttrell voted yes on this legislation. Earlier in the month, on January 18th, H.R. 6914, addressing "Pregnant Students Rights," narrowly passed with a vote of 212 in favor, 207 against, and 14 members present but not voting. The bill mandates that higher education institutions receiving federal funds inform pregnant students of their rights and resources to carry a baby to term, a measure Luttrell supported. Additionally, H.R. 6918, titled "Supporting Pregnant and Parenting Women and Families," passed with a vote of 214 in favor, 208 against, and 11 members present but not voting. This bill allows federal funds for programs exclusively providing funds after a woman becomes pregnant, a measure Luttrell supported. Lastly, H. Res 957, denouncing "Biden Administration open-borders policies," passed on January 17th with a vote of 225 in favor, 187 against, and 21 members present but not voting. Luttrell voted yes on this resolution. Earlier in the month, on January 11th, H.R. 788, titled "Stop Settlement Slush Funds," passed with a vote of 221 in favor, 197 against, and 24 members not voting. This bill prohibits payments on behalf of the U.S. to any person or entity outside the U.S. unless it's compensation for harm done by the payee or for services rendered. Representative Luttrell supported this measure as well.

This bill allows federal funds for programs exclusively providing funds after a woman becomes pregnant, a measure Luttrell supported. Lastly, H. Res 957, denouncing "Biden Administration open-borders policies," passed on January 17th with a vote of 225 in favor, 187 against, and 21 members present but not voting. Luttrell voted yes on this resolution. Earlier in the month, on January 11th, H.R. 788, titled "Stop Settlement Slush Funds," passed with a vote of 221 in favor, 197 against, and 24 members not voting. This bill prohibits payments on behalf of the U.S. to any person or entity outside the U.S. unless it's compensation for harm done by the payee or for services rendered. Representative Luttrell supported this measure as well. | | Thank you so much for your continuous support.\- Laura Jones for Congress TX-8 | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Laura Jones for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?April=20Newland?=
subject: Six
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman
body:
That's the number of days to go. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e515287afe72/re-hey-9345061?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Republicans --
It's hard to believe, but the 2024 Virgin Islands is in just six days' time.

The other day, I accompanied Congressman Wesley Hunt, who was sent down to personally represent President Trump, at events on St. Thomas and St. Croix. This week I've been helping the party line up the last couple of events before the caucus on February 8. We hope the Nikki Haley campaign will soon confirm events in the final stretch.

**Your vote in the caucus on Thursday, February 8 isn't just a vote for president. It's a vote to keep moving this party forward.**

We have recruited Derrick Callwood, who will make an excellent candidate for Virgin Islands senator from St. Thomas-St. John. We will also soon announce an equally excellent candidate from St. Croix.

There is so much work to do.

**As your next Republican national committeewoman, I will work with all Republicans to move the party forward, locally and nationally. That includes advancing the interests of our islands at the highest levels of the party and in Washington with a Republican president and a Republicans in Congress.**

Fellow Republicans, we can't afford to repeat mistakes of the past.

Virgin Islanders are desperate for a political alternative.

You can help make the Republican Party that political alternative by using your vote on Thursday, February 8 to move the party forward.
**Caucus Voting Locations**
* **St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted.**
* **St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay**
* **St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at Bluebeard's Castle, Estate Taarneberg**

[Pre-register to skip the registration ](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=3cacc24c32&e=d30db4cde8)[line on caucus day](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=81d0e66c91&e=d30db4cde8)
Respectfully,

April Newland
Candidate for National Committeewoman
340-643-4347
---

body:
Buy a bag and feed a vet | | | | | |

[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=6e2f789998&e=b2e0e42b55)
|
---
Peter,
I’ve told you a couple times about Heritage Gear. There’s some really exciting stuff happening with their veteran’s initiatives these days. This Super Bowl season, every bag you buy from us is going to help hungry American Veterans. Heritage Gear & Hunger Related Events, in collaboration with NFL Legends and renowned Chefs nationwide, are teaming up to eliminate hunger and food insecurity among US Veterans and their families.
From February 1st to 14th, your support can make a huge difference. [Shop online](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=cfe98b3606&e=b2e0e42b55), and a portion of the sales from any bag you purchase will be donated to the [Robert Irvine Foundation](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=d5adeeca53&e=b2e0e42b55), directly contributing to our mission. [Buy now](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=4768c21abb&e=b2e0e42b55), help a vet, or [click the graphic below](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=2f8fde8be8&e=b2e0e42b55) to learn more:

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1874%2E552475%2E_qFEKD)
Happy Groundhog Day, Peter!
To celebrate one of Pennsylvania’s greatest traditions, I have a joke for you:
Did you hear about the groundhog who ran for office? _His campaign had a great ground game..._
I know it’s corny, but trust me, that groundhog knew his stuff. Getting boots on the ground and talking with voters is important, especially in a race as competitive as this one.
**[That’s why I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or whatever you can to help us make crucial early investments in our ground game?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240202-1?refcode=em20240202-1&recurring=1&refcode2=1874_552475__qFEKD&akid=1874%2E552475%2E_qFEKD)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Rise of the Independents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”

|
---
| | | **A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A recent Gallup poll found that a record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.”
Compared to the 25% of Americans who identify with the Republican Party, and 25% who identify with the Democrat Party, _those who identify as Independent make up the largest swath of voters in the country today._
That Independents represent 49% of the country is a political earthquake to the East Coast Elites and the Uniparty Establishment in Washington.
_They know this is the first time in history that so many Americans identify as Independent_.
They know that Democrats and Republicans and their candidates face rejection at the polls in November.
The elites know that millions of Americans are fed up with the same-old, same-old politics as usual—the backroom deal-making, the collusion, the corruption, the cover-ups, the scandals, and the special interests.
And the majority of voters do not want a rematch between Biden or Trump—a match between the “lesser of two evils.”
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indepen_1_28_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
We agree with the majority of Americans. And we know Americans deserve better.
The national U.S. presidential election should be about which candidate can earn the trust of his or her citizens, unite opposing sides, and heal a deeply divided nation.
Which candidate can voters trust to do the right thing at the right time? Which candidate will deliver Americans truth and transparency and be deemed trustworthy enough to earn their vote—even if they sometimes disagree with that candidate?
We believe Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is that candidate, and we are deeply humbled to have earned your support.
In our ongoing effort to turn the ship of state around and give Independents a voice in 2024, [please consider supporting Robert F. clean_body: A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” | | | | A record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” | Dear Peter, A recent Gallup poll found that a record 49% of Americans consider themselves to be “politically independent.” Compared to the 25% of Americans who identify with the Republican Party, and 25% who identify with the Democrat Party, those who identify as Independent make up the largest swath of voters in the country today. That Independents represent 49% of the country is a political earthquake to the East Coast Elites and the Uniparty Establishment in Washington. They know this is the first time in history that so many Americans identify as Independent. They know that Democrats and Republicans and their candidates face rejection at the polls in November. The elites know that millions of Americans are fed up with the same-old, same-old politics as usual—the backroom deal-making, the collusion, the corruption, the cover-ups, the scandals, and the special interests. And the majority of voters do not want a rematch between Biden or Trump—a match between the “lesser of two evils.” We agree with the majority of Americans. And we know Americans deserve better. The national U.S. presidential election should be about which candidate can earn the trust of his or her citizens, unite opposing sides, and heal a deeply divided nation. Which candidate can voters trust to do the right thing at the right time? Which candidate will deliver Americans truth and transparency and be deemed trustworthy enough to earn their vote—even if they sometimes disagree with that candidate? We believe Robert F. subject: Republicans are trying to start World War 3. Don't let them.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Republicans push us into full-scale war with Iran](https://default.salsalabs.org/T714f1057-9d16-479c-b4ea-42a8fba5e1f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta763224d-bc75-425f-a7ef-d7eb5ea112c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | While President Biden is carefully choosing the right response to the attack on our troops by an Iran-backed militia, Republicans in Congress are trying like hell to push us into full scale war asap. [**Don't let them do it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0464164d-a601-4981-bcda-c41a3de59f5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) "Hit Iran now! Hit them hard!", demanded Lindsey Graham hysterically. And it just got more and more irrational from there, with Republicans trying to one-up each other on the craziness scale. **The goal here should be to prevent a full-scale war, not run at full speed into it, while shouting "wheeeeeeeee!!!!"** A war with Iran could cost thousands, or tens of thousands of American lives -- and possibly a lot more than that, given Iran's nuclear program. Republican need to shut the hell up, and let the adults figure out a way to respond properly and appropriately, [**Add your name, and demand that Republicans stop pushing us into full-scale war with Iran.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cf55627-32c2-4820-a1f3-d0e3cc69f5fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Amanda Chase
subject: What happened in the Virginia Senate This Week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Bills That Passed Out of the Senate & Heading to the House
| | | | VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY WEEKLY RECAP SENATE
WEEK ENDING 2/2/24
---
---
| Friends, Since session first gavel in on Wednesday, January 10, I've been remotely watching the Democrat controlled Senate committees, subcommittees and session each day. I'm not surprised to see Senate Democrats kill most Republican sponsored bills that are of significance and we actually care about. Nonetheless, it's still disturbing. The looming question is what happens in 2 years? Will we have a Republican governor who will veto these Democrat mandates? That question keeps me up at night.
This week we have seen a slew of gun control bills pass in both houses, bills to ban leaf blowers in the House and bills that keep males out of playing females sports die in the Senate. We've seen a Senate bill requiring public school athletes to get a mental health examination in order to continue participate in sports pass out of committee in the Senate.
Pro-individual liberty bills die and the authoritarian mandates continue to pass both the Senate and the House at record pace.
Our only backstop to the government control and mandates is Governor Glen Youngkin, who is going to have the opportunity to veto all of these mandates. Thankfully, the Democrats only have a one seat majority, so they will not be able to override any of the governor's vetoes.

---
|
---
It's now up to Governor Youngkin to veto all of the gun control legislation. Governor Youngkin is currently our only hope for stopping all of the bad legislation passing both houses right now.
I've shared with you highlights from the week and bills that I've personally been following. Hope you find it useful.
---
|
# BILLS THAT PASSED OUT OF
# SENATE COMMITTEES
# HIGHLIGHTS
---
| Here's a list of Senate bills that have passed out of the various Senate committees and are moving forward either to the Senate Floor for a vote, to the Senate Finance Committee to be funded or rereferred to another committee, if the committee believes the bill subject should be heard in another committee.
---
|
# VIRGINIA LEGISLATORS SUPPORT DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN
---
|
---
| Don't let Democrat legislators, like Senator Stella Pekarsky, fool you. They support discrimination against women in female sports. Unfortunately, in Virginia, women will continue to be discriminated against by males identifying as females in sports.
Both bills were killed in the Senate subcommittee on Public Education 3 Democrats to 2 Republicans.
Here are the good Republican backed bills protecting women. Democrat legislators opposed:
---
| | [SB723 Muchi (R)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBqKThnZaE2xUfGl0DqAgghah7w9jwX-DjPXQxdXONXp8-bLJ2q3TazB32aYp1jmfRnbwp3O25pvtITbAwyofm0N3GS1Tp7MuNBXXKkzzGY_jQ4SHkHM9RvoCDYE_uIxo8AV_zlIf-6UjaDzRLV_5vegy-6uQeTiMxvWti0wxYZIZS1mSYz8NvQEun0kEpSQiioXereq8yc=&c=AH4Wfl4UjqNYmAEE38jrfRycztWFClKM2Y11eUzpciuO6THlyrkt3g==&ch=27a1ESSqWARoGqIlNAn2DJKrPW2YASolMf8u-7gFhzqDYFvz2ePgZA==)
---
| [SB68 Peake (R)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBqKThnZaE2xUfGl0DqAgghah7w9jwX-DjPXQxdXONXp8-bLJ2q3TazB32aYp1jmRLTMX13-99HKQ_G5yPOCvCNvmPSYtyrZ0VjpZsXB-9VXK4rkMt8T7Va8xfdTVMvK69u8P6DcxnoH0gI5HirRjAdWWq6UfezczsHWbi8wmu21oDTiBy6n30Wr6epG7nKc42w3LzDaMbs=&c=AH4Wfl4UjqNYmAEE38jrfRycztWFClKM2Y11eUzpciuO6THlyrkt3g==&ch=27a1ESSqWARoGqIlNAn2DJKrPW2YASolMf8u-7gFhzqDYFvz2ePgZA==)
---
|
# Why Does Senator Pekarsky(D)
# Want to Require that Your Student
# Get a Mental Health Evaluation
# Before your Student Can
# Play Sports in Public Schools?
---
| [SB395](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBqKThnZaE2xUfGl0DqAgghah7w9jwX-DjPXQxdXONXp8-bLJ2q3TTOYAMGPOh1fzo7H3OtCbJ-9BuNl_mH11lvzWpU6TGK645_Ruf7ZU2wmM8e-JbDHs9zFez5bPkMAiLr0OiV9oZtEfW7l06h9jao5sa4maa-6fyx7dRcQhDesww8Tm9P3psASU6IWwkWEbJaezAiUegw=&c=AH4Wfl4UjqNYmAEE38jrfRycztWFClKM2Y11eUzpciuO6THlyrkt3g==&ch=27a1ESSqWARoGqIlNAn2DJKrPW2YASolMf8u-7gFhzqDYFvz2ePgZA==)[ Pekarsky (D)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBqKThnZaE2xUfGl0DqAgghah7w9jwX-DjPXQxdXONXp8-bLJ2q3TSH_AWp5EnlfpR5el6uHyHRPw51lIR7He0H2mebCVeAeES41N71BQu3l8ABOZdGvw1BWkCc9CF5iKl1gMFMVMJqJ49KxdhmmqnEP_4FWMjU55WSCf0FBBQOQO7Taxc4iJz4B6i5EE5GM42apwv1B3Zc=&c=AH4Wfl4UjqNYmAEE38jrfRycztWFClKM2Y11eUzpciuO6THlyrkt3g==&ch=27a1ESSqWARoGqIlNAn2DJKrPW2YASolMf8u-7gFhzqDYFvz2ePgZA==) is a Virginia Senate bill that should alarm every parent. Why are we requiring a mental health examination for public school athletes?
If this bill passes, your student will be required to submit a mental health evaluation before they can participate in public school sports.
This is way too intrusive and every parent should call every Democrat sitting in the State Senate and tell them to oppose.
The bill is being passed by for the week. Please call [Senator Pekarsky](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IBqKThnZaE2xUfGl0DqAgghah7w9jwX-DjPXQxdXONXp8-bLJ2q3TSH_AWp5EnlfpR5el6uHyHRPw51lIR7He0H2mebCVeAeES41N71BQu3l8ABOZdGvw1BWkCc9CF5iKl1gMFMVMJqJ49KxdhmmqnEP_4FWMjU55WSCf0FBBQOQO7Taxc4iJz4B6i5EE5GM42apwv1B3Zc=&c=AH4Wfl4UjqNYmAEE38jrfRycztWFClKM2Y11eUzpciuO6THlyrkt3g==&ch=27a1ESSqWARoGqIlNAn2DJKrPW2YASolMf8u-7gFhzqDYFvz2ePgZA==) and encourage her to strike her bill. Public schools are being directed to screen all public school students for mental health issues.

clean_body: Bills That Passed Out of the Senate & Heading to the House | | | | VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY WEEKLY RECAP SENATE WEEK ENDING 2/2/24 | Friends, Since session first gavel in on Wednesday, January 10, I've been remotely watching the Democrat controlled Senate committees, subcommittees and session each day. I'm not surprised to see Senate Democrats kill most Republican sponsored bills that are of significance and we actually care about. Nonetheless, it's still disturbing. The looming question is what happens in 2 years? Will we have a Republican governor who will veto these Democrat mandates? That question keeps me up at night. This week we have seen a slew of gun control bills pass in both houses, bills to ban leaf blowers in the House and bills that keep males out of playing females sports die in the Senate. We've seen a Senate bill requiring public school athletes to get a mental health examination in order to continue participate in sports pass out of committee in the Senate. Pro-individual liberty bills die and the authoritarian mandates continue to pass both the Senate and the House at record pace. Our only backstop to the government control and mandates is Governor Glen Youngkin, who is going to have the opportunity to veto all of these mandates. Thankfully, the Democrats only have a one seat majority, so they will not be able to override any of the governor's vetoes. | It's now up to Governor Youngkin to veto all of the gun control legislation. Governor Youngkin is currently our only hope for stopping all of the bad legislation passing both houses right now. I've shared with you highlights from the week and bills that I've personally been following. Hope you find it useful. | BILLS THAT PASSED OUT OF SENATE COMMITTEES HIGHLIGHTS | Here's a list of Senate bills that have passed out of the various Senate committees and are moving forward either to the Senate Floor for a vote, to the Senate Finance Committee to be funded or rereferred to another committee, if the committee believes the bill subject should be heard in another committee. | VIRGINIA LEGISLATORS SUPPORT DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN | | Don't let Democrat legislators, like Senator Stella Pekarsky, fool you. They support discrimination against women in female sports. Unfortunately, in Virginia, women will continue to be discriminated against by males identifying as females in sports. Both bills were killed in the Senate subcommittee on Public Education 3 Democrats to 2 Republicans. Here are the good Republican backed bills protecting women. Democrat legislators opposed: | | == | == | Why Does Senator Pekarsky(D) Want to Require that Your Student Get a Mental Health Evaluation Before your Student Can Play Sports in Public Schools? | == is a Virginia Senate bill that should alarm every parent. Why are we requiring a mental health examination for public school athletes? If this bill passes, your student will be required to submit a mental health evaluation before they can participate in public school sports. This is way too intrusive and every parent should call every Democrat sitting in the State Senate and tell them to oppose. The bill is being passed by for the week. Please call == and encourage her to strike her bill. Public schools are being directed to screen all public school students for mental health issues. | | == | STATUS OF BILLS IN PRIVILEGES & ELECTIONS HIGHLIGHTS | | == | == | == == == == == == == == | | Peter, as the groundhog peeks out to predict the weather, we at Upset the Setup are reminded of a different kind of forecast – one that concerns the future of our democracy.
Just like Groundhog Day, we find ourselves in a recurring cycle.**A cycle where the GOP continually undermines our democratic values, attacks our rights, and pushes their agenda at the cost of the people. If we don't act, this cycle will continue – leading to a prolonged 'winter' for our democracy.**
But there's hope. With your support, we can break this cycle. We can bring an early _spring_ of progress, renewal, and positive change.
Imagine a future where:
✔️ Our rights are protected and expanded, not restricted.
✔️ Legislation reflects the needs and voices of the people.
✔️ Elections are fair, free, and accessible to all.
This is the 'spring' we strive for, but we need your help to get there.
As the groundhog makes its prediction, let's make our own forecast – a future where democracy thrives and the people's voice prevails.

name: Mayra Flores
subject: My final promise to you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
The next few hours are the most important

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682470%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f2%2bT%2bI9XIoJgqDX5s94%2bJg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I promise I won't shame you or question your party loyalty.

I promise I won't badger you with these emails if you ask them to stop.

I promise this message is truly heartfelt & I promise it is worth reading.

My name is Mayra Flores. I'm the America First candidate in TX-34.

A seat that was a Democrat stronghold for over a century until we flipped it red in a stunning special election upset against Biden & Pelosi last summer.

Our historic victory made me the first Mexican-born Congresswoman in U.S. history.

Then Biden & the Democrats spent millions to wipe the floor with me & they narrowly flipped it back to blue in November.

As a proud conservative, I refuse to bend the knee to anyone but God. I don’t believe in giving up.

But this race is so close that all Joe Biden needs to do is make a phone call to one of his billionaire friends & that would be the end of it all.

**Unfortunately, I don't have those kinds of connections & given the speed at which the Democrats raise capital, this race will be won or lost in the next few hours.**

This is our first & last chance at mounting this historic comeback to retake the most important seat in America.

**So please, if there is any amount you can spare today, it would truly mean the world to me if you chipped in.**

And I promise I’ll never forget it.

Thank you,
Mayra

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I8a6bkzL4ppRzBOtAc2w7g&sysid=1)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1093%2E135344%2Ep4N1v-)

Friend -
If you’re like us, you’re getting a lot of emails and texts asking for contributions to various Senate campaigns. Like, a lot.
Every race is important. But the truth is, few will be closer than ours. Look at this chart of recent polls of our race, compiled by 538.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240201-2-550&t=2&akid=1093%2E135344%2Ep4N1v-)
Up two. Down two. Up one. Tied.
This race is going to go back and forth all the way to the wire. But that also means we need to campaign hard all the way to the finish line.
Because if we don’t – if we fall behind in the polls – it will be even harder to catch back up. That’s why these emails are important. We have fundraising goals we have to continually meet to fund a winning campaign.
And we can’t do that without your help. It’s why we ask:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 directly to Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan? This is going to be one of the closest races in the country so your support today ensures we have the funds to make sure we don’t fall behind.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240201-2-550&t=3&akid=1093%2E135344%2Ep4N1v-)

| | Peter, Right now, Democrats are working OVERTIME to compromise the integrity of our elections.

While Republicans across the country are promoting common-sense measures like Voter ID's, the Left is shutting them down at every turn.

It’s absolutely wild: you need an ID to buy a beer, drive a car, get on a flight, and so much more - but somehow, you don’t need one to decide the future of our country.

**As your Senator, I will do EVERYTHING I can to protect the democracy I fought for. But first, I need your help to get to Washington.**

**[**Will you pitch in today and join our fight to protect election integrity?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=0561e1aac71642c7a223dd23569d8f1a&_e=1E7K-dSxxwWYHzmGJd4pbuLJCBtzN5fcUYQ5jShu_YJmTL8Qkj_ZZ8zA4-79kD7_LWpgA_EiKYTG-CD9OdOKoHJI00eiCX1LCY6DKbdefywuDXlUrMYj0xthN94-Gobjd_keH7U2C85c7jP3Rr7PLwcbjOE7kuiofrcKHdrmpVpG_CqE_qDMs6mHJHOBdfU7knuaisQbkQ7n1ph_1WMfKaQ0Y2HbS-_aJ_kaQLGpJL7FFUv6isBDBfFeG3MJyh3hTt2rwwE6kA9JJpUXAQEUOLY4mhq70VaWxhl5qwdm34ZkMRaIDzP4-11GMh6Q91e4e2zinRUvJBiJsQt4whw_G0aqtvnFoJntW95EmUJODAYWQxfdifTIO1n3UPhXC5bD)**

Peter, I put my life on the line serving in the Navy to keep our country free.

_So when I see the Left trying to undermine that freedom, it grinds my gears._

Elections are the foundation of our democracy, and we MUST do everything we can to protect them from the criminals who want to undermine them.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Right now, Democrats are working OVERTIME to compromise the integrity of our elections. While Republicans across the country are promoting common-sense measures like Voter ID's, the Left is shutting them down at every turn. It’s absolutely wild: you need an ID to buy a beer, drive a car, get on a flight, and so much more - but somehow, you don’t need one to decide the future of our country. As your Senator, I will do EVERYTHING I can to protect the democracy I fought for. But first, I need your help to get to Washington. Peter, I put my life on the line serving in the Navy to keep our country free. So when I see the Left trying to undermine that freedom, it grinds my gears. Elections are the foundation of our democracy, and we MUST do everything we can to protect them from the criminals who want to undermine them. If we fail to protect our elections, the Left will have a clear path to use fraud and deceit to stay in power. Thank you, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. body:
This is everything you need to know right now

| |
---
| | | **FROM THE DESK _OF_ SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON**
Friend,

This is Speaker Mike Johnson, and I apologize if I'm catching you at a bad time, but I wanted to quickly connect with you on the NY-03 Special Election happening in a matter of days.

As you may already know, our GOP candidate is Mazi Pilip.

She was born in Ethiopia during a time of intense antisemitism, and was then evacuated to Israel. She went on to become a soldier in the IDF before coming to America the right and legal way.

Mazi is pro-family, pro-law enforcement, and pro-border security -- she has my complete and total endorsement.

But what she doesn't have is a rolodex filled with Hollywood billionaires and Wall Street bigwigs cutting big checks like her left-wing opponent does.

And that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

I'm doing everything I can to support Mazi and keep this seat red. I have to -- _**our House Majority depends on it.**_

I've contributed to her, I've asked Republican members of Congress to contribute to her, and now I'm asking you.

So if you can, and only if you can, please join me in supporting Mazi today.

---
| | [SUPPORT MAZI PILIP](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b5567369a02b4ce9ac38f5ae809b99e0&_e=yES2r3EI6PV0X_tP4JKkrnGWsfmRxX5NHj8fgc-ISekSt86SeJLVOVtvuuPIJPwa9WeghXc22EPk5V6tQaKQCS2bnpjY6yDpuptz9oAejNy0t0EQm_j1K40L0NHMM1GV9hyA1RgG3hDGMTgSdjzKdehjsu4nHYwj0fDbQNWfeehegoRBz1upu_PjT7Ve0kZb2zdlzkUR9KteoJTAPvX6tAtcFmYC7eYTF9LvVcdgbseygXmbqRzme3NuGQJ7lGvZ_jxZlP1aMP3mk0cQ0vrE3acOi5xzEYry1bm53MuGQga0cJ_SLKxihUtkQgVqojun_HYWeTXmWMegzV4fqy2yBsHcHHqukf5ZdNPW3p4x577i_nVM1oRRf5xtn5GUuU-kiHYGOIMEHRDjoFa3aixe5qev9PdRPt6EJXzmTCC6EoB_9dN9L8CJcDF74fHqsqZY)

Mike Johnson

subject: DCNF Reporter Describes Video Showing Illegals Under Guard In Atlanta Airport
body:
And Biden Admin Shells Out $200,000 For Research On App To Teach Men How To Sound Like Women

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rmaCskjYjgK08jUcMhLFMg&sysid=1 DCNF Reporter Describes Video Showing Illegals Under Guard In Atlanta Airport

A Daily Caller News Foundation reporter joined a Georgia state senator to discuss video showing illegal immigrants being held at Hartfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport on Thursday. The DCNF obtained exclusive video shot by Republican state Sen. Colton Moore on Tuesday, which shows one of those guarding the room preventing Moore from filming by taking his cell phone. DCNF investigative reporter Jennie Taer told

The National Institutes of Health (NIH) approved a research grant in November for over $200,000 to create an app that helps men who identify as transgender sound like women. The grant, first reported by The College Fix, was approved in November 2023 by the NIH’s Deafness and Other Communication Disorders department and will be run by Vesna Dominika []

The U.S. added 353,000 nonfarm payroll jobs in January as the unemployment rate remained at 3.7%, according to Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) data released Friday. Economists anticipated that the country would add 180,000 jobs in January compared to the 216,000 that were added in December and that the unemployment rate would tick up to 3.8% []

name: PRIORITY GOP COMMUNICATION [House GOP]
subject: success or failure – you decide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The latest FEC reports just dropped and we need to fill you in IMMEDIATELY:

| |

---
| | | Friend - the latest FEC reports just dropped and we need to fill you in IMMEDIATELY:
❌ House Democrats just announced a $12.3 million fundraising haul in the final stretch of last year - their warchest is now **OVERFLOWING** with $120+ million

❌ Joe Biden’s favorite Super PAC just pledged a **QUARTER BILLION DOLLARS** to destroy Republicans up and down the ballot.

❌ We’re trailing behind them by millions of dollars and we just missed our **VERY FIRST** deadline of the year - if we don’t get it together and now, maybe we don’t deserve to hold the Majority.
But while the Democrat Machine is schmoozing billionaires and special interests to fill up their warchests, we’re calling on our strong grassroots army to kick it into HIGH GEAR!

_Here’s the plan:_

_**[We’re activating MILLION-DOLLAR FUNDRAISING BLITZ between now and the end of the month. It’s ambitious- we know. But that’s the absolute minimum we need to push our Conservative candidates over the top in key battleground districts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682407%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WgrJpO71SgfszlxGMFDejw&sysid=1 "We’re activating
MILLION-DOLLAR FUNDRAISING BLITZ between now and the end of the month. It’s
ambitious – we know. But that’s the absolute minimum we need to push our
Conservative candidates over the top in key battleground districts.")**_

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We’ll amplify our positive vision for the future of our country, reach more independent voters in swing states, and turn out more Conservatives to the polls.

**IF WE FAIL:** We'll be forced to GUT our get-out-the-vote operations, SLASH our critical voter contact programs, and pull our ads OFF THE AIR.

What happens this month could determine the course of our country for generations to come.

Can we count on you to help out?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682408%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SBblIzIwpcJ3GTS%2b9rpoww&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682400%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S39OKSIE%2bHcOLEaR0SHAxA&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682402%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pmwG5rDbOTsRgWhe7QSf1Q&sysid=1)**
---
To victory,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---

---

I’m launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682416%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7dkOlCwbS%2bj7HFdMDPAXnw&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I’m humbly asking you to provide any feedback you’d be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/majority-leader-survey-footer/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240202_PA-AU1.113562_t1443588-1756&ex_tid=20240202_PA-AU1.113562_t1443588-1756&utm_content=tv-au2-20240202&xunv=tv-au2-20240202 "TAKE THE SURVEY >>")

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

subject: Can we talk for a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
The upcoming special elections over the next month will make-or-break our state Democratic majorities, and we risk jeopardizing our hard-earned progress if extreme Republicans take back control. | | |

We'll just cut to the chase, Peter, here’s 3 reasons why we need the Biden impeachment inquiry to end immediately »
* **There’s no real evidence!** The allegations against President Biden are based on flimsy speculation and unsubstantiated claims, lacking any credible proof.
* **It’s a political hit job!** The impeachment inquiry is driven by the GOP wanting to get revenge for Trump losing in 2020. They have no genuine concern of wrongdoing.

Team Trone’s steady progress is a testament to the hard work David is putting in around the state to listen, collaborate, and build relationships with every community. As we near the final stretch, our team is endlessly energized by your support and commitment to bringing real change to Washington. | Let's keep this momentum going! Joe Bowen Communications Director David Trone for U.S. Senate Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States | mailto:info@davidtrone.com Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Is Max scared?
body:
| |
---
Peter, Over the past week, I've detailed how we have a Republican running in the Democratic primary against us and how Dennis Kucinich is launching an independent bid in this to play spoiler in this race for Ohio's 7th district. **But one question remains: w hat is going on that max feels the need to do this?** When you look at all the evidence, I think there's an obvious answer. **Max is scared.** We almost beat him last time. Then Ohio stood up for democracy and abortion rights. We're even more strongly positioned to win this time, and we're ready to throw Max out of Congress. name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: Pushing Palestinians out of their homeland is ethnic cleansing.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In a clear example of ethnic cleansing, top Israeli officials are openly
calling to push millions of Palestinians out of Gaza—and advocating for
replacing them with Israeli settlers.

Many Israeli politicians have demanded a “second Nakba,” referring to the
catastrophe of 1948, when Zionist militias violently expelled 750,000
Palestinians from their lands, destroyed hundreds of Palestinian villages,
and massacred about 15,000 Palestinians.

A member of Prime Minister Netanyahu’s cabinet said: “We are now rolling
out the Gaza Nakba.”

Some survivors of 1948’s Nakba fled to Gaza. Along with Palestinians in
exile outside of Palestine, they were denied the right to return home. Now
they and their descendants have become refugees once more, forced to flee
multiple locations in just three months.

Dropping tens of thousands of U.S. bombs on the tiny Gaza Strip, the
Israeli military has already forcibly displaced 2 million Palestinians—90%
of Gaza’s population.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140343?t=1001&akid=33127%2E1203867%2EV6ZF2E ]Sign the petition to the Biden administration: End this campaign of
ethnic cleansing now. No more forced displacement of Palestinians, and no
forced migration out of Palestine!

SIGN THE PETITION

Razing entire neighborhoods to the ground and destroying a majority of
buildings, Israel’s government has rapidly made much of Gaza
uninhabitable.

Meanwhile, the Israeli military continues to bomb areas it designated as
“safe” for Palestinian civilians.

Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving
Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and
other basic needs.

What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime.

But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to
permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza.

Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended
the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials
in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and
resettlement is their goal.

Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced
Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s
nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee.

Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced
displacement of Palestinians.

But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund
Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s
government from accountability.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140343?t=1002&akid=33127%2E1203867%2EV6ZF2E ]Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: Don't let Israel’s
government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move
Israeli settlers into Gaza. Stop supporting ethnic cleansing and war
crimes!

SIGN NOW

We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the
blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 24,000 Palestinians.
That’s more than 1 in every 100 people in Gaza!

Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in
oppression. May we continue building a better world together.

In solidarity,

Rep. Rashida Tlaib

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240202-33127-footer&t=1003&refcode2=33127_1203867_V6ZF2E&akid=33127%2E1203867%2EV6ZF2E

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=33127%2E1203867%2EV6ZF2E

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Along with this brutal destruction, Israel’s government is depriving Palestinians in Gaza of food, water, shelter, medical assistance, and other basic needs. What’s happening now is ethnic cleansing, which is a war crime. But many Israeli politicians want to go even further, openly calling to permanently expel all Palestinians from Gaza. Prime Minister Netanyahu’s Intelligence Minister has openly recommended the transfer of all Palestinians in Gaza to Egypt. Other senior officials in Netanyahu’s cabinet have made it clear that forced expulsion and resettlement is their goal. Netanyahu has been trying to push countries to take displaced Palestinians, calling his plan “voluntary migration.” Of course, there’s nothing “voluntary” about bombing people to make them flee. Biden and leaders in his administration say they reject forced displacement of Palestinians. But their actions show otherwise: They are continuing to arm and fund Israel’s military as it commits these war crimes, while shielding Israel’s government from accountability. [ ]Sign to Biden and leaders in his administration: Don't let Israel’s government expel Palestinians from their ancestral homeland or move Israeli settlers into Gaza. Stop supporting ethnic cleansing and war crimes! SIGN NOW We cannot allow our government to continue enabling the bombing or the blockade on Gaza, which has already killed at least 24,000 Palestinians. That’s more than 1 in every 100 people in Gaza! Thank you for speaking up against our government’s complicity in oppression. May we continue building a better world together. In solidarity, Rep. Rashida Tlaib Contribute to Justice Democrats:

As a Green Beret who spent my career fighting on the front lines in the Middle East, I know the region better than most.

I saw it in complete chaos when I served under other Presidents. There was endless war and violence with no end in sight.**

_And then, President Trump did the unthinkable - he brought historic peace to the Middle East._

**He is the only President to leave the region safer than he found it, and it’s no coincidence that without his leadership war and terrorism have SKYROCKETED.
**
President Trump kept the world - and America - safe. Now, he needs our help to do it again.

name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania... ->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=13407%2E9716520%2EM4tNtr)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=13407%2E9716520%2EM4tNtr)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewFebruary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=13407%2E9716520%2EM4tNtr)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=13407%2E9716520%2EM4tNtr)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240202-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=13407%2E9716520%2EM4tNtr)

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania -- | | I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one. If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning. All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year. That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from real voters like you \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate. name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: A Year of Action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
# **A Message from the Chairwoman****
---
| | ** _A Year of Action!_**_**
---
Friends, 2024 must be a year of action! We have so much to do and it is happening fast, **and we need you to be a part of our efforts**. This is one of the most important election years in recent memory, and Republicans need to come together. Here are two things you can do right now to take action in 2024:** **1) File to run for precinct committeeman and state delegate:** We are one week away from the filing deadline, and this is the best way Republicans can get involved at the grassroots level. In order for us to continue to grow as a party, it is essential that all counties fill these local positions. **Time is running out, the deadline is noon on February 9th to turn your paperwork in to your county clerk's office,** **So please be sure to file your[CAN-37 form ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/6588b30f8ae5c3f3c3d6b838967d376c/40313)before it's too late**. Together, we will continue to build our party! ****** **2) Register for our 2024 Congress of Counties:** Congress of Counties is just three weeks away, on February 23-24! **Register ASAP! Registration closes at 5pm on February 19th.** This two-day networking and training event for Indiana Republicans allows us to all come together and share the tools and skills that will make 2024 a successful election year. Be sure to go to our [website](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/a08b00b1f8ad7c76c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for more details and to register! **** This is going to be an AMAZING year, and we want all Republicans to be a part of it. It is time to come together and take action! Thank you for all that you do.
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review****
---
| |
# _Gov. Holcomb Announces $800 Million Meta Investment __
---
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/cb7311ef6a4a6488c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**Governor Eric Holcomb** [announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/2c0cbd59d09baf25c3d6b838967d376c/40313) an $800 million investment by Meta to build a state of the art data center campus in Jeffersonville, Indiana. The new facility will support approximately 100 operational jobs and hundreds of construction jobs in the coming years. ** **What he’s saying** : “Today is a great day for Indiana and for our southeast region as we welcome another major investment to the River Ridge Commerce Center... Indiana’s efforts to cultivate industries of the future are already paying dividends for Hoosiers, attracting growth in critical sectors like data storage, semiconductors, energy and electric vehicles. We’re excited to welcome Meta to Indiana and look forward to the company’s partnership in growing Jeffersonville and the southeast Indiana region.”, **Gov. Holcomb** said in a [press release](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/9e060ed24ae7a56cc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
**** **What else happened this week? Gov. Holcomb**[announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/2093afe8fbd2a07ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) the addition of early childhood education and child care credential training options under Indiana’s signature workforce training programs.**
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/3fe07031002eb7aec3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/be562388ce66b310c3d6b838967d376c/40313).**

---
|

# Republican Mayor Takes New Approach to Communicating with Residents

---
---
Chris Jensen, the Republican mayor of Noblesville, IN, was recently acknowledged by the IBJ for his transparent communication approach with constituents. Mayor Jensen regularly shares video updates online, addressing city issues for all residents to access. Notably, he makes his cell phone number publicly available, showcasing his commitment to being accessible to the community. Additionally, drawing from his own initial challenges in office, Mayor Jensen extends himself as a resource to neighboring city mayors. This collaborative approach showcases Republicans at their best when working together. Mayor Jensen's open communication style and collaboration with fellow mayors serves as a model for mayors across the state. You can read the article [here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/f1c855d0ea4d4add3947229f28c3afba/5ee80f20ae8b77dfc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# Republican Tax Cuts

---
---
| | Who do you think knows best when it comes to managing your finances? Democrats think they know better, but Republicans understand that nobody is going to know the needs of your family better than you! Despite the constant overtaxing of citizens by the federal government and our neighboring states, they still can't seem to pay their bills! Meanwhile, Hoosiers have experienced constant TAX CUTS over the last 20+ years of Republican leadership, and we always balance our budget! Here's what Republicans have been doing to make sure Hoosiers have extra padding in their wallets:
* Estimated $20.6 Billion total savings for Hoosier taxpayers since 2011. This includes:
* $11.4 Billion in property tax credits.
* $3.6 Billion in corporate tax cuts.
* $2.6 Billion in individual income tax cuts.
* Over $8.6 Billion in savings for Hoosiers in the last 3 years alone.

In 2022, Republicans in Indiana passed the biggest tax cut in Hoosier history, cutting our taxes from 3.23% to 2.9% over a 7 year span. THEN, during the 2023 session, Republicans accelerated the timeline to a 2.9% rate by 2027. The income tax cut to 3.05% in 2024 is estimated to save $100 MILLION for Hoosiers in ONE YEAR ALONE. The Party that has Hoosiers' backs, and protects their wallets, is the Republican Party. We understand the impact of Bidenflation on our day to day lives. Hoosier Republicans are just trying to ease that strain.
---
| | |
---

❌ House Democrats just announced a $12.3 million fundraising haul in the final stretch of last year - their warchest is now **OVERFLOWING** with $120+ million

**I refuse to back down from this fight, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence.**

body:

❌ House Democrats just announced a $12.3 million fundraising haul in the final stretch of last year - their warchest is now **OVERFLOWING** with $120+ million

But while the Democrat Machine is schmoozing billionaires and special interests to fill up their warchests, we're calling on our strong grassroots army to kick it into HIGH GEAR!

body:

# [Add your name: DO NOT Give Trump a Nobel Peace Prize! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tade9d81b-9d4f-4131-8cc7-c31af3855b95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | This is absurd – Trump has just been nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize (yes, really – and it's not the first time!) by one of his MAGA loyalists in Congress. The Nobel Peace Prize is awarded to inspiring leaders who make a positive difference in the world, like Martin Luther King Jr., Jimmy Carter, and Barack Obama. How anyone could think that Trump belongs in this category is beyond us! Trump has praised dictators, incited violence, and attempted to overthrow our democracy. He does not deserve the honor of a Nobel Peace Prize. **[Add your name now: DO NOT give Trump a Nobel Peace Prize>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08c1880c-7991-452f-a806-821e7e5e2a28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **

Bill

clean_body: Like our good friend Elmo | | = = Hi friend, Like our good friend Elmo from Sesame Street, I'm checking in to ask how you're doing. Look, in a critical election year where the fate of our democracy rests on preventing a wannabe dictator with 91 indictments from winning the White House — who, might I add, attempted to overthrow our government and has the support of the majority of House Republicans — things are going to get fairly stressful. It's of vital importance that we reach out and check in on one another, friend. Working together is how we'll reach victory this year, and we need to care for each other. So I'm asking, how are you feeling, and what concerns do you have right now? Reply to this email to let me know what matters most to you, and what you hope Democrats will accomplish when we take back the House in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Good to hear from you. Check out this video I shot while in Iraq to learn more!

name: NRSC
subject: Desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Chuck Schumer’s Senate Majority PAC announced $63 million in ad spending in just TWO battleground states. Don’t let Schumer and his goons buy up all the airtime in Montana and Nevada; help NRSC keep pace and stay on the air.

We can't underscore this enough, Friend.

Chuck Schumer is willing to do _**[ANYTHING](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqqojosg5rlmlgdchtv2a2t47f9idepss31dji0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)**_ to hang on to power in Washington.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj6ha6abhthnimb33ivp8p0f6vra2dj4a5hli8q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)

**[His Super PAC, Senate Majority PAC, just announced another $63 million in spending in Nevada and Montana, the two most competitive Senate races on the map.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjps4n4kpf39iafosj1bqnja1f1t22hfhktbcgso_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)**

Democrats know we have amazing candidates - Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy and West Point Graduate Sam Brown - running against two of their most vulnerable Democrat Senators.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd02hnpuksutmmrtv1212oru6dk4ao3ulq8etk60_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)

Chuck relies on his year-in, year-out tactic of outspending Republican candidates to take the lead in critical races. We can't fall for his same dirty tricks again. We have got to get our candidates on the air, spreading the truth to voters and fighting back against Schumer's lies.

**[The Democrats are getting desperate.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z674kkfg9gn4ci0vsrhej2o06df1jaco8ev4923o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)** They see the writing on the wall with President Trump leading the primary and the Biden agenda running the country into the ground. They know Republican voters will turn out in huge numbers, and they fear their voters may stay home.

It's our job to bring their fear into reality. The best way to do that is to run our ads that spread the truth about Democrats' disastrous agenda and the lies they are telling to cover up their failures. Taking on a party of professional liars is a tall task, but we can do it with your support.

**[We're counting on you to help us stand up against their attacks targeting two American heroes. Even $5 or $10 will help fund ads to help set the record straight in Montana and Nevada - and keep Chuck Schumer from drowning out their own ads.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4pvq56ostv0oi2hqab23u6a5thb5f620f3i190_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)**

******************************************************[Support NRSC Ads>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp45m1r16n2kblvfp1gtsei1p2kmfmuakh06tv4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)******************************************************

These advertising dollars are essential for modern campaigns. Millions upon millions of dollars get spent through the election to buy millions of chances to talk to voters directly through screens. We can't let the Democrats monopolize screen time, or our voters will get discouraged and choose to stay home.

That's how we could lose in this year full of opportunity. We can't let that happen. Not with President Trump on the ballot and Joe Biden seemingly doing everything he can to destroy our country and weaken our position internationally. We must stand up for our country and put a stop to all the destruction from Democrats' agenda.

**[Please be as generous as you can when selecting your contribution amount today, knowing your gift will directly fund the campaigns of Tim Sheehy in Montana and Sam Brown in Nevada as they take on politically connected Schumer allies in the most competitive Senate races in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocjtuulbenainvc7cnknebnuvpql3pikfi9rmdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)**

Thank you,

Senate Republican HQ

******************************************************[Support NRSC Ads>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze54a48b43fu6a305gkfl99luj5o90v4ouh2n4ao_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)******************************************************

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorgtr0ldg3v5bi1evugb0j275c5glp5qvgvi88g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjg6eor2clh2bs)
---
Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense.

American Action News

_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
