subject: Suozzi Volunteer Newsletter: Issue #7
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23169dd1d891/suozzi-volunteer-newsletter-issue-12675388?e=2d63ff009b)
---
# Early Voting Starts Tomorrow!
# February 3rd
# Find your early voting location [**HERE**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=de8ef4545e&e=2d63ff009b)
February 2, 2024
Hi Team,
My name is Sara Castelli, and I am part of the Suozzi Team. I oversee many
different aspects of the Suozzi campaign, so you may have seen me at
several of our recent events, or maybe you just recognize my name from our
weekly newsletter. Either way, I’m thrilled to introduce you to another
breakdown of our campaign. This week was a huge success, and I’m excited to
carry this energy into the **remaining 11 days of this campaign and help Tom
Suozzi get elected to the United States Congress!
**
Early voting starts tomorrow Saturday, February 3 through Sunday, February 11th! This is the final stretch!! Your participation in phonebanking and canvassing will continue to make an enormous difference. We have shown that we can absolutely make a difference, so let’s maintain this momentum! Keep engaging in direct voter contact efforts; stop into Suozzi events or at the office to help write out addresses or stamp envelopes. Let's spread the word about the election and create a brighter future for District 3! We can all help return sanity to Congress.

Thank you for your dedication and hard work. I look forward to seeing all
the great work we accomplish in the remaining days.
Best,Sara Castelli
|
---
# OPPORTUNITIES TO VOLUNTEER:

**Women For Suozzi Rally**
[](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=f5e5200ba1&e=2d63ff009b)
**CALLING ALL PORT WASHINGTON, GREAT NECK, MANHASSET, and NORTH HEMPSTEAD WOMEN!** Please join Tom Suozzi, Congresswoman Grace Meng, Laura Curran, Judi Bosworth and more very special guests in Port Washington on **Saturday, February 3rd at 1pm** for a rally in support of a **woman’s right to choose! ... and Vote Early!**
**RSVP here:**[**Mobilize Link**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=70e8d84ce4&e=2d63ff009b)
# South Asian Early Vote Party
Join Team Suozzi and fellow supporters as we host a South Asian Early Vote Party on **Sunday, February 4th at 10:45 am!** With under two weeks left until Election Day, showing up and demonstrating your support has never been as important. **Come support and hear from Congressman Tom Suozzi at 258-10 Hillside Ave, Floral Park!**
**PLEASE RSVP HERE:**[**Mobilize Link**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=fe3f5c0d43&e=2d63ff009b)
# Glen Cove Early Vote Party
Join Team Suozzi and fellow supporters as we host an Early Vote Party in Glen Cove on **Sunday, February 4th at 2:00 pm**! Early voting in Glen Cove is held at Glen Cove City Hall from 2/3-2/11. **Come support and hear from Congressman Tom Suozzi at 10 Hendrick Ave, Glen Cove!**
**PLEASE RSVP HERE:**[**Mobilize Link**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=9b8fddd8a8&e=2d63ff009b)
# CAMPAIGN CANVASSING

After yet another electric weekend of community events, rallies for Congressman Suozzi’s campaign, and canvassing efforts (more on that below!), we are thrilled to carry our ASTOUNDING momentum into the final push of the campaign. With ONLY 11 DAYS until election day, every effort makes a huge difference. Thank you to everyone who has canvassed so far, and check out the information below for more canvassing opportunities. As February 13th draws closer, we must keep pushing and working together, because we can collectively HELP ELECT TOM SUOZZI TO CONGRESS.
The shifts for canvassing for the month of February out of all of our offices will be 10AM-2PM, 12-3PM, and 2-5PM on weekends and 12-3PM on weekdays.
**To sign up for a canvassing shift at any of our offices, please use the Mobilize links below:**
Glen Cove WEEKEND Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=6f3142c240&e=2d63ff009b)
Glen Cove WEEKDAY Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=47822b310b&e=2d63ff009b)
Plainview WEEKEND Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=0d197f7064&e=2d63ff009b)
Plainview WEEKDAY Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=1efc980311&e=2d63ff009b)
New Hyde Park WEEKEND Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=e7122aace1&e=2d63ff009b)
New Hyde Park WEEKDAY Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=a4863d5f1b&e=2d63ff009b)
Queens WEEKEND Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=95fa545f1f&e=2d63ff009b)
Queens WEEKDAY Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=d0947f53ab&e=2d63ff009b)
Port Washington WEEKEND Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=952514ad98&e=2d63ff009b)
Port Washington WEEKDAY Canvassing [Mobilize link.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=d4f0fb31ff&e=2d63ff009b)
# Office Hours:
We are happy to announce that our offices are all officially open, please find addresses and times offices are open below. We always need an extra hand in our office, so feel free to bring your computer and stop by during our operating hours.All office are now open weekdays 10am - 8pm and weekend 9am - 6pm.
Offices:
1. Glen Cove Office - 225 Forrest Ave, Glen Cove, NY 11542
2. New Hyde Park Office - 926 Hillside Ave, New Hyde Park, NY 11040
3. Plainview Office - 430 Woodbury Road, Plainview, NY 11803
4. Queens Office - 212-67 26th Avenue, Bayside, NY 11360

# PHONEBANKING
Every day until Election Day we will be holding a Virtual Phone Bank across the district. We have had a great few weeks thus far and have made over 573,463 calls to voters! Thank you to everybody who has helped in this great achievement, and we look forward to continuing our hard work each and every day until the election!
To sign up for a WEEKDAY 6:00 P.M. - 8:00 P.M. phone banking shift, [please fill out this Mobilize form.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=38f2f2e037&e=2d63ff009b)
To sign up for a WEEKEND 4:00 P.M. - 6:00 P.M. phone banking shift, [please fill out this Mobilize form.](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=f6cf37ffb0&e=2d63ff009b)
**HOST A STAFFER**
[](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=b2f7eb4326&e=2d63ff009b)
In the final two weeks of the race, the campaign is expecting staffers (mostly young people from across the state and DC) to come to NY-03 to volunteer their time as extra help. They'll be pitching in however the campaign needs -- assisting with events, knocking on doors and launching canvasses.
We are looking for generous members of our community to open up their homes to house staffers for a few days at a time. The biggest need will be for the final weekend before Election Day (February 10th and 11th), but we'll also likely need support on the first weekend of Early Voting (February 3rd and 4th).
If you are open to the possibility of hosting staffers at your home for any period of time, please fill out [this google form](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=185b87ae15&e=2d63ff009b), and someone from our team will reach out to discuss in further detail.
# SUNDAYS FOR SUOZZI
Our postcarding efforts will be done in part through our “Sundays for Suozzi,” which will be a weekly Zoom where folks can join to write with their fellow volunteers. Postcarding is an effective way to spread the campaign message and get out the vote, and we have already been in touch with many volunteers who are excited and ready to write as many as they can! Our previous Sunday for Suozzi events were tremendous successes and we are excited for our next one on February 4th from 4:00 P.M. - 5:30 P.M. We hope to see you there!
If you are interested in Sundays for Suozzi, please fill out this [Mobilize link](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=5e79319053&e=2d63ff009b).
| [POSTCARDING SIGN-UP](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=acff33f4c4&e=2d63ff009b)
---
# LAWN SIGNS
[](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=6bce0e694e&e=2d63ff009b)

One of the quickest and easiest ways to get Congressman Tom Suozzi's name out there is by displaying a lawn sign. It is super easy for lawn signs to be taken down on public land, which is why it is so important for supporters in the district to proudly display their support for Congressman Suozzi on their lawns!
We have lawn signs in stock and are ready to get them out the door. If you would like to have a lawn sign, please fill out the Mobilize link below, and a member of our team will be in touch to get you one as soon as possible! Additionally, if you know a friend that also wants a sign, feel free to send them this link as well.
To sign up for a lawn sign, fill out this [Mobilize form](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=905564e7fe&e=2d63ff009b).
| [REQUEST A LAWN SIGN](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=f8f399c797&e=2d63ff009b)
---
# Voting Information
The Democratic National Committee’s Voting Hotline is officially live and ready to take calls about the District 3 Special Election! If you have any questions regarding voting information, please call 833-336-8683.
For additional information, feel free to check out our [**website**](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=8986444d86&e=2d63ff009b), as it is also up-to-date with information and locations.
|
---
# CONGRESSMAN SUOZZI IN THE DISTRICT
Last Saturday, Congressman Suozzi gathered with the hard-working folks from NYSUT, the LI Federation of Labor, 1199SEIU, and the NY State AFL-CIO before they went out for some canvassing.
Last week, a huge crowd met in New Hyde Park to show their support for Congressman Suozzi. A special thank you to Councilwoman Christine Liu, Assemblywoman Gina Sillitti, and Senator Shelley Mayer for stopping by. What a night!
On Saturday, the brotherhood of Teamsters Local 282, the NARSCC, and the NYC District Council of Carpenters gathered to demonstrate their support for Congressman Suozzi. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by!
With even more support from his Union friends, Congressman Suozzi rallied with the members of IBEW Local 3 and SMART in Massapequa.
Congressman Suozzi started his Sunday by getting dim sum with Congresswoman Grace Meng, City Council Members Sandra Ung, Linda Lee, and Susan Zhuang, and friends. There’s no better way to start the week!
On Sunday, Congressman Suozzi had the opportunity to visit the Promise Church in College Point today. A big thank you to Founding Pastor Rev. Nam Soo Kim and Head Pastor Rev. Ben Hur for all their help.
Later on Sunday, Congressman Suozzi had a wonderful gathering with his friends in the Tibetan Community.
Furthermore, Congressman Suozzi met with the Indian American community. A big thank you to everyone who stopped by to demonstrate their support for his campaign.
On last Thursday, Union workers packed into Steamfitters Union Hall to gather with and hear from Congressman Tom Suozzi. Thank you to everyone from SteamFitters638 who stopped by!
|
---
# VOLUNTEER OF THE WEEK: LEO MARINELLO
Our “Volunteer of The Week” this week is Leo Marinello! He has been a huge help to the Suozzi Campaign over the past few weeks. A big thank you to Leo for all his hard work!
|
---
# ENDORSEMENTS
Last Monday, Congressman Suozzi was endorsed by the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.
Additionally, the campaign received the full support and endorsement of the New York State Nurses Association.
The Transportation Communication Union/IAM also endorsed Congressman Suozzi’s campaign.
On last Friday morning, UFCW Local 1500 announced their support and endorsement of Congressman Suozzi.
Congressman Suozzi was also endorsed by the New York State Public Employees Federation.
The Plumbers Local Union #1 also endorsed Congressman Suozzi’s campaign.
|
---
# HOW TO CONTRIBUTE
[Click here](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=3ea6959709&e=2d63ff009b) to contribute and support our campaign! Your contribution goes directly to opening offices, printing literature, and training new organizers.
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=1984c61452&e=2d63ff009b)
---
|
---
# SIGN OFF
Thank you for reading and for your continued support of the campaign! This newsletter marks another successful week, as the successful rallies, Union events, and canvassing efforts all contribute to Tom Suozzi’s campaign!
The success of our campaign so far has been largely due to all of your support, which gives us confidence that we can carry this momentum into the final two weeks. A big thank you to everyone who attended events, knocked doors, called constituents, and wrote postcards, as your efforts have made tangible impacts, and are helping return sanity to District 3!
As always, remember to FORWARD this email to other supporters and friends to spread the word!
Thank you all again for your hard work,Sara Castelli
| | | | [](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=ef05c0f9f3&e=2d63ff009b)| [](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=527ddd015c&e=2d63ff009b)| [](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=fb786fdeb0&e=2d63ff009b)
---|---|---
| | | Suozzi for CongressPO Box 669Glen Cove, NY 11542United States
Please do **not** press unsubscribe if this email was forwarded to you, as it will unsubscribe the original recipient.If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=d3a6335bd2&t=b&e=2d63ff009b&c=b54ceff164).

| | | The political consultants may not want me to say this, but I don't give a rip.

_**It 's past time that Congress impeached Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas.**_

This is GOP Congressman Juan Ciscomani from Arizona. My district sits along the U.S.-Mexico border, and I can tell you firsthand that we are facing an absolute crisis.

President Trump had the right approach to border security. On the other hand, the Biden Administration has left our border completely undefended and made our communities unsafe.

_**Secretary Mayorkas has failed to keep his promises, and his inaction is truly astonishing. He is directly responsible for the disaster our communities face day in and day out.**_

But the Democrat Machine is upset with me for calling out Secretary Mayorkas and the disastrous open-border policies of the Biden-Harris Administration. They are dead set on doing everything they can to defeat me, and flip my border district back to the Democrats.

We CANNOT allow them to succeed. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Only Strong Deterrence Leads to Peace
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9tXl_NxAfLEuQR242vehk97j_FCwmMkR_f_PT8qEf707KyqqKKrzeA2nTh0DkY2agnisdh4bexfn7Nx8jQuCzCHmfdE-Z20MNsEhmfTi6A7NnqBOOuoiBtASfa64tiGX1RjmIlNEAkt8sPN_XEebjA006TrvH1rGf8XPV6nt3LmyRw9nwpN46RCDV_JDC5XKpDm7SajmNn7W1Wwy3RgrYqfa8ncUYZCWxEoNhuNHmwOq8q3lAwhK-lACS_YRK2EfhM6hgiNZnCqse5THevAvgl7-liBsqfCUS7EmcxBSICjeeEbEVSuu1XNaiOF-Wjfo79e9Nj6IYg3jI-0ixhrcxfu54mZt-EX&c=8hu2BvtWlJ8TubwEZMK9Rcp9qGxRYPnL8P6In-qWHcWSlJHk-Dxnkg==&ch=bW7x0hFG-85rgW4PWC2Ob-8A5uv3drQPIUlBZxELvpjMRbZq8RDDnA==)
---
|
Peter –
This week, we saw yet another disastrous consequence of Joe Biden's weak foreign policy and lack of strong deterrence as three service members were killed in the Middle East at the hands of Iran-backed proxies. I outlined what the correct response from the United States should be and explained what people on both sides get wrong about deterrence. I also highlighted a rare moment of bipartisanship in Congress as the House advanced major tax legislation.
Our primaries here in Texas are just a month away, and I need your help. I'm running for re-election because I still think America is worth fighting for even in our toxic political climate. But I cannot win re-election without the support of patriots like you from across the country. Small-dollar donations fuel my campaign, and if you can contribute any amount before our March 5 primary it will help ensure I continue fighting on the issues that matter most to you. You can donate here:
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY 2024 RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9tXl_NxAfLEuQR242vehk97j_FCwmMkR_f_PT8qEf707KyqqKKrzeA2nTh0DkY2agnisdh4bexfn7Nx8jQuCzCHmfdE-Z20MNsEhmfTi6A7NnqBOOuoiBtASfa64tiGX1RjmIlNEAkt8sPN_XEebjA006TrvH1rGf8XPV6nt3LmyRw9nwpN46RCDV_JDC5XKpDm7SajmNn7W1Wwy3RgrYqfa8ncUYZCWxEoNhuNHmwOq8q3lAwhK-lACS_YRK2EfhM6hgiNZnCqse5THevAvgl7-liBsqfCUS7EmcxBSICjeeEbEVSuu1XNaiOF-Wjfo79e9Nj6IYg3jI-0ixhrcw0yzmzLD8dy&c=8hu2BvtWlJ8TubwEZMK9Rcp9qGxRYPnL8P6In-qWHcWSlJHk-Dxnkg==&ch=bW7x0hFG-85rgW4PWC2Ob-8A5uv3drQPIUlBZxELvpjMRbZq8RDDnA==)
---
| Thank you for your continued support. Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| IRAN IS DIRECTLY RESPONSIBLE FOR KILLING AMERICAN SERVICE MEMBERS
---
|
---
| |
---
| [CLICK HERE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9tXl_NxAfLEuQR242vehk97j_FCwmMkR_f_PT8qEf707KyqqKKrzeA2nTh0DkY2wyDAkno5JPct9rXhMY_2uKbrQOXBWp4FocJNe-2t8CAP_VVorUOZZDrDCbEIMZVZFvGddlijz3aZZl33f3TyyaraF6e8OR0Q4-wd3delFCQ=&c=8hu2BvtWlJ8TubwEZMK9Rcp9qGxRYPnL8P6In-qWHcWSlJHk-Dxnkg==&ch=bW7x0hFG-85rgW4PWC2Ob-8A5uv3drQPIUlBZxELvpjMRbZq8RDDnA==)
---
| Joe Biden's foreign policy can be summed up in one word: weakness. Weakness is not a virtue in foreign policy. In fact, weakness often invites chaos and aggression from our adversaries because they view the United States as unwilling to do what is necessary to protect our interests abroad.
We saw the tragic consequences of that weakness with the deaths of three service members who were killed in a drone strike launched by Iran-backed proxies. Make no mistake - Iran is directly responsible for the deaths of these service members.
Iran is a puppet master, getting others to do their bidding so their hands remain "clean". We see this for what it is -- surrogate warfare. Iran has a track record all over the Middle East for training and equipping radical groups to get what they want. Hamas, Hezbollah, the Houthis, to name a few.
There's only one way to handle this kind of warfare: hit the puppets and the master harder. Our enemies should always believe that when they come at us, we come back at them with ten-times the force.
That is the only response to the deaths of three Americans and it is the only way we will prevent further deaths.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| DETERRENCE IS THE ONLY STRATEGY FOR PEACE
---

| The statement above - that we must hit our enemies with 10x the force when they hit us - causes a lot of heated rhetoric from both sides, especially online. We saw this from the left after President Trump killed Soleimani and we're seeing it now from some on the right in the aftermath of the attack on our service members in Jordan.
When Soleimani was killed under Trump, World War III didn't materialize like the leftist pundits said it would. Instead we entered a period of peace because we displayed strength. Strong deterrence has never started a war, but it often prevents them.
Isolationists on the left and right still like to argue that deterrence will lead to war if we're too aggressive. So let's look at the inverse. What happens when we don't establish strong deterrence, like we've seen time and time again under Joe Biden? Americans get killed. That is the strongest incentive to always strike harder.
There's always going to be a risk assessment when we respond to foreign adversaries. My advice: choose a response that makes you just a little uncomfortable. When you do this, you choose a disproportionate response. You're choosing to hit harder than they hit us. That's the only way to establish deterrence when we're dealing with countries like Iran. We always need to hit harder, faster, stronger.
Iran is scared right now -- that's good. We need to use that to our advantage with our response. Biden has waited way too long to react. That's a huge problem. He should take my advice and deliver a strategic, forceful response. Anything else is a failure on his part, and we ultimately suffer in the long run.

| Every once in a while, Congress can come together like adults and pass legislation that's good for the American people. Thankfully, that happened this week with the passage of a major bipartisan tax package through the House.
This bill makes the tax code better for businesses and families through a number of provisions:

* Research and development expensing so businesses of all sizes can immediately deduct the cost of their U.S.-based R&D investments, encouraging American innovation and improving our competitive position versus China.

* Restores full and immediate expensing for investments in machines, equipment, and vehicles.

* Expands small business expensing cap by increasing the amount of investment that a small business can immediately write off to $1.29 million.

* Expands access to the child tax credit and eliminates penalties for larger families by ensuring the tax credit applies fairly to families with multiple children.

There's a lot more in this legislation, but it is a bipartisan win that will ease the tax burden on many businesses and families.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, we saw yet another disastrous consequence of Joe Biden's weak foreign policy and lack of strong deterrence as three service members were killed in the Middle East at the hands of Iran-backed proxies. I outlined what the correct response from the United States should be and explained what people on both sides get wrong about deterrence. I also highlighted a rare moment of bipartisanship in Congress as the House advanced major tax legislation. Our primaries here in Texas are just a month away, and I need your help. I'm running for re-election because I still think America is worth fighting for even in our toxic political climate. But I cannot win re-election without the support of patriots like you from across the country. Small-dollar donations fuel my campaign, and if you can contribute any amount before our March 5 primary it will help ensure I continue fighting on the issues that matter most to you. You can donate here: | | | == | Thank you for your continued support. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | IRAN IS DIRECTLY RESPONSIBLE FOR KILLING AMERICAN SERVICE MEMBERS | | | | == | Joe Biden's foreign policy can be summed up in one word: weakness. Weakness is not a virtue in foreign policy. In fact, weakness often invites chaos and aggression from our adversaries because they view the United States as unwilling to do what is necessary to protect our interests abroad. We saw the tragic consequences of that weakness with the deaths of three service members who were killed in a drone strike launched by Iran-backed proxies. Make no mistake - Iran is directly responsible for the deaths of these service members. Iran is a puppet master, getting others to do their bidding so their hands remain "clean". We see this for what it is -- surrogate warfare. Iran has a track record all over the Middle East for training and equipping radical groups to get what they want. Hamas, Hezbollah, the Houthis, to name a few. There's only one way to handle this kind of warfare: hit the puppets and the master harder. Our enemies should always believe that when they come at us, we come back at them with ten-times the force. That is the only response to the deaths of three Americans and it is the only way we will prevent further deaths. | | | | | | | | DETERRENCE IS THE ONLY STRATEGY FOR PEACE | | == | The statement above - that we must hit our enemies with 10x the force when they hit us - causes a lot of heated rhetoric from both sides, especially online. We saw this from the left after President Trump killed Soleimani and we're seeing it now from some on the right in the aftermath of the attack on our service members in Jordan. When Soleimani was killed under Trump, World War III didn't materialize like the leftist pundits said it would. Instead we entered a period of peace because we displayed strength. Strong deterrence has never started a war, but it often prevents them. Isolationists on the left and right still like to argue that deterrence will lead to war if we're too aggressive. So let's look at the inverse. What happens when we don't establish strong deterrence, like we've seen time and time again under Joe Biden? Americans get killed. That is the strongest incentive to always strike harder. There's always going to be a risk assessment when we respond to foreign adversaries. My advice: choose a response that makes you just a little uncomfortable. When you do this, you choose a disproportionate response. You're choosing to hit harder than they hit us. That's the only way to establish deterrence when we're dealing with countries like Iran. We always need to hit harder, faster, stronger. Iran is scared right now -- that's good. We need to use that to our advantage with our response. Biden has waited way too long to react. That's a huge problem. He should take my advice and deliver a strategic, forceful response. Anything else is a failure on his part, and we ultimately suffer in the long run. | | | | | | BIPARTISAN TAX DEAL PASSES HOUSE | | == | Every once in a while, Congress can come together like adults and pass legislation that's good for the American people. Thankfully, that happened this week with the passage of a major bipartisan tax package through the House. This bill makes the tax code better for businesses and families through a number of provisions: Research and development expensing so businesses of all sizes can immediately deduct the cost of their U.S.-based R&D investments, encouraging American innovation and improving our competitive position versus China. Restores full and immediate expensing for investments in machines, equipment, and vehicles. Expands small business expensing cap by increasing the amount of investment that a small business can immediately write off to $1.29 million. Expands access to the child tax credit and eliminates penalties for larger families by ensuring the tax credit applies fairly to families with multiple children. There's a lot more in this legislation, but it is a bipartisan win that will ease the tax burden on many businesses and families. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | My custom eyepatch is back in stock - with options for left or right eye. Durable, strong, and comfortable. It's the same eyepatch I wear everyday. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == FOX NEWS: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. subject: sad!
body:
|
---
| | This is troubling but sadly expected...

Today, all the Democrats and the Republican members of the "Idaho Main Street Caucus" on the JFAC committee were in lockstep.

Astoundingly, each one of them has a 100% score from IACI, an organization known for its opposition to conservative values.

Their mission?

**_To dismantle the budget committee's significant strides towards enhancing transparency and curbing government expansion._**

They did this by subverting the standard "maintenance budgets" and pushing through line-item budgets that introduce a new maintenance budget.

This effectively replaces the existing maintenance budget bills that were already in place with their bloated bills (a shell game).

The sick part?

It looks like they strategically timed their actions for today, when the co-chair and another member were absent, (what I view as a clear attempt to keep Idaho's finances shrouded in secrecy).

This is disgraceful—a maneuver to undo the hard work put into making Idaho's financial dealings transparent.

Brian

**P.S.**

This maneuver by the liberals was anticipated, aimed at reversing the progress made in financial transparency in Idaho. [The Institute for Legislative Analysis](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=debac22b44&e=dea908e0fe "see it") even labeled the Republicans who participated in this circus today as "philosophically Democrats." Today, they've proven that label right.

**P.P.S.**

Let the members of the legislature know how you feel about --> [https://emailidaho.com/](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=a07e8833c0&e=dea908e0fe "let em know")

\---

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Qasim Rashid
subject: Thank you, I’m so grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35157%2E120265%2EKgyIfK ]Qasim for Congress

Friend,

I know my team and I reached out a lot over these last couple of days –
and for good reason! We had our debate with Bill Foster (that he left
early), our campaign was featured in an article on The Intercept, and we
received some incredibly promising polling data.

These last couple of weeks have been HUGE for the momentum of our
campaign. Folks are taking notice, and our movement is building by the
day.

I have been proudly people-funded since this campaign began, and I want to
thank you from the bottom of my heart for helping me reach my end-of-month
fundraising goal last week. Without your help, we wouldn’t be in such a
strong position or have this level of momentum.

Big things are happening and we’re closer than ever to toppling Bill
Foster and bringing real progressive representation to this district – and
it’s all because of you.

Thank you for being with us on this journey, and thank you for continuing
to invest in and put your trust in me.

We’re just over 6 weeks away from Election Day, and I’m honored to do this
with you.

Thanks,
Qasim

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5370?t=1002&akid=35157%2E120265%2EKgyIfK ]DONATE

subject: Hitting the Trail - Caucuses, Voter Contact, and Events!
body:
Plus, Check Out My Updated Website
| | | |
---
| Just Getting Started!
---
---
| Many thanks to each and every one of you who have partnered with me so far in my campaign!
The donations, volunteer hours, prayers, and encouraging words have helped us build up momentum that we can grow in the coming months to Retire Pocan!
With your help, we were able to report raising over $36,500 last quarter - an amount that hasn't been raised by a Republican contender in our district in nearly 20 years, and never against Mark Pocan.
And we are just getting started! Keep reading to see how you can get involved...
---
---
| Check Out The New Website
---
| | |
---|---
We have a brand new website!

We have a new site for voters to find out where I stand on the issues, reach out with their input, sign up to volunteer for the campaign, and make online contributions.

Check it out and let us know what you think!
| |
---
| | [CharityBarryforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ll7LHKXthgCKB_-LDEc9hbIKu9sR_5SD-NBzGjOP43jSvYhxjaUrOK1miDWu7d5s4D4ANvijFF1oUFB3rh9sgILocX98FlDbMI8E_GKaejXwdHhP217UYqrkks28QbwGcFHqzzAaE4JI1tZ4iCEA4qlah1srznHireevdWNSsMw=&c=TVv1kjOxYsFFZKRgK1wdo0D8VF-RcKse2xjYYCz_zDcvXJ-SPG_qqA==&ch=qEBAbS_wqRE_-acvvCy0N4Cx2_Hk8Bv-s0kuwbmhaCHeOaNRLjYX2Q==)
---
---
| Two Ways to Reach the Voters
---
---
| To win this election, we need to take our winning message to the voters, allowing them to hear from our team in personal ways that connect with them, build trust, foster relationships, and put the voters' priorities first!
You Can Help!
---
| |
---
---
| | Make Phone Calls!
Help us begin reaching the voters to find out what issues are on their mind!
Will you help us get started reaching those in our district to let them know they have a candidate willing to represent them in Washington, DC?
---
| [Make Phone Calls](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ll7LHKXthgCKB_-LDEc9hbIKu9sR_5SD-NBzGjOP43jSvYhxjaUrOK1miDWu7d5sWbI8Jll04pcTeMpON4HgotGyM8eKvwb8UwQkneRh_tIaYIAadSJPrGC1UDCdeF3GMXtjg_AeF7Tl0fC7_mLZmvsCwCsw_Y4Q2JpOpoycw8eHr1-LkDEA1g==&c=TVv1kjOxYsFFZKRgK1wdo0D8VF-RcKse2xjYYCz_zDcvXJ-SPG_qqA==&ch=qEBAbS_wqRE_-acvvCy0N4Cx2_Hk8Bv-s0kuwbmhaCHeOaNRLjYX2Q==)
---
| | Host a Meet & Greet!
With help from our team, you can help us reach your friends and neighbors in the best way - meeting the candidate in a personal setting where they are comfortable!
Sign up to host an event in your community!
---
| [Host a Meet & Greet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ll7LHKXthgCKB_-LDEc9hbIKu9sR_5SD-NBzGjOP43jSvYhxjaUrOK1miDWu7d5sO9I77pTtCN4huqIeWK2iKbc37V-hI3FlLDD8NdtNsogdzDIlQBkj5hNeJsLQxUKKvKt-dNXmomaztUjYf_fUU0c7msU0ok-m76pTn85lhYPf9s2bUHn8Jw==&c=TVv1kjOxYsFFZKRgK1wdo0D8VF-RcKse2xjYYCz_zDcvXJ-SPG_qqA==&ch=qEBAbS_wqRE_-acvvCy0N4Cx2_Hk8Bv-s0kuwbmhaCHeOaNRLjYX2Q==)
---
---
| Keeping Up The Momentum!
---
| | |
---|---

We are in this for the long haul!

To keep up the work we have begun, we need your continued support!

Please consider making a contribution to our campaign to ensure that we can build on the strong foundation you have helped us lay!

Your gift of any size makes this all possible!

Thank You!
| |
---
---
| | [Keeping Up the Momentum!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ll7LHKXthgCKB_-LDEc9hbIKu9sR_5SD-NBzGjOP43jSvYhxjaUrOLOZkiJNBdt6eEcKmtJNUNguwaABW1FEPNBQ2LayNxS2WkPfjCg9pfOgvGoH8CTexmJdJy5ro63tUWg0UMBVZXF_8ENm0N0mlFG5xPoPiM5cfo0WYaA4a06nksIsnhdxgqC1HwBCWD3R&c=TVv1kjOxYsFFZKRgK1wdo0D8VF-RcKse2xjYYCz_zDcvXJ-SPG_qqA==&ch=qEBAbS_wqRE_-acvvCy0N4Cx2_Hk8Bv-s0kuwbmhaCHeOaNRLjYX2Q==)
---
---
| See You Around!
---
| Are you a member of your county's Republican Party organization?
---
| | |
---|---

I am excited to see you at your upcoming caucus! I will be attending the caucuses for each of the six county parties that are represented by the 2nd District in the coming weeks to hear from the grassroots and share with you what we will be doing in the coming months to Retire Pocan!

The counties in order of their caucuses are: Green, Sauk, Rock, Lafayette, Dane, and Iowa.
| |

| Sincerely,
Charity Barry Your Candidate for the 2nd Congressional District of WI

clean_body: Plus, Check Out My Updated Website | | | | | Just Getting Started! | Many thanks to each and every one of you who have partnered with me so far in my campaign! The donations, volunteer hours, prayers, and encouraging words have helped us build up momentum that we can grow in the coming months to Retire Pocan! With your help, we were able to report raising over $36,500 last quarter - an amount that hasn't been raised by a Republican contender in our district in nearly 20 years, and never against Mark Pocan. And we are just getting started! Keep reading to see how you can get involved... | Check Out The New Website | | | ---|--- We have a brand new website! We have a new site for voters to find out where I stand on the issues, reach out with their input, sign up to volunteer for the campaign, and make online contributions. Check it out and let us know what you think! | | | | == | Two Ways to Reach the Voters | To win this election, we need to take our winning message to the voters, allowing them to hear from our team in personal ways that connect with them, build trust, foster relationships, and put the voters' priorities first! You Can Help! | | | | Make Phone Calls! Help us begin reaching the voters to find out what issues are on their mind! Will you help us get started reaching those in our district to let them know they have a candidate willing to represent them in Washington, DC? | == | | Host a Meet & Greet! With help from our team, you can help us reach your friends and neighbors in the best way - meeting the candidate in a personal setting where they are comfortable! Sign up to host an event in your community! | == | Keeping Up The Momentum! | | | ---|--- We are in this for the long haul! To keep up the work we have begun, we need your continued support! Please consider making a contribution to our campaign to ensure that we can build on the strong foundation you have helped us lay! Your gift of any size makes this all possible! Thank You! | | | | == | See You Around! | Are you a member of your county's Republican Party organization? | | | ---|--- I am excited to see you at your upcoming caucus! I will be attending the caucuses for each of the six county parties that are represented by the 2nd District in the coming weeks to hear from the grassroots and share with you what we will be doing in the coming months to Retire Pocan! The counties in order of their caucuses are: Green, Sauk, Rock, Lafayette, Dane, and Iowa. | | | Sincerely, Charity Barry Your Candidate for the 2nd Congressional District of WI | | == | | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | PO Box 267, Mineral Point, WI 53565 | | Sent by mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.ccsend.com powered by

**THIS IS A MESSAGE FROM DONALD J. TRUMP:** Friend, WILL YOU SEND ME A LETTER?
I just wrote a letter to every single member of the _**MAGA MOVEMENT.**_
I want you to read it:
**Dear Patriot,**
**I will always love you for standing with me through every single _WITCH HUNT!_**
**You supported me after they raided my home and arrested me.**

The poll shows that we have a double-digit advantage against our opponent, which is a testament to our grassroots strength across New Jersey. 2. Our opponent just filed her FEC report, showing her with a huge campaign war chest that will be used to chip away at our lead.

clean_body: While this poll is great news and reaffirms our lead, we have to recognize two things that are also true: | | | | A new poll out just this morning shows us holding our big lead over our main opponent. The poll shows that we have a double-digit advantage against our opponent, which is a testament to our grassroots strength across New Jersey. = While this poll is great news and reaffirms our lead, we have to recognize two things that are also true: 1. There are still 123 days left until this election is over and we know our opponent will use every lever of power she has to let the political elite decide this election instead of voters. 2. Our opponent just filed her FEC report, showing her with a huge campaign war chest that will be used to chip away at our lead. I can win this, but I need your help to catch up on fundraising so the big money doesn't drown out our people-powered campaign. = = When I say we're a people-powered campaign, I mean it. Our campaign has received tens of thousands of donations, and 92 percent of them were $100 or less. Our opponent was the complete opposite; more than 80 percent of what she raised were from donations of $3,300 or more. This year, we can finally show the country that New Jersey doesn't have to stand for corruption and machine politics. We have the chance to win in the face of big money and a rigged political system. = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . body:
Now that Maine and Colorado have kicked Trump off the ballot, experts predict that other states could do the same!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt)
---
**Trump is PANICKING:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/invoke-14A?source=FFR_20240202_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt) Now that Maine and Colorado have kicked Trump off the ballot, experts predict that other states could do the same!

**Trump’s re-election scheme would be TOTALLY derailed._YES!!_**

So we’re launching a poll to show that Americans across the country want their state to kick Trump off the ballot and we need you to represent your state:
* * *
_We need 100 local responses before midnight:_
**[Should the 14th Amendment be used to ban Trump from running??](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/invoke-14A?source=FFR_20240202_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/invoke-14A?source=FFR_20240202_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt) | **[YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/invoke-14A?source=FFR_20240202_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt)**
---

**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/invoke-14A?source=FFR_20240202_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20716%2E4449941%2Egq0OBt)**
_OUR POLL CLOSES PROMPTLY AT MIDNIGHT, WE NEED YOUR RESPONSE NOW._
* * *
Thank you,

– FFR

name: American Action News
subject: Our newest free online course, “The ExodusStory”
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj044kgj794nmovbipopdisoljlc00s7kfuifq10_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cji68oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z947ln8i3sabrhhm3sjna42guhjjpusbbfr1qa28_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cji68oj2c1h2bs)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Election law loophole that is making this race even more expensive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)
Derek, when voters open their ballots next week, they’ll see Katie Porter’s name twice. Once for the normally scheduled Senate election, and again in a “special election” which will appoint someone to serve out a short remainder of the late Senator Feinstein’s term. **Technically there are two elections, and that means contribution limits doubled.** This puts our grassroots powered campaign at a real disadvantage.
**Our opponent has collected more than $1.2 million in money that is attributed to the “special election.”** This is money from donors who had already given the maximum $6,600 that is normally allowed, but these folks were able to give thousands of dollars again and attribute it to the “special election.”
---
**That’s about 10x the money we have attributed to the “special election,” because when we say this campaign is people-powered, we mean it. Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs. She’s the only person in this race to reject federal lobbyist money. And she’s the only person to refuse money from Big Oil, Big Bank, and Big Pharma CEOs.**
**Just because we’re being outraised, doesn’t mean we’re giving up. Polls still show that it’s possible for Katie to win this, but we really need your help.**Our average donation this year is $26.85.[Can you match that or donate whatever makes sense for you today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240202-1?refcode=em20240202-37223&refcode2=37223_3422442_oeeZgh&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)****
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240202-1?refcode=em20240202-37223&refcode2=37223_3422442_oeeZgh&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)
Thanks so much for reading,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240202-37223&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37223_3422442_oeeZgh&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=37223%2E3422442%2EoeeZgh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
MOFC receives air support from the national House Freedom Caucus...and wins!
| |

# [Missouri RINOs Retaliate Against MO Freedom Caucus](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=141177448&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMTc3NDQ4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDY4OTQyMDYsImV4cCI6MTcwOTQ4NjIwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZeC5HytD9cwl9j8hKa99Em-4VTr1tvISbA6XXFt2l4)
### MOFC receives air support from the national House Freedom Caucus...and wins!
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/03b655d6-f1bc-448c-bee8-9ca865a6cbf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/03b655d6-f1bc-448c-bee8-9ca865a6cbf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=141177448&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMTc3NDQ4LCJpYXQiOjE3MDY4OTQyMDYsImV4cCI6MTcwOTQ4NjIwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lZeC5HytD9cwl9j8hKa99Em-4VTr1tvISbA6XXFt2l4)
---
| | [](https://substack..bvb8MbTlps0YYLjtHtPSWpBR1iPmHP9fJ_YgF2Qy5OI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/missouri-rinos-retaliate-against?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
It has been less than a month since we helped launch our latest Freedom Caucus in the great state of Missouri and they've already upset the Swamp in Jefferson City so much that their RINO leaders retaliated against them.
Last week, the Missouri Freedom Caucus (MOFC) attempted to pressure the legislature to finally pass Initiative Petition (IP) reform, in order to stop left-wing dark money from being able to influence ballot measures in Missouri. This is an issue that the entire Republican apparatus in the state - including the RINOs - have professed is incredibly important.
The RINO leadership in the MO Senate was holding IP reform up, so the MOFC responded by blocking Gov. Mike Parson's administration appointments until it was brought up for a vote.
In response, not only did the RINOs that run the Missouri legislature refuse to bring up IP reform, a key campaign promise from the state's Republicans, but the RINO Senate Pro Tempore Caleb Rowden [removed](https://substack.com/redirect/4bcae5f8-48fa-4127-92a2-a402feca8689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) State Senators and MOFC members Rick Brattin, Bill Eigel, Andrew Koenig, and Denny Hoskins from their roles as Chairs and Vice Chairs of various committees.
All they asked was for the senate to pass IP reform. That's all it took for them to get booted from their committees.
We've seen this happen so many times. Our members were removed from committees in Idaho for calling out the special interests that have control over the state government. Our entire South Carolina Freedom Caucus was booted from the GOP Cloakroom for refusing to sign a "loyalty pledge" to never criticize their fellow Republicans (most of whom are liberal). And our Georgia Vice Chair Sen. Colton Moore was booted from the Republican Caucus for calling for an investigation of corrupt Fulton County DA Fani Willis.
It only took less than a month for the delicate sensibilities of Missouri RINOs to rear their ugly heads.
For more, watch this segment that MOFC member Sen. Bill Eigel did with Emerald Robinson.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3c92df5-65d2-41fd-918c-7796f06b1585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even though they got booted from Committee Chairs, the Missouri Freedom Caucus clearly has the support from the Show-Me State's conservative grassroots.
Just look at how many people showed up to a rally they had in the Missouri Capitol after Rowden purged our members from their committees.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e00dd9e0-1c26-4ae1-b2dd-4ab192d17766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Missouri Freedom Caucus also got tremendous "air support" from House Freedom Caucus members in DC.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0d97f670-984f-43ac-a795-5d9f57567ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c73ef5d-773b-4dd1-b807-cc1adb2b47c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the end, the Missouri Freedom Caucus won! Leadership buckled and allowed IP reform to pass through the committee and go to the Senate floor. It also clears the way for other conservative priorities to move, like school choice.
The Missouri Freedom Caucus will never stop fighting to give Missourians the conservative leadership that they deserve.
Read more in this in-depth [Associated Press](https://substack.com/redirect/a83507b3-e3d5-42f9-be3b-e7bd946533c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) article.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/c1df021b-c65b-4394-8bef-63866cc7e070?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/deb4147c-b3ae-4bfb-8b1e-43d0382ad5ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/c25d9e66-5672-4b2c-99d9-5aad6a4deacc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nTHibPJlHf6Mp4aZVt3oheImr48AJP31SQVr0VSba0g?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nTHibPJlHf6Mp4aZVt3oheImr48AJP31SQVr0VSba0g?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
---

300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHvN3dgS07Tj7wx954J3UFkFAayhi7OcZwmdoSxqp4voRYekm368flqQDEBYyznEIJrO_bNgl3gzE347fzJ34n20sQCySxugFZNtXK7OA67hXX2WSnm1kh0LfOIJPoWRED_ocissbF52lq8PPxkVBPgs%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHolpbZ1mIL00-RfmynfHbL2pz0SQYthjqcJxQdq4HGeobqX9cQO68sy-KATqLWMQPEs791bIPq-54jcbLEGJW-HlZuWPlRqdZ2VTVmiPc2XyIuOprOAxw7vgFO0kArdlf-OGg0PHDOnCafSg4xHLdMc%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHq8a6e_TDd64cqFlc7c4gLVFmaRGQkf-mVsrvK650_Qmn40K4FQm9fNkVizNs7kehElzrMFCy7beKn4whmuiMs2eln2oGC-3A8o40m64rr_5hi1X1mpu7MiG8ZmlYI4_F46z4PsvPaFliQfuI9D4uu8%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHrOR6La6YypUwzuGPmAwdwv859XSXG0zc538XrgDrwpVrQlpJaw5TY83_zeiYT2wvf2xztFXAopBn3-WWY5NEfovEAgR8sqnh93EPgxeoeCgKmuA9p81adrlfnKKRjioC6oHPm14tG8kg4IxKJh48_w%3D)[**YES >>**](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHnHMi0e9AGM4nkkNH8QGa1A3oJ5Q9IztT1opyukXCn0t6BJCZYqrggrAcvyhE95kNQ7SjVNue6FcikpePb8MnrmBf0PHTk8bWSuh0-MNZbWdqfwbFtLB8Q3Ttyi5VD9dgFSZ7VPDe_nf445iv631gM4%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ffa1693dc33c4cfbaf66ee141cd0d336&_e=60V-4FkOhCsRlaYJKQswOybQOKifgvDWVXxozxyDeFnh_HVXXcVa6qSK6iINlghXUesd2WAZ8Hp2ow_KrNy7ef7GP5nA8t7A9k38_i4ExNAr3-mXtYwhAAZ5ymKLuPn-2ssQYNihcSb5GvG-Z5P-e14pxpJrMJDV0YscYMW-TdULs_JQuZoxH15_dCUZ2wugZz0B6r3-gPqICso-cGXD5d0HwIJy9sqjM6H-30BSevTux_sA3msRO4DYQgl5lBPpy8hT_18zTJuP7-LlMrvZHql8pZCG8JZWeO3FahJhW1RMTTOd43sg9FPIISUfp4fF0HCR0o5AetEPN0UZfgFOOeXuz_rj4whEAvHpqhBSFMvXU8vDl71L_2CuHhMHAG20rUc93rJ9wrZ2fOK2cB_NSZbmIOZmWRciAKS51p26J2E%3D)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

My opponent is a career politician whose only loyalty is to her special-interest donors and partisan political allies. **I’m a fighter for Tennessee families who’s not afraid to stand up to _anyone_ to get sh*t done.** My opponent takes millions from the pharmaceutical industry and the gun lobby — and then works on _their_ behalf in Washington. **I don’t take a CENT from corporate PACs. I’m headed to Congress to work for YOU and won’t be beholden to anyone but my constituents.** My opponent wants to enact a federal abortion ban, despite the harm we’ve already seen in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states. **I’m committed to restoring and securing abortion access EVERYWHERE.** Peter, these are just a few of the differences between me and my radical opponent, Marsha Blackburn. And here’s one more thing that sets me apart: I have YOU on my team. **_I know that we’ll only win this critical Senate race by building a grassroots movement like nothing Tennessee's seen before. I need to count on your support — because Tennessee deserves so much better than Marsha Blackburn._** **_[I can’t defeat Marsha without the resources to compete against her mega-donor pals, so I’m asking you to make a grassroots donation RIGHT NOW. clean_body: We’re not the same. | My opponent is a career politician whose only loyalty is to her special-interest donors and partisan political allies. I’m a fighter for Tennessee families who’s not afraid to stand up to anyone to get sht done. My opponent takes millions from the pharmaceutical industry and the gun lobby — and then works on their behalf in Washington. I don’t take a CENT from corporate PACs. I’m headed to Congress to work for YOU and won’t be beholden to anyone but my constituents. My opponent wants to enact a federal abortion ban, despite the harm we’ve already seen in Tennessee and other GOP-controlled states. I’m committed to restoring and securing abortion access EVERYWHERE. Peter, these are just a few of the differences between me and my radical opponent, Marsha Blackburn. And here’s one more thing that sets me apart: I have YOU on my team. I know that we’ll only win this critical Senate race by building a grassroots movement like nothing Tennessee's seen before. I need to count on your support — because Tennessee deserves so much better than Marsha Blackburn. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: ICYMI: Can America Properly Hedge Against Unforeseen Threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---
**ICYMI: Can America Properly Hedge Against Unforeseen Threats**
**BALTIMORE, Md.** — In case you missed it, General John Teichert, candidate for the U.S. Senate in Maryland recently discussed promising language in the 2024 House authorization and appropriations bills that would put a renewed focus on innovation in the military amid a rise in threats to our national security in a new opinion published in [Real Clear Defense](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=353ef3ddb4&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
As Teichert has reiterated time and again on the campaign trail, under the Biden administration, the threats to our national security have increased due to weak leadership. In his editorial, the retired general notes that if passed, this new development will allow for us to innovate new technologies that will allow us to match the speed at which these threats are developing.
**“Urgency and operational relevance are the cornerstones of this new requirement, with statements boldly encouraging a willingness to accept calculated risk to enable operationally relevant speed. The language clearly states that 'the metric for success is speed to fielding affordable, operationally relevant capability.’ Furthermore, those involved in this strategy ‘must be focused on rapidly fielding solutions at scale to operationally relevant problems.’”**
However, Teichert also notes that we must also create these new programs at a speed which replaces the current failing strategy in a timely manner.
**“Importantly, we must recognize that the prevailing strategy is already failing. We acutely need ‘a new acquisition culture’ and must disrupt ‘a broken, slow acquisition system.; We already shoulder the burden of ‘growing and innate tactical and logistical risks’ and are weighed down by substantial industrial base risks stemming from ‘a lack of capacity and diversity.’ As a result, we need a new prevailing strategy and not a small hedge strategy making up one tenth of one percent of the president’s budget request.”**
Ultimately, Teichert concludes that our military and government must think outside the box to find ways to engage our economies and American ingenuity to find solutions to quickly address the threats that we face at home and abroad.
General John Teichert’s full opinion can be found here at [Real Clear Defense](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a1395df592&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
|

subject: The orange guy turned red
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Trump’s pretty mad that we called him out for disparaging Americans who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
#
Derek,
Trump’s pretty mad that we called him out for disparaging Americans who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
He could’ve avoided all this though. Good start would have been to avoid calling them “suckers” and “losers.”
Trump and his campaign don’t want you to know he said that.
He’d be absolutely furious if more people knew that he was so confused by the idea that Americans would volunteer to serve their country that he asked, “What was in it for them?”
He’d absolutely hate it if more people found out that he said that appearing alongside wounded American soldiers “doesn't look good” for him.
But that’s absolutely what we’re going to do. He’s scared because it’s absolutely terrible for him. But the American people deserve to know what he thinks of the men and women who serve in uniform.
That’s why we made our latest video: Red.
**[WATCH IT HERE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-red.vFIzUD&refcode=em240202-1-30&t=1&akid=24869%2E3013755%2Euw3N3m)**

name: Team Kennedy
subject: An Exclusive Preview of Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Join us at one of these inspiring events for a powerful vision of a better future.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and connect with our future President. [Join us at one of these inspiring events for a powerful vision of a better future.](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=2)
Seize the moment and be part of an unforgettable experience! [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=3)
|
* * *
---
[Hayward, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/hayward-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=4) \- Saturday, February 3rd at 3:00 PM
We expect this event to sell out quickly as space is highly limited! So please don’t delay in reserving your space at this in-person event with RFK, Jr. at an exclusive venue.
[Menlo Park, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/menlo-park-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=5) \- Saturday, February 3rd at 7:00 PM
Enjoy a seated dinner with RFK, Jr. and have the opportunity for open discussions in an intimate setting. This exclusive event will be hosted at a private venue in the heart of Menlo Park.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=6) \- Sunday, February 4th at 6:30 PM
Join us for this special event at a private venue in the heart of Las Vegas to hear directly from RFK, Jr. in an intimate Q&A session with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails and photo opportunities.
[Tucson, Arizona](https://www.kennedy24.com/tucson-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=7) \- Monday, February 5th at 6:30 PM
An exciting chance to see RFK, JR. speak about our fight to get on the ballot in AZ and hear how he will heal the divide in our government. You won’t want to miss this opportunity!
[Jackson Hole, Wyoming](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=8) \- Thursday, February 8th at 4:30 PM
The private reception with RFK, JR. will include Jackson Hole’s finest wine and most delicious bites. Join us for a special Q&A session and get your picture with the future President!
[Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=9) \- Saturday, February 10th at 1:00 PM
Don't miss the thrilling opportunity to see RFK, Jr. discuss our efforts to secure a spot on the MI ballot and unveil his platform of truth and honesty. Join us for an event you won't want to miss!
[Detroit, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=10) \- Saturday, February 10th at 6:30 PM
Experience an exclusive evening of support and connection at a private reception. Enjoy heavy hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, inspiring remarks, and a unique photo opportunity with RFK, Jr.

Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=12) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts "A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr." Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[**Online Event**](https://www.kennedy24.com/february-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=13) \- Friday, February 23rd at 5:00 PM
You’re invited to an unforgettable virtual experience featuring RFK, Jr. alongside a special guest for an engaging fireside chat, providing insights into his vision for the future of our nation.
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=upcoming_events_2_1_24_2as&n=14) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We can beat the odds again
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Every action you take builds our movement and gets us closer to the finish line
Team—We just wrapped up our first end-of-month fundraising deadline. Thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we’re starting this election year stronger than ever.

While fundraising isn’t my favorite part about running a campaign, it’s critical if we’re going to build a movement strong enough to take on Mike Lawler’s massive war chest of corporate PACs and Big Oil money.

Mike Johnson and his MAGA allies are all eyes on this race. Rest assured, as one of the most competitive races in the country, they are sparing no expense to hold this seat in a desperate bid to keep their slim majority in the House—so they can continue to push their extreme agenda. They know Mike Lawler is their guy who can make it happen.

We beat the odds the first time with a powerful grassroots team behind me, and your show of support for this year’s first end-of-month fundraiser proves we can do it again.

Please know that every action you take—no matter how big or small—builds our movement and gets us closer to the finish line to deliver a better, brighter, and more equitable future for the Lower Hudson Valley.

Yours in the fight,

Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. [**Donate today to build our grassroots movement and send Mondaire Jones back to Congress and back to name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: My life in the service of others...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Thanks,
Kurt

Thanks to the dedication and generosity of our grassroots team, we not only met but _exceeded_ our January end-of-month fundraising goal. Your support is the backbone of this campaign, and **I could not be more thankful and proud to have you by my side.**

This early success will set a powerful tone for the year ahead. With your support, we will be well-equipped to build this momentum, reach more voters across PA-08, and defend this seat from the deep-pocketed special interests seeking to buy it.
