Friend,

This is the first and last email I’ll send you.

I’m a little hesitant to reach out to you like this.

**However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything.**

My name is Rob Bresnahan Jr. You may not know me well, but I’m a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family’s electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I’ve created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families.

After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs.

I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today.

**Now, I’m also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C.**

Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race.

**[>> That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in just a few bucks today<<](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=810db573376a43f2a0a2dfbe38b73547&_e=M_ppcetJQzxd5_vkaZ1P_6HZHymIB27smkzP7ICRublT-yicXGmyjoHinWwyinRIlRBEmOdwTrcWfFjiIGOragGyS5I1tMMERYRap-Ouo8v_kvhgapiyAeH2mIUAPz7--ZGsXoBqwChYiU8lM0qAMCiyxZE885j47UH71fSFSeru1ojsy8XJCjqFS9MlYET3WTQP6zB5KVE_KUOfPD1e4RFwGJEb0qs7707-7AhvwW3fmqKK4k-v9KCo_HjbcAbQMorOC5RsseW1a9hqU994FHduVqyNaxHEBjvizfJQrhXso2GPjRqVvKwwN233B3uKjYwpnzaqDrbWj5lAPdMa4DlynedXb0Y6kVuFzOxONjQjawtR-fX3UdX3TXmAygsOHGeCqkKx_eG3xw8WX235Vw%3D%3D)**
I’m the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets the work done without asking for help. **[But it’s going to take a strong grassroots effort in order for us to flip this seat.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=810db573376a43f2a0a2dfbe38b73547&_e=M_ppcetJQzxd5_vkaZ1P_6HZHymIB27smkzP7ICRublT-yicXGmyjoHinWwyinRIlRBEmOdwTrcWfFjiIGOragGyS5I1tMMERYRap-Ouo8v_kvhgapiyAeH2mIUAPz7--ZGsXoBqwChYiU8lM0qAMCiyxZE885j47UH71fSFSeru1ojsy8XJCjqFS9MlYET3WTQP6zB5KVE_KUOfPD1e4RFwGJEb0qs7707-7AhvwW3fmqKK4k-v9KCo_HjbcAbQF6hb4QnMNxTdqfTzzrykIaHKNPhSvkbn-M3rTNFyajclZ9qPaqi81Grd-1nZBE9zW-3q9D0mirDn6yjFTB4RTMXWW4wUd6hih8P_46Co87fTaM6FwljGp7NGbiPVn89gte3P4lBZzU8zb2XdWZjKSg%3D%3D)**

Democrats won’t stop doing everything in their power to stop us – regular hard-working Americans like you and me – from winning. Democrats don’t like us at all.

**[Please spark my campaign with a contribution of any size.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=810db573376a43f2a0a2dfbe38b73547&_e=M_ppcetJQzxd5_vkaZ1P_6HZHymIB27smkzP7ICRublT-yicXGmyjoHinWwyinRIlRBEmOdwTrcWfFjiIGOragGyS5I1tMMERYRap-Ouo8v_kvhgapiyAeH2mIUAPz7--ZGsXoBqwChYiU8lM0qAMCiyxZE885j47UH71fSFSeru1ojsy8XJCjqFS9MlYET3WTQP6zB5KVE_KUOfPD1e4RFwGJEb0qs7707-7AhvwW3fmqKK4k-v9KCo_HjbcAbQSXyleaIzrlI9OeCQtAQ7vgN-N7qQwtaksCDDkr8rU6z3lKPKrVxE78TT9htLkvT2EWolH2ZB8-U55BRiEO3ichh9-nijPlcFn5drU-7PGr7kPf7DJGQudTkLIXUXr0bbb9oTPK4wZOj9rhTwvb2F_w%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | Friend, This is the first and last email I’ll send you. I’m a little hesitant to reach out to you like this. However, my back is against the wall, and your response to this email will decide everything. My name is Rob Bresnahan Jr. You may not know me well, but I’m a fifth-generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian who took over my family’s electrical contracting business at the age of 19 years old. I graduated from the University of Scranton, and I’ve created life-supporting jobs for more than 150 Pennsylvanian families. After that, I started a company with the goal to reinvest in my community by rehabilitating historic buildings, breathing life back into local downtown areas, and providing innovative spaces for the next generation of entrepreneurs. I have dedicated my life to helping the community that raised me into the hard-working man that I am today. Now, I’m also the Republican Candidate in a MUST WIN race in Northeast Pennsylvania, a district that will certainly decide who controls Washington, D.C. Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and my opponent, Matt Cartwright, are going to flood MILLIONS of Democratic money into this race. I’m the kind of guy who puts his head down and gets the work done without asking for help. Democrats won’t stop doing everything in their power to stop us – regular hard-working Americans like you and me – from winning. Democrats don’t like us at all. | Listen, I’m not a politician. I’m just an ordinary, hard-working guy who loves America and Northeastern Pennsylvanian. I want to see average Americans keep their lights on. I hope you’ll consider helping my campaign. Rob Bresnahan Jr. Candidate for Congress (PA-08) PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA PO Box 971, Pittston, PA 18640 Copyright (C) 2024 Rob Bresnahan for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278274/452923752/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)

Every bit helps us continue this important work – we rely on donors like you to protect PA-17 from flipping red and fighting for a Democratic House majority in 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278275/452923753/-1807168276?refcode=240202_bf_janrecap_l1&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=) **[Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278276/452923754/-1807168276?refcode=240202_bf_janrecap_b1&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)** Thanks, Derek, for your continued support. Now let's get into the January recap ⬇️ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278277/452923755/-1807168276?refcode=240202_bf_janrecap_img1&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)****Chris launched his reelection campaign last week.** I was extremely proud that so many supporters, union workers, friends and family showed up for Chris at the reelection event. We know that 2024 is a critical year for protecting our freedoms and democracy. A lot is at stake, and Chris is energized to keep representing and fighting for the people of Western PA. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278278/452923757/-1807168276?refcode=240202_bf_janrecap_img2&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)****Chris spent time in Dormont, PA, catching up with folks on the Dormont Democratic Committee.** Fueled by some locally brewed coffee (Chris is biased toward Potomac Station Coffeehouse), he spoke with members about Democratic organizing and the importance of electing Democrats in Western PA. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278279/452923758/-1807168276?refcode=240202_bf_janrecap_img3&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)****Chris also spoke to members of the Char Valley Democrats, who endorsed Chris' reelection campaign.** He also picked up an endorsement from Steel City Stonewall Democrats – the largest LGBTQ+ political organization in Western PA. Chris is proud to fight for the Common Good and against extremist anti-LGBTQ bigotry. January was a big month, Derek, and we couldn't do it without you. Thank you for supporting Chris' reelection campaign and Team Deluzio on the campaign trail this month. With appreciation,
Ben Forstate, Campaign Manager @ Team Deluzio
| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.

**Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278280/452923759/-1807168276?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=d6487e49-f7c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78278281/452923760/-1807168276?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=d6487e49-f7c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=240202_bf_janrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ4N2U0OS1mN2MxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vMHddLIq5JCKyIjz3qKUn6FNQ0V3C6ym72xDRp5mIRI=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bill Murray is one of my favorite actors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5321%2E5257348%2EwB6H63 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Today
is Groundhog Day... and if you’re like me, you associate this day just as
much with the fantastic Bill Murray film as you do with the folklore of
the groundhog’s shadow.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5321%2E5257348%2EwB6H63 ]A gif of Bill Murray saying: Well it's Groundhog Day...Again

In the movie, Bill Murray’s character is stuck in a cycle, living the same
day over and over again.

Truth be told, I feel that way sometimes — when it comes to the GOP’s
bottomless support for Donald Trump and their endless, false, and
inflammatory attacks on me.

Here’s how it usually plays out: They try to pull a partisan stunt. I call
them out. They attack. Rinse and repeat.

Trump will go on stage at a campaign rally and call me “pencil neck.” Sean
Hannity or another Fox News talking head will go after me on cable news.

And my inbox, voicemail, and social media feeds become full of vile
attacks from the MAGA movement.

I’ll admit it — this cycle gets exhausting.

But we rise above the attacks because we are committed to defending our
democracy no matter what they throw at us.

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — Today is Groundhog Day... and if you’re like me, you associate this day just as much with the fantastic Bill Murray film as you do with the folklore of the groundhog’s shadow. [ ]A gif of Bill Murray saying: Well it's Groundhog Day...Again In the movie, Bill Murray’s character is stuck in a cycle, living the same day over and over again. Truth be told, I feel that way sometimes — when it comes to the GOP’s bottomless support for Donald Trump and their endless, false, and inflammatory attacks on me. Here’s how it usually plays out: They try to pull a partisan stunt. I call them out. They attack. Rinse and repeat. Trump will go on stage at a campaign rally and call me “pencil neck.” Sean Hannity or another Fox News talking head will go after me on cable news. And my inbox, voicemail, and social media feeds become full of vile attacks from the MAGA movement. I’ll admit it — this cycle gets exhausting. But we rise above the attacks because we are committed to defending our democracy no matter what they throw at us. [ ]Derek, will you help me prepare for the next Groundhog Day when the GOP goes after me, smears my record, and calls me names? Your support helps me respond and reject the lies. Please, chip in today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT [ ]A gif of Bill Murray saying: I Am Asking For Your Help Thanks for stepping up today and offering help when I need it. body:
This is what Congress looks like when we put people first. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78279080/452925518/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg1MGFjNS1mOGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQqLS_tXO_rtdRoq502rXA3bE2MRAjnqQxnQddDvLoM=&emci=5a4bc6ca-e9c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=31850ac5-f8c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=15529135) | Dear friends, Legislating and delivering results is about compromise. This week the House of Representatives overwhelmingly passed a tax bill. During negotiations, the ask from Democrats in Congress was prioritizing a child tax credit to help working families make ends meet. Republicans, on the other hand, demanded tax breaks for big business — the same businesses that barely pay taxes as it is. I did not love this vote and I wish we could have done more, but I knew it would help 25,000 children in my district and 119,000 children across the state of Connecticut. This bill was a perfect example of where the priorities of the two parties lie. Democrats are for the people and Republicans are for corporate special interests. We must continue to fight for an expanded child tax credit, which lifted 50% of children out of poverty. I will continue to advocate for policies that help working people, but I need your help to stay in Congress so we can put families and children first.**[Will you make a donation today so I can continue my fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78279081/452925519/1352647135?refcode=E6853-20230202-BipartisanTaxRelief-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg1MGFjNS1mOGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQqLS_tXO_rtdRoq502rXA3bE2MRAjnqQxnQddDvLoM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78279082/452925520/1352647135?express_lane=true&refcode=E6853-20230202-BipartisanTaxRelief-EG-Other&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg1MGFjNS1mOGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQqLS_tXO_rtdRoq502rXA3bE2MRAjnqQxnQddDvLoM=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MULLIN VICTORY FUND**
body:
If only Joe Biden would do the same for our country’s southern border

| | [ ](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkb2uozAQhZ_GdET2mAApKJAQXa6ibba0BjMQ7_UPMnaivP2K3WTrbc-Rvplv5udVXdFY49cvdNRFp-Ku_IbKZWuNL1OkfcN9V8ChKjmUHJQo5q6-QNOKgjrR8PrCBW_Pxb0DXp0FJ35u6mlupkm0epmnqpWVRjmdRWG6g8OBg2jhIi4nuPAF22VaoJk0R2QVj7TlyRqN3uGvEE16nTylwnb3lLadyZ7ByGDcSedIp6fxkeaTDo7B-F76YXQK8VUu2c8Mxg1LelBcI5FncszJKUezyY7JgRwaG8kntAzqo9pDjpqYHG69-rr16ta_C41uQ7N6JoePhHIYv5_48vR3sgrfFu_BYfkQ6tYr947_MZJmcvhxLT-ADzr4RD4xOczBYyIGNbqQ_yQeGdTxkI3Gr0wOKWYqYjdvT2Ot2euGVXw9NI4jFOk_f_g7AAD__z8Jpvs)

**I don’t tolerate trespassers on my Oklahoma ranch.**

On MY property - if you enter without permission, **you better be ready for the consequences.**

**_If only Joe Biden would do the same for our country’s southern border._**

This is Senator Markwayne Mullin.

As a native Oklahoman, my home and family are right in the marching path of the invasion of illegal immigrants pouring over our border.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Thank you for stepping up when it matters most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your incredible support this past month. I’m proud to kick off 2024 with this amazing team by side, and look forward to the road ahead as we work together to overcome my _**two Republican opponents**_ and protect this seat. It is because of folks like you who sent their support when we needed it most that we were able to flip this seat to blue in 2022 and I know we can protect our progress in this year’s election. But the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has already named me as one of the most at-risk seats in this year’s general election, so we truly need all hands on deck to get the job done. I know that when myself or my team emails you asking for a dollar or two, it may not seem like much, but when you add up the $1, $5, or even $10 contributions from everyone who chips in, the impact adds up for our grassroots team. Thank you for being a part of this team, and for stepping up when it matters most. I look forward to working together to defend my seat in November. All the best, Nikki _P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to donate last month, you can chip in to help us get a headstart on our February goal**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78279250/452926194/640857628?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTY5OGYxMy1mOWMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NoTCQcyrygBK6Tlu0niAYOB_jgQPGEhw4fi00eIGop4=)**._

clean_body: | Friends, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your incredible support this past month. I’m proud to kick off 2024 with this amazing team by side, and look forward to the road ahead as we work together to overcome my two Republican opponents and protect this seat. It is because of folks like you who sent their support when we needed it most that we were able to flip this seat to blue in 2022 and I know we can protect our progress in this year’s election. But the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has already named me as one of the most at-risk seats in this year’s general election, so we truly need all hands on deck to get the job done. I know that when myself or my team emails you asking for a dollar or two, it may not seem like much, but when you add up the $1, $5, or even $10 contributions from everyone who chips in, the impact adds up for our grassroots team. Thank you for being a part of this team, and for stepping up when it matters most. I look forward to working together to defend my seat in November. All the best, Nikki P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to donate last month, you can chip in to help us get a headstart on our February goal=. Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

clean_body: | ~~ Hey Peter – I emailed you a while back about how Republicans were attacking me for trying to make ends meet and driving for Uber during my campaign. But I told you I have no shame, and I mean it. Republicans think that just because I’m not wealthy like other members of Congress, I shouldn’t have a seat at the table. But they’re so wrong. I’ll never stop fighting for those ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I need your support to keep me fighting in Washington in the face of these baseless attacks. So today, I’m asking you for just $1. ~~ | | | ~~ ~ | ~ | ~~ Thanks for always having my back, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Today marks 100 days, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I want your feedback.

|
---
| | |
**Today marks my 100th day as Speaker of the House, Friend.**

I need to hear your feedback on our performance up until this point. Representing you is my _**number one**_ priority.

We've accomplished so much in such a short period of time, Friend. But our work is not complete. **[Which is why I need to hear your feedback today.Will you take my 100-Day Review and share your thoughts?](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMUU1r3DAQ_TXyTWY0smX54EPo4ktJKb30KLTS2FHW0hpZ3iT_vtgQeiiFXAbmzXvz5uP3s3m2YQlp_mEjDTeXTd5MeZj4ahCw4YAc0IjKD753yqqKBtGB6kGAktXLQKR937aT1ZO-6kkD6HYiRa4nmESnqzAcfQABhW4E9vVVee_oCk5o6lUHrAG7UC71jWh19zRn2rZM635dgrOpdvdYLcNLKevG5BPDkeG4kdsz1W8hZfIHg-GYsnMMRwHAvf3g254f9MHj66GQ4xTyVpKNxOSFYYvtGcYDNQdsjPsLM1Q23vdUmLzII8uHXw5pZvJS8k4M1V6icTauNsyJycvnkubnE__-7RfWQkjVCFNE00jd97ztJENF76YE_3X-6XJPhc5ZyoPfXOafWobqfU-PfwtVHvz6FpYlbKpjDczRhuU8ZPn_i_8EAAD__zAhnNA "Which is why I need to hear your feedback today.Will you take my 100-Day Review and share your thoughts?")**

clean_body: I want your feedback. | | | | Today marks my 100th day as Speaker of the House, Friend. I need to hear your feedback on our performance up until this point. Representing you is my number one priority. We've accomplished so much in such a short period of time, Friend. But our work is not complete. "Which is why I need to hear your feedback today.Will you take my 100-Day Review and share your thoughts?" | | | "Generic Button" Before we go any further in 2024, we wanted to check in with our top supporters to see where they stand on all things House Republicans. Your voice matters. "That is why it’s so important you complete my 100-Day Review, because what you think matters to me." | | | "Generic Button" My team and I will be reviewing submissions FIRST thing in the morning, Friend. "So please take a few minutes to provide your insight today. " | | | "Generic Button" Best, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter,

I’m reaching out today with a heartfelt thank you. **Thanks to your support, we reached our first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year!**

This is the strong momentum we need going into the last full month before our must-win primary election on March 5th. With ballots being mailed on Monday, it’s critical that we reach undecided voters with my vision for Orange County.

And with your support in January, we have the resources to do so. From funding our television ads to our on-the-ground voter outreach, every dollar donated directly helps support our campaign.

Remember: CA-47 is one of the most closely-watched races in the country. This is a wide-open seat that will be critical for control of the House majority.

I’m proud to be the only candidate in this race that hasn’t taken a cent of corporate PAC money. That’s why it’s so energizing to know that we reached our January goal with support from people like you giving what they can, when they can.

So as we move forward into these last critical weeks before our primary, I’m thankful for your continued support. Let’s do this!

In unity,

Joanna

I deeply appreciate your help.
|

Peter, before I do anything else this month, I want to say thanks for your help in January. I deeply appreciate your continued support and am grateful to know I can count on you. I know that my emails and texts ask a lot of you. **They ask you to invest in our fight for North Carolina’s future.** And this grassroots team always steps up — because you know just what is on the horizon. Republicans in Raleigh and Washington have made no secret of their extreme agenda: abortion bans, voting restrictions, and attacks on our democratic process are just the start. **The stakes are higher than we can imagine, and it’s up to us to meet this moment.** Peter, Republicans hold a one-vote supermajority in the NC legislature. In November, we MUST break it. Even with GOP gerrymandering, Democratic candidates can break their stranglehold if we can get your support NOW and through the next nine months. **[Please, consider a monthly donation of $5, $10, or any amount that is right for you to power our work electing North Carolina Democrats across the ballot. We can’t do this without your continued support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78284076/452932090/435245919?recurring=true&refcode=ea.50534b0c-fdc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.50534b0c-fdc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDUzNGIwYy1mZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UuXCPnrxiA0xgg-N-19jlRgQmXm76HJn5eHpe_eJ_Ss=)** | **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78284077/452932091/435245919?recurring=true&refcode=ea.50534b0c-fdc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.50534b0c-fdc1-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDUzNGIwYy1mZGMxLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UuXCPnrxiA0xgg-N-19jlRgQmXm76HJn5eHpe_eJ_Ss=)**

clean_body: I deeply appreciate your help. | Peter, before I do anything else this month, I want to say thanks for your help in January. I deeply appreciate your continued support and am grateful to know I can count on you. I know that my emails and texts ask a lot of you. They ask you to invest in our fight for North Carolina’s future. And this grassroots team always steps up — because you know just what is on the horizon. Republicans in Raleigh and Washington have made no secret of their extreme agenda: abortion bans, voting restrictions, and attacks on our democratic process are just the start. The stakes are higher than we can imagine, and it’s up to us to meet this moment. Peter, Republicans hold a one-vote supermajority in the NC legislature. In November, we MUST break it. Even with GOP gerrymandering, Democratic candidates can break their stranglehold if we can get your support NOW and through the next nine months. = | = Thank you, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: =?utf-8?Q?David?=
subject: Canvassing + Meet and Greet with LA Progressives
body:
I've got some exciting news and a personal invitation for you. This week is packed with opportunities for us to connect and make a difference. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/upcoming-events-join-us-in-strengthening-our-community-13932974?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hey Friend,

Hope you're doing all right! It's amazing to see everyone in our CA-34 community pitching in to make our corner of the world a better place. I firmly believe that when we come together and contribute, we can create positive changes, not just for us but also for future generations.

With that in mind, I've got some exciting news and a personal invitation for you. This week is packed with opportunities for us to connect and make a difference.

First off, we’re hitting the ground running with a canvassing campaign in Highland Park this Saturday. It’s a fantastic opportunity for us to meet face-to-face with our neighbors, spread the word about our initiatives, and hear directly from the community about their needs and ideas. Your presence would mean a lot – there’s strength in numbers, and every conversation we have can open doors to new possibilities. We will be meeting at N Ave 50 / York Ave (near Kumquat). Hope to see you there!

And there’s more! I’m also thrilled to invite you to a Meet and Greet with Ysabel Jarado and John Yi on Sunday at 1pm, and to our "Happy Hour with David Kim" next Friday. See additional details below.

Can’t wait to see you out there, making a difference together. Let's make this week count!

Catch you soon at Highland Park and at our other events!
---
| | | |
---
| _**Canvassing**_

**Date:** Saturday, February 3
**Location:** N Ave 50 / York Ave
**Time:** 1:00pm PST

**Details:** Join us as we canvass in Highland Park!

_**Meet & Greet w/ LA Progressives**_

**Date:** Thursday, January 25
Location: RSVP for location (**bit.ly/yjmeetandgreet**)
**Time:** 1:00pm PST

**Details:** Join David, Join Yi, and Ysabel Jurado in Boyle Heights!
---
| |
---
| _**Haooy Hour w/ David Kim**_

**Date:** Friday, February 9
**Time:** 5:00-7:00pm PST
**Location:**
Casa Fina Mexicana Restaurant & Cantina
1842 1st St,
Los Angeles, CA 90033

**Details:** This session is all about you – your thoughts, concerns, and visions. It’s a chance to speak and be heard, to listen, and to connect with fellow community members. Your input is vital in shaping our shared path forward. **[RSVP HERE](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=4262f497e6&e=fee98d637f)**.
---
| | | _**Your Voice Matters**_

Your participation in these events is more than just attendance; it is a testament to your commitment to our community's future. Whether it's through engaging in conversations on social media or sharing your perspectives in person, your involvement is invaluable.

_**Let's Connect!**_

Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or require additional information about the events. And don't forget to follow us on your preferred app (@davidkimforca) for regular updates.

Together, let's continue to nurture and empower our community, for it is in unity that our collective dreams transform into reality.
---

name: JD Vance
subject: No stranger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
why I fight

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06Qji0jZ3AVJNMgIYhApS5-OVkopNVjrgSozvj7ivy1j3PFVQhYVXp5ZOYUdzTaJ-SCqDfW6ywnhZpft-mmM_S5GhUY6oPpnIdsdY687IcS4oG-5NFr3-KwZAqN-RZx9uNkn8f1ss7UaFE4Cg4lAhtt0yU4qObl1q2xg5Nl4aQPmYOV)
---
_I 'm no stranger to a bit of hard work, Peter._

Growing up, I had to work my tail off to have a decent shot at any sort of career. I juggled my home life with my studies. Oftentimes, trouble at home got in the way of my dreams. After joining the Marines, I quickly learned that every man has to do his part.

I've kept that mentality moving through my various battles in Washington. I realized quickly that if I didn't stand up for my constituents and my values, and fight for what is right, I can't expect anyone else to do it for me. That's why I've been working so hard. Fighting for small-town American ideals, protecting Ohioans every single day, is a fulltime job. If I don't then no one will.

**[Can I count on your support to help me fight for common sense Conservative values in Washington?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlNT3yhLkAQnIAsrPBcbmhcNfaKtNXc01iMjUP1a8_8-5dB4x11cKwqD5NdLfeFYD54ALaZJgFn53cW4KmOVf_pbZ-kttizlCSCh06cLIEqRbV3oYtz_kBmAof-w36GACMkckz-apuc8IOQGJKhWOAUsxJcibP331Bsw1D4aqAhdHliqwgDkKz0wFb3a2WRsNd)**

| [**CHIP IN FOR COMMON SENSE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06Qjgn3sNHtLyMp8yQfdXbesnpD8QK_LnJgF98ZitrL9pgSs1FfiSzZQ-FBY3gsidOTHmArGoe_U3FB_14vH3zC4ALr34X7tgMIsnyidLyCEyUgNJpugniQXW43B8huhULVaF_DHg7_PF0UnPix_5Ra8xuQWZd33o2ZL4WVWzYmY0OA)
---

**[I really need to make every single fundraising goal if we want a shot at defending GOP values in this upcoming election.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlNT3yhLkAQnIAsrPBcbmhcGmucOrgxXD3clmrwrr5gGnQX8ZGpyp7DWnLdVSbJyNJ-w3oJCsRf3R8Kld9iihIxkPVHy3aDc6XpfZey5BgOefi1zGJY5s88NNTQIJ4PdsUKXDUSmHMWl3cwGEyf09f0jB6G_Rxu2MgglxoiE9IutErGEhZcmkCWPAmoHr2FEcY)** It used to be every man against the Establishment and Democrats, but not when you're in my corner.

[**JOIN JD VANCE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06Qjgn3sNHtLyMp8yQfdXbesnrFb-UDynWxYJUMgmkAnoL1gPR7Jy7r5ZWRY1iPnXEFfVTJWWzttM63w9kF1K-xF9wPw2P-thwCZO6kORholJJS8K8FNrwvpSqJGgs-wb_aj4tmNKvODQkykJYpd4vKDpTy-COhuSIW4MiNVSbBSxqK)
---

_Thanks so much for standing by me._

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06QjnpbWmcLcM-cbGumhqMkpG2PFOUuHQ5tf9Eh-RFrDj-fMpknb4H6zxr-sDENHHOjY6OuyxbY2azbFkjT-zeK1DMostflZRSd76EQtKHBVaN58j0-r2Dg0eT1S62ZACdk3lLDtq51m05qOxzbZidy44jf2KHgcsaakJ3oJB8_MEdh) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06Qjtmiwq1g_FEeow7_3GSqzEpVlQvVam1hZuBw-6IrULfR2zZtuqtuan1_MB55psMlMOFRapHyeCG_-ogqQfhFn0Q27ShBC0xvSx6fTCzA3phiBXpggh113MngBdpc1JYtin4YFQAHeIYOoLE-NtrKOpLQMKAGXyw9BIUuuMbEO5-q) | [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=50d6a9915c5249e7bfba265107766cd5&_e=fnQ48ko4ojE0eJ10Nqq0p-Jb92cb5JQ5dcIi1Q-rd5wN6bSs7ZJ7unkoYIA7Pd3Mv7VTJ__QSGkNMtoB_ie8zvhsJ3cZDUtVx7LqWrZNSQmV-SkQNDpGpOW2ytHdA_MlW9sTe2tM6kSaL_BmD06Qji0jZ3AVJNMgIYhApS5-OVlN2bjzAsa_z-LZI4JVcLNObEZPguN-2C06U08lnVawX5kfHGgIBWTMtFKCUYgb3OuMVIkw1A1kQ0CqEN3YFbXxyWjsk9w5Pe997tNw7ZjyU8CpBYSEpSfeo6kkRsb_rkIM0LlednXWaQImQCSVqeL2)

I've kept that mentality moving through my various battles in Washington. I realized quickly that if I didn't stand up for my constituents and my values, and fight for what is right, I can't expect anyone else to do it for me. That's why I've been working so hard. Fighting for small-town American ideals, protecting Ohioans every single day, is a fulltime job. If I don't then no one will. | It used to be every man against the Establishment and Democrats, but not when you're in my corner. Thanks so much for standing by me. JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2024 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGPpCAQRn8N3uhAoagHDz1r25dxs3GT2SNBKG02ogZwJvPvNybd972-VCrvfX961Wu3uHX-qT02wasQ1WjVrMMnftNoHm6aFDDIKQPKQPHMNrKGsuIZNrxksmairIrs0YxFIcccCqahBMMry7UBY7ku5QR1wTLXnH8YMOA1Yzm_TFBhrdkojeUS8pzkLOB-jIszevX67xZc-r6smLKleaS0RyKuBDoCXURzBLx8uTWgvZjNnyzhJ9Kn-LQFekQacdUJCXQWR16BwMLoSYy6IKI7kldxO4JBItq39k6H2wcBeWKP1h2eiPbWP4nRftduXolonxFcvbV39fv-46re39Vw-1C_rnR43SdDRDv0QF_JWWjs_uWWxUVZkpzNXrvlNM_S_6z-LwAA__85FYPH)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGPpCAQRn8N3uhAoagHDz1r25dxs3GT2SNBKG02ogZwJvPvNybd972-VCrvfX961Wu3uHX-qT02wasQ1WjVrMMnftNoHm6aFDDIKQPKQPHMNrKGsuIZNrxksmairIrs0YxFIcccCqahBMMry7UBY7ku5QR1wTLXnH8YMOA1Yzm_TFBhrdkojeUS8pzkLOB-jIszevX67xZc-r6smLKleaS0RyKuBDoCXURzBLx8uTWgvZjNnyzhJ9Kn-LQFekQacdUJCXQWR16BwMLoSYy6IKI7kldxO4JBItq39k6H2wcBeWKP1h2eiPbWP4nRftduXolonxFcvbV39fv-46re39Vw-1C_rnR43SdDRDv0QF_JWWjs_uWWxUVZkpzNXrvlNM_S_6z-LwAA__85FYPH)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGPpCAQRn8N3uhAoagHDz1r25dxs3GT2SNBKG02ogZwJvPvNybd972-VCrvfX961Wu3uHX-qT02wasQ1WjVrMMnftNoHm6aFDDIKQPKQPHMNrKGsuIZNrxksmairIrs0YxFIcccCqahBMMry7UBY7ku5QR1wTLXnH8YMOA1Yzm_TFBhrdkojeUS8pzkLOB-jIszevX67xZc-r6smLKleaS0RyKuBDoCXURzBLx8uTWgvZjNnyzhJ9Kn-LQFekQacdUJCXQWR16BwMLoSYy6IKI7kldxO4JBItq39k6H2wcBeWKP1h2eiPbWP4nRftduXolonxFcvbV39fv-46re39Vw-1C_rnR43SdDRDv0QF_JWWjs_uWWxUVZkpzNXrvlNM_S_6z-LwAA__85FYPH)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGPpCAQRn8N3uhAoagHDz1r25dxs3GT2SNBKG02ogZwJvPvNybd972-VCrvfX961Wu3uHX-qT02wasQ1WjVrMMnftNoHm6aFDDIKQPKQPHMNrKGsuIZNrxksmairIrs0YxFIcccCqahBMMry7UBY7ku5QR1wTLXnH8YMOA1Yzm_TFBhrdkojeUS8pzkLOB-jIszevX67xZc-r6smLKleaS0RyKuBDoCXURzBLx8uTWgvZjNnyzhJ9Kn-LQFekQacdUJCXQWR16BwMLoSYy6IKI7kldxO4JBItq39k6H2wcBeWKP1h2eiPbWP4nRftduXolonxFcvbV39fv-46re39Vw-1C_rnR43SdDRDv0QF_JWWjs_uWWxUVZkpzNXrvlNM_S_6z-LwAA__85FYPH)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkEGPpCAQRn8N3uhAoagHDz1r25dxs3GT2SNBKG02ogZwJvPvNybd972-VCrvfX961Wu3uHX-qT02wasQ1WjVrMMnftNoHm6aFDDIKQPKQPHMNrKGsuIZNrxksmairIrs0YxFIcccCqahBMMry7UBY7ku5QR1wTLXnH8YMOA1Yzm_TFBhrdkojeUS8pzkLOB-jIszevX67xZc-r6smLKleaS0RyKuBDoCXURzBLx8uTWgvZjNnyzhJ9Kn-LQFekQacdUJCXQWR16BwMLoSYy6IKI7kldxO4JBItq39k6H2wcBeWKP1h2eiPbWP4nRftduXolonxFcvbV39fv-46re39Vw-1C_rnR43SdDRDv0QF_JWWjs_uWWxUVZkpzNXrvlNM_S_6z-LwAA__85FYPH)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Bet you didn't know this about me
body:
Friend, I want to share a few of my favorite things that you might not know about me.

In case it wasn’t obvious, I’m a major sports fan. The Ravens and the Orioles are my teams. I will admit, it was disappointing to see the Ravens lose in the last game — but I had a fantastic time cheering on the home team, and can’t wait to be back at the Bank Stadium next year! #RavensFlock

Governor Wes Moore at an Orioles game [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/wes_oriolesgame.jpeg]

(Plus, baseball season is around th ecorner, go Orioles!)

In the meantime, I’ve got music to keep me company. I’ve always believed that every one of us is driven by a soundtrack. A song can bring you back to a specific moment in your life, whether that be your eighth-grade baseball game or your inauguration to become Governor of Maryland.
At the Inaugural Ball, I was honored to share a dance with my wife to “The Makings of You” by Curtis Mayfield, one of our favorite songs.

Governor Wes Moore and First Lady Dawn Moore dancing at the 2023 inauguration [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/wes_innauguraldance.png]

When it comes to music, it’s been a part of my entire life. Growing up, reggae played throughout the house and has been a cherished genre to listen to all my life, especially on my long runs. If you’ve ever been in a meeting with me, you may have caught me reciting the lyrics to some of my favorite songs. This genre is one of the first that truly spoke to me and it carries so much meaning to me.

Now, this wouldn’t be an email about my favorite things if I didn’t get into some of my favorite food. I’ve said it once, and I’ll say it again, if you come to Maryland, you’ve got to have our crab cakes. Chick and Ruth’s in Annapolis is now serving “The Wes Moore” - crab cakes and waffles. Not only is crab the state food of Maryland, but it’s also a go-to in the Moore household.

I’ll end the email here so I can go grab a snack and let you get back to business.

Thank you for being here every step of the way.

Elevate,

Wes

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://secure.ngpvan.com/5dp2nzUoCUKkmjN2NCT3Cw2
Update Your Information: https://support.wesmoore.com/a/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: unsubscribe: https://support.wesmoore.com/p/naFTamTwwEaXtoxkWZyUYA2?unsubscribedata=RFB2wZTLbnHF6hA%2FnFXybXeBuUO85C6HBy8wA%2B9HWT82sLOeS9JyXnt5ScIVSCCqsomR3OQBRFkuWteggDS2F1Cf7Rml3op8ioHQH8MGpKqOhLKbdyMj0isJmEIF3rW6CHV2%2B7mFHnIpdQYSCb%2FHWIBN8NXe5U3TeTpNlAv33WxROJQCOkqdHT74cKAShjZAoQ8Uxp6OaD9uBo%2BE7of2L%2B0MaPIhgYXCn0Cqe4sJLer%2F0WKkEq6nkzWmyhvpjoDA4WCCatHm1KelxfInhlT9xtatxLkaQ54bhYt12HmPMTLbY55fElXaPqm6dBUMy4wSMoqc1xN6tVENjEgcoQW2PvP8iQZC8G%2F3gVlRPjapUtGfgWHaYIvw7IuhVhtWauVTAlGfyj2synPSyLys2%2F9Eq2pR8kq%2FaI4qxQnHgUJlIFTj9QLqW4xeROVP9VTrQ70o

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. name: Bob
subject: Cancelled
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Tourism throughout MI01
is vital to our economy
Like our retirement plans, our economy must be diversified to succeed.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Your contributions help me promote and preserve our environment and economy with healthy balance . If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
As more people discover the majesty of the great Up North, it's up to all of us to ensure its sustainability.
For example, Traverse City's tourism is a booming $2.6 billion annually. Nearly 29% of the economy is tourism-reliant. Half of all restaurants and a quarter of retail stores would close if tourism disappeared, not to mention the wineries, hotels, resorts, and more.
Tourism stimulates local economies by creating jobs and supporting businesses, leading to increased spending on locally sourced goods and services. It's why, like all jobs, tourist industry workers need livable wages.
When our ability to maintain that balance and support each other dwindles due to our warm winter, tourism becomes even more critical to our well-being over the remaining seasons.
In the UP, last year, warming conditions forced organizers to cancel the iconic UP 200 sled-dog race for the first time in race history. This year, organizers made the tough call again: canceled for two consecutive years.
Our distinct economy and way of life are sources of regional pride, but climatic uncertainty threatens countless events that rely on our winter wonderland.
Tourism thrives here because of our pristine waters, clean air, hospitality, and wonderful people.
Your support helps me get to Congress to carefully guard what attracts the world to Northern Michigan and the UP.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

unemployment rate remained at 3.7%, according to Bureau of Labor
Statistics (BLS) data released Friday. Economists anticipated that the
country would add 180,000 jobs in January compared to the 216,000 that

Sinema has been all over, flying private, traveling to Paris, London, Madrid, New York, California... – and that’s just in the last six months – staying in five-star hotels and resorts, dining at fancy restaurants, visiting wineries. Where does she get the money to go on all these fancy trips, staying at the Ritz Carlton and eating at Michelin star restaurants? Oh right, her Wall Street pals! name: Carmen Goers
subject: Join Us in Celebrating and Honoring Black History Month
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Join Us in Celebrating and Honoring Black History Month**
---

Dear Peter,
As we celebrate Black History Month, our campaign in Washington's 8th Congressional District proudly recognizes the invaluable contributions and enduring legacy of African Americans in our nation's history. This month is a time to reflect, honor, and celebrate the achievements of Black Americans who have shaped our country.
Our conservative values champion the principles of liberty, justice, and equality for all. It's essential we continue to support and uplift the voices and stories that have been instrumental in building our great nation. As we honor this significant month, let's also acknowledge the work ahead of us in ensuring a bright and equitable future for every American.
This Black History Month, join us in not only commemorating past achievements but also in forging a path forward. Your contribution to our campaign is more than a donation; it's a commitment to uphold the values that unite us as a community and a nation.

---
| | | |
---
|
Would you consider contributing $20, $50, or $100 to help us:

* Highlight the triumphs of Black Americans who overcame adversity through hard work and resilience.
* Advance the shared values that unite Americans.
* Promote a society where everyone has the chance to thrive.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65bd3f35e84269e6409dc836/65b93b1fac5d0af02efbbc55/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=15306f0d3c0317eceeb28b496d93d8ea40bcb2838aa807a0a74666fb20c2ae00)
---
| | | Together, let's celebrate the diversity that strengthens us and continue to work towards a future where every citizen can achieve their American dream. Your support is crucial in this endeavor.
Donate today and be a part of this important journey.
Thank you for your dedication and support.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Following the 2008 housing crisis, which was fueled by predatory private mortgages and unregulated markets, Wall Street hedge funds started scooping up large portfolios of foreclosed homes.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78287278/452940216/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWVjODkxMy0wMGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uh6moYJZkUnLlV_Ao9GW2RKXw7Tr_4iwo7MWnoRVy00=&emci=f14a1239-fec1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=91ec8913-00c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=7731215)
---

| | America has an affordable housing problem, and if we don't take action, it's going to get worse. Following the 2008 housing crisis, which was fueled by predatory private mortgages and unregulated markets, Wall Street hedge funds started scooping up large portfolios of foreclosed homes. The federal government facilitated this corporate greed through bulk sales of federally backed mortgages and foreclosed properties, shutting out ordinary families from buying these homes and recovering housing stability. **It was wrong.** All over the country, hedge funds are snatching up available housing, using their financial muscle to outbid ordinary Americans, driving up prices and rents, and turning neighborhoods into Wall Street profit centers at the expense of folks struggling to find a place to call home. Here's what I'm doing to put an end to these practices: I introduced the _End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act_ to kick hedge funds out of the housing market and increase access to affordable housing. My legislation forces hedge funds and other large private investors to sell their inventory of single-family homes and requires that they sell them to families who don't currently own a home. And if they don't, they are required to pay a substantial tax penalty that funds a down payment assistance program. Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home, and we're working to get it done. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Following the 2008 housing crisis, which was fueled by predatory private mortgages and unregulated markets, Wall Street hedge funds started scooping up large portfolios of foreclosed homes. | | | | America has an affordable housing problem, and if we don't take action, it's going to get worse. Following the 2008 housing crisis, which was fueled by predatory private mortgages and unregulated markets, Wall Street hedge funds started scooping up large portfolios of foreclosed homes. The federal government facilitated this corporate greed through bulk sales of federally backed mortgages and foreclosed properties, shutting out ordinary families from buying these homes and recovering housing stability. It was wrong. All over the country, hedge funds are snatching up available housing, using their financial muscle to outbid ordinary Americans, driving up prices and rents, and turning neighborhoods into Wall Street profit centers at the expense of folks struggling to find a place to call home. Here's what I'm doing to put an end to these practices: I introduced the End Hedge Fund Control of American Homes Act to kick hedge funds out of the housing market and increase access to affordable housing. My legislation forces hedge funds and other large private investors to sell their inventory of single-family homes and requires that they sell them to families who don't currently own a home. And if they don't, they are required to pay a substantial tax penalty that funds a down payment assistance program. Everyone should have a safe, affordable place to call home, and we're working to get it done. Onward! why I’m reaching out:
| | |
---
Friend,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. You might know me as a former Congresswoman from Florida, as a gun safety advocate, or as the Democrat running to defeat GOP Sen. Rick Scott and flip the Sunshine State blue.
I’m in this race because the fate of our democracy is on the line. I believe we deserve better than Rick Scott and the many other extremists in Washington.
Families like yours are at the heart of my campaign. That’s why I’m reaching out: **I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most.****[_So please, will you take my exclusive Democratic strategy survey before midnight tonight? Your feedback is incredibly important to me and will help shape our election year strategy._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78287647/452941261/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk745-su-nd&refcode=jtk745-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFlNTljYzMtMDBjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oDTmnT2_fD26udNkNceXdW8CFfz1IxuSDy7chHRzwjw=&emci=b23cf53f-79c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=81e59cc3-00c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=3969733)**

---
For the past few years, I’ve watched a minority of extremists push my state down a path of right-wing extremism and divisiveness, all while attacking our cherished democratic institutions.
The far-right leadership in my state has banned books, created an elections police unit to scare voters, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and left families defenseless against gun violence. In Washington, Rick Scott has pushed for a nationwide ban on abortions, an end to Social Security, and higher taxes on working families.
Unfortunately, this is a trend that’s happening across the country. **It keeps me up at night — wondering what kind of country we’ll leave behind for our children. And I know I’m not the only one.**
But if Democrats like you and me all stand together, we can defeat this dangerous extremism and leave behind a better, kinder country for our children. That’s why your input is so important as we iron out our campaign strategy. **[_So please, will you respond to my new survey before midnight tonight to help me build a winning strategy and flip Florida blue this year?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78287649/452941265/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk745-su-nd&refcode=jtk745-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFlNTljYzMtMDBjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oDTmnT2_fD26udNkNceXdW8CFfz1IxuSDy7chHRzwjw=&emci=b23cf53f-79c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=81e59cc3-00c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78287650/452941267/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk745-su-nd&refcode=jtk745-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFlNTljYzMtMDBjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oDTmnT2_fD26udNkNceXdW8CFfz1IxuSDy7chHRzwjw=&emci=b23cf53f-79c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=81e59cc3-00c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=3969733)

Thank you,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: re: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Let me tell you the story of a soda fountain in the segregated South. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78288604/452944517/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzMwZjE2MjctMDJjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RCIGMH9dL02XSEsxkl7M2KaYW65rAB8cBOr8zSUx2Jw=)
---
Hi everyone, As we step into Black History Month, I want to tell you the story of a soda fountain in the segregated South before 1964. **At that time, barely fifty years ago, Black customers weren’t even allowed to sit in the same seats as white customers.** Thanks to heroes like Dr. King and Fannie Lou Hamer, change was slowly spreading across America. But change hadn’t yet come to many small southern towns. Even the seats at the soda fountain were still segregated — until one worker decided he was tired of waiting for that to change. He thought that if his Black customers weren’t allowed to sit, then nobody should be, and he removed every single seat in that shop. **Until everyone could sit as equals, they’d all just have to stand.** The man who removed those seats was my Dad, and I think about what he did often. Dad believed we all have a role to play in making change for the benefit of all, and by removing those seats, he found a common-sense solution to address an injustice. Fifty years later, we’ve come a long way from the days of segregation, but we have a long way to go still. **Systemic racism lives on, and we all have a role to play in fighting back against it.** It’s why I made combating racial disparities in maternal and infant health the key issue of my time as First Lady, and it’s driving my campaign for the U.S. Senate today. This month, let’s celebrate men and women like Dr. King, Fannie Lou Hamer, John Lewis, and so many more, who have helped us come so far. But let’s not stop there. **Let’s ask ourselves what small things we can do to make our communities fairer and safer for everyone.** For my Dad, it was removing the seats at the segregated soda fountain. What will it be for you? Together,
Tammy Murphy
* * *
Tammy Murphy for Senate
PO Box 378
Maplewood, NJ 07040
United States **[info@tammymurphyforsenate.com](mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com) ** | **Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
---

name: Hearton for Congress 2024
subject: Notice to NPA's (Please share)
disclaimer_text: paid for by John Hearton and Hearton for Congress
body:
People of Florida District 8, This election year is the most important election year since our Founding Fathers signed the Constitution. “We the People” of Florida need to be courageous and remember that our God given rights are protected by our Constitution. Our freedoms are being torn away by globalist agendas and politicians like Joe Biden and other career politicians. We need to remember that the intent of the government was to be run BY THE PEOPLE for THE PEOPLE. This means we have the responsibility to run the government and we have the responsibility to choose elected officials who will represent us and remember they work for the people, not huge corporations or a handful of influential donors.

Our government has put our families into debt and has propagated ridiculous ideologies that only divide us. We as a country need to unite and focus on those things that we (the people) agree on to bring America back to the “shining city on the hill.” (Reagan). These include, to name a few:

|

|

|

- A balanced Budget Amendment

- Secure Borders

- Term Limits

- Putting America and its Citizens 1st

- Stand Alone Bills

- Securing Freedom for our Future Generations

|

|

|

Until we come together and focus on those things that unite us, our children and grandchildren will not have a bright future. We need to protect our borders and the natural resources that feed and provide for us. We need to protect our homes and children from threats to our sovereignty supported by foreign bad actors, pouring across our Southern border.

We can’t risk being enslaved by globalists like Klaus Schwab who say, “you will own nothing and be happy”. People like Schwab and the companies he hides behind are aiding terrorists who walk through our southern border with the idea of destroying our country from within. The Biden administration has allowed the people, used as pawns by foreign bad actors to flood through our southern border, bringing in dangerous drugs like Fentanyl, brining human trafficking to the states and draining this country of resources. The liberal border policies provide World Economic Forum companies like Black Rock to clear cut land to develop citizen subsidized “affordable housing” for illegal immigrants.

We the people have to make a difference, while there is still land for our children to care for and resources to support their well-being. Unfortunately, Florida does not allow NPA’s (non-party affiliated - registered voters) to participate in the States Primary elections (The first of which is the Presidential Preference Primary or “PPP”). Florida’s next PPP is on March 19, 2024. The deadline for voters to register to vote or update their party affiliation for the PPP is February 20, 2024. Eligible voters can vote in the PPP by mail, by voting early, or by voting at the polls on Election Day. Updating your Voter Registration is as easy as: https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/39011?id=30.4.1.6d99e54df25f5a477842815871704ca6 .

The next important primary is August 20, 2024. This primary is where you have the ability to choose someone that aligns with your values instead of choosing the lesser of two evils.

I urge you to take a side. While I hope to earn your vote on August 20, I want your voice to be heard and that can only be done if you register with a party affiliation. One thing to note: Biden’s Dictator Tactics include the Democratic Party not even having a primary in Florida. This means that you only get to vote in the Presidential Primary if you’re registered Republican. Again, I encourage you to do your due diligence, research and determine who aligns best with your values and VOTE on March 19, 2024 for the Presidential Primary and again on August 20th for YOUR representatives.

A little about me: My name is John Hearton and I’m a Conservative (Republican). I’ve been a successful entrepreneur that has never been in, nor thought I would ever be in politics. I’m a technologist with an MBA and years of experience negotiating large contracts. I’ve provided engineering solutions for the security of this country’s largest supercomputers. Becoming a Congressman is not the best thing for me as it wasn’t the best thing for our founding fathers who risked their lives to establish this great nation. I feel that it’s an investment in maintaining the freedoms that we enjoy under our Constitutional Republic and protecting the American Dream for our future generations. It’s important to me to be a good role model for my kids and their kids so that they too can enjoy the same opportunities we’ve had. For more information, please visit: HeartonForCongress.Com .

Thank you for your time and I look forward to meeting and/or hearing from you soon.

John

John Hearton (Republican Candidate)

clean_body: People of Florida District 8, This election year is the most important election year since our Founding Fathers signed the Constitution. “We the People” of Florida need to be courageous and remember that our God given rights are protected by our Constitution. Our freedoms are being torn away by globalist agendas and politicians like Joe Biden and other career politicians. We need to remember that the intent of the government was to be run BY THE PEOPLE for THE PEOPLE. This means we have the responsibility to run the government and we have the responsibility to choose elected officials who will represent us and remember they work for the people, not huge corporations or a handful of influential donors. Our government has put our families into debt and has propagated ridiculous ideologies that only divide us. We as a country need to unite and focus on those things that we (the people) agree on to bring America back to the “shining city on the hill.” (Reagan). These include, to name a few: | | | - A balanced Budget Amendment - Secure Borders - Term Limits - Putting America and its Citizens 1st - Stand Alone Bills - Securing Freedom for our Future Generations | | | Until we come together and focus on those things that unite us, our children and grandchildren will not have a bright future. We need to protect our borders and the natural resources that feed and provide for us. We need to protect our homes and children from threats to our sovereignty supported by foreign bad actors, pouring across our Southern border. We can’t risk being enslaved by globalists like Klaus Schwab who say, “you will own nothing and be happy”. People like Schwab and the companies he hides behind are aiding terrorists who walk through our southern border with the idea of destroying our country from within. The Biden administration has allowed the people, used as pawns by foreign bad actors to flood through our southern border, bringing in dangerous drugs like Fentanyl, brining human trafficking to the states and draining this country of resources. The liberal border policies provide World Economic Forum companies like Black Rock to clear cut land to develop citizen subsidized “affordable housing” for illegal immigrants. We the people have to make a difference, while there is still land for our children to care for and resources to support their well-being. Unfortunately, Florida does not allow NPA’s (non-party affiliated - registered voters) to participate in the States Primary elections (The first of which is the Presidential Preference Primary or “PPP”). Florida’s next PPP is on March 19, 2024. The deadline for voters to register to vote or update their party affiliation for the PPP is February 20, 2024. Eligible voters can vote in the PPP by mail, by voting early, or by voting at the polls on Election Day. Updating your Voter Registration is as easy as: . The next important primary is August 20, 2024. This primary is where you have the ability to choose someone that aligns with your values instead of choosing the lesser of two evils. I urge you to take a side. While I hope to earn your vote on August 20, I want your voice to be heard and that can only be done if you register with a party affiliation. One thing to note: Biden’s Dictator Tactics include the Democratic Party not even having a primary in Florida. This means that you only get to vote in the Presidential Primary if you’re registered Republican. Again, I encourage you to do your due diligence, research and determine who aligns best with your values and VOTE on March 19, 2024 for the Presidential Primary and again on August 20th for YOUR representatives. A little about me: My name is John Hearton and I’m a Conservative (Republican). I’ve been a successful entrepreneur that has never been in, nor thought I would ever be in politics. I’m a technologist with an MBA and years of experience negotiating large contracts. I’ve provided engineering solutions for the security of this country’s largest supercomputers. Becoming a Congressman is not the best thing for me as it wasn’t the best thing for our founding fathers who risked their lives to establish this great nation. I feel that it’s an investment in maintaining the freedoms that we enjoy under our Constitutional Republic and protecting the American Dream for our future generations. It’s important to me to be a good role model for my kids and their kids so that they too can enjoy the same opportunities we’ve had. For more information, please visit: HeartonForCongress.Com . Thank you for your time and I look forward to meeting and/or hearing from you soon. name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , Harry Dunn here.
This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.
So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?
Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?
Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?
That's not American to me. I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.
If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Seth Moulton and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Together,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

Hi there,

Thank you. With your support in January, our campaign met our first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year!

I’m proud of the momentum that is building around this campaign at such a critical time for Arizona and our democracy. As we kick off this election year, we know that David Schweikert is one of the most vulnerable far-right extremists in Congress. And with the support I’ve seen in January - from meetings on the ground to the conversations with voters - I know we can defeat him this year.

AZ-01 deserves leadership in Congress that prioritizes our community. For far too long, Schweikert has been putting politics over people and party over country. That must change. I’m running to give our community the fearless, ethical leadership it deserves.

This is a must-win district for control of the House majority, and with it, we can protect our fundamental rights – from abortion access to the ballot box.

I’m so inspired. And it’s because of you.

Thank you,

Marlene

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign now: Support reparations for Black Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Let’s dismantle anti-Black racism. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3gBe2JwKLxkOni7UbBiU_jhCjjV8ZSut-HYnTll_KTveMlA-cUJqbhf5P7nomAKhVER8r62-NOlpTo_ExDxmGqzoM4r1YLVQiUYCB5w0NV6ZL9ZjOFm60Sv2prM_KmKU-6N1bNmII5QcbZeQQO6JjsaCvgYmXaKZxM-N6ttdEEKhkBoOdJdJI3NzorwOp7nsjBjcsvkmYuTTJAZOpWg3CA/43i/EK4w2QFrSAuMZwlhoU_INg/h0/x3ktgEwXWwBx3wuSxr9JbjhNuTrvfPSQtmLvsLpMee4)
---
Friend, February is Black History Month but in the 12th Congressional District, we recognize our Black history and our neighbors fighting for real liberation every day―honoring Black Americans who have contributed so much to our society and our world. Now is also the time to speak up about how our country continues to deny Black people equal rights. We must reverse centuries of disinvestment in Black communities, and root out anti-Black racism in our institutions. Otherwise, the still-expanding gap between Black and white families’ wealth and health will continue to grow. **Thanks to Black-led activism for racial justice, the concept of reparations for Black Americans has shifted into the mainstream.** I’m proud to support Rep. Cori Bush’s _Reparations Now Resolution_ , which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for enslaving people of African descent, as well as reparations for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people. [**Sign now to support the**** _Reparations Now Resolution_****, which will help dismantle the racist systems that have oppressed Black Americans for far too long.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARdURpj36MPOayME6YV1ZvG4LuVv9ZzAFkEUiMM8CknQWZ3sHrjsa78S_g4Rh4gHgegec5QdJOKafKwTNt-ICyFD3QJmgKxAxfPTaTIxfBNGbmkUDEH5BXwyIyW9M3C1Kt1fQK4d9GrEDViaNSczuSPIP0t16w365ABbETmLCiU0GyiO7YfpNaOTRqEYsSmKGufhs3FM1P7p5Zsx-TOuNqPR_ow0lC8Z6e6RHEyq8KQhx0od5L73V4OJOmC5nBWJsu6Ivk7itE1LgLMByffQJowZLQMwyAzOh6-G1xXoK01L0sb8Yl749dsLGzmjuPPSDGCcxX14VI34OiGZhgEJI0UK42Kpj-7Vu_mj7nbI28874/43i/EK4w2QFrSAuMZwlhoU_INg/h1/bSVecKSji5WpOiA9fsGHH1fzbkcuYJmteWt_j5WMThU) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARdURpj36MPOayME6YV1ZvG4LuVv9ZzAFkEUiMM8CknQWZ3sHrjsa78S_g4Rh4gHgeri0XsITnQAGGbR_fFvtC03wsoxWw3v8E8VIJ7MYX_zR6gEU4IxsDqH68Gm2xGlWfqrO-Xk7zj8v66ZBBQ88rZg6AU9-yLDIG-2tWvChPhGO-PuskHKSxA-v41IXd4zG9ekVQajV0NMLXSFjPrqMCqJ312akiRzUYEypX11FRjYTjAb1YM5aBSgQm0YYVUNPdrmNHNehbgtaesGY23LfzVDDkKr7Y2NtEqGf-FJMKkOXjJMgDqMdGxcdA-cTCcpa6sYgjZg0sea1livRaxnVr04oDbWrNOBY_Gmw0Dpm8yr8/43i/EK4w2QFrSAuMZwlhoU_INg/h2/S8RdW5rwbm19ZB5NO7tKj08wY_APk8rRm7SPPdhN7e8)

After the era of slavery, our government codified anti-Black racism in other policies like Jim Crow and redlining.
These harms continue today: The wealth gap between Black and white families has expanded over the past 60 years. The gap between white and Black home ownership rates is the widest it has been in 50 years. Redlining still exists, with Black Americans disproportionately denied fair lending rates and mortgages, regardless of income.
Built into our country’s institutions, systemic anti-Black racism also leads to staggering health and education inequities, as well as the unjust over-policing and over-incarceration of Black communities.
We must reckon with and repair these outrageous injustices. As a key part of that process, our federal government has a responsibility to enact reparations for Black Americans.

clean_body: Let’s dismantle anti-Black racism. | | | Friend, February is Black History Month but in the 12th Congressional District, we recognize our Black history and our neighbors fighting for real liberation every day―honoring Black Americans who have contributed so much to our society and our world. Now is also the time to speak up about how our country continues to deny Black people equal rights. We must reverse centuries of disinvestment in Black communities, and root out anti-Black racism in our institutions. Otherwise, the still-expanding gap between Black and white families’ wealth and health will continue to grow. Thanks to Black-led activism for racial justice, the concept of reparations for Black Americans has shifted into the mainstream. I’m proud to support Rep. Cori Bush’s Reparations Now Resolution , which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for enslaving people of African descent, as well as reparations for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people. | After the era of slavery, our government codified anti-Black racism in other policies like Jim Crow and redlining. These harms continue today: The wealth gap between Black and white families has expanded over the past 60 years. The gap between white and Black home ownership rates is the widest it has been in 50 years. Redlining still exists, with Black Americans disproportionately denied fair lending rates and mortgages, regardless of income. Built into our country’s institutions, systemic anti-Black racism also leads to staggering health and education inequities, as well as the unjust over-policing and over-incarceration of Black communities. We must reckon with and repair these outrageous injustices. As a key part of that process, our federal government has a responsibility to enact reparations for Black Americans. Thank you. Together, we will keep fighting systemic racism and the ideology of white supremacy. We are building a country and a world where all people are free. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via .
