**Today marks my 100th day as Speaker of the House, Friend.**

I need to hear your feedback on our performance up until this point. Representing you is my _**number one**_ priority.

We've accomplished so much in such a short period of time, Friend. But our work is not complete. **[Which is why I need to hear your feedback today.Will you take my 100-Day Review and share your thoughts?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PBxhRA3dm8neEiHLvIYhrQ~~/AARclAA~_JqUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Which is why I need to hear your feedback today.Will you take my 100-Day Review and share your thoughts?")**

Before we go any further in 2024, we wanted to check in with our top supporters to see where they stand on all things House Republicans.

Peter,

I'm writing to say thanks. **Thanks to your support in January, our people-powered campaign to oust MAGA Mike Garcia surpassed our first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year.**

The momentum we’re building is essential to our success moving forward. Our primary election is nearly a month away – your donations will help us reach the undecided voters we need to win and move on to November.

I know we have what it takes to flip CA-27 from red to blue. And so does Democratic leadership: Earlier this week we were named one of the key races needed to win the House majority.

This is a pure toss-up race and it’s thanks to your support that we’re in an excellent position. Garcia’s approval rating is plummeting in the district, and we have a real chance of flipping this seat.

So as we move forward, I’m grateful for your support. I hope you will continue to support our campaign as we increase our voter outreach efforts.

Thank you,

GW

• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YPpfio21IqoWjgTKckW5kQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn9QGP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDJXA3NwY0IKZbpDSL1leYcahFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.

I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YPpfio21IqoWjgTKckW5kQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn9QGP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDJXA3NwY0IKZbpDSL1leYcahFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qPiHUb_QSveI6BDjMX8UqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qPiHUb_QSveI6BDjMX8UqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qPiHUb_QSveI6BDjMX8UqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qPiHUb_QSveI6BDjMX8UqA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aFXyvMRRowKzRo2Rn-p5rw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-KsP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmW63Ui9ZZ0vJu5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Dus5AeWHvzk8kT8QSzV1UA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnn-KsP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplut1IvWWdLybuUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

subject: We’d love your feedback, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m sending all the responses to our 2024 priorities survey to Lucas on Monday and I’d love to include your thoughts
#
Hey Peter, happy Friday!
Lucas is committed to running a truly people-powered campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, meaning he’s not taking any cues from shady mega-donors or corporate elites. He’s relying on input from real people like you to guide the priorities and strategy of our campaign at every step of the way.
**So now that it’s officially 2024, we wanted to give Lucas’ top supporters the first chance to give their feedback in our updated priorities + strategy survey.**
Responding to these surveys is one of the best ways you can share with Lucas about the issues that matter most to you + your loved ones, feedback on the movement we’re building together, and any suggestions you have for our campaign moving forward.
**[So please, will you take just a few moments today to fill out our updated 2024 priorities + strategy survey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20240202-survey?t=1&akid=4736%2E614464%2E75nEC3) I’m going to send all the responses to Lucas on Monday and I’d love to include your thoughts:**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20240202-survey?t=2&akid=4736%2E614464%2E75nEC3)**
Thank you so much!
Emma Dillon
Team Lucas Kunce

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hundreds of folks across the country are endorsing Jason’s reelection campaign! Will you join them?

Add your name to endorse Jason for CO-06 today >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-01-endorsement]

ENDORSE JASON » [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-01-endorsement]

Folks —

Jason announced his reelection campaign just a few weeks ago — and already, we’re building a true grassroots movement. Take a look at some of the incredible folks who’ve endorsed Jason so far:

US Senator Michael Bennet
US Senator John Hickenlooper
Governor Jared Polis
Attorney General Phil Weiser
Treasurer Dave Young
Colorado Board of Education Member, At Large Kathy Plomer
CO Senate President Steve Fenberg
CO House Speaker Julie McCluskie
Englewood Mayor Othoniel Sierra
Sheridan Mayor Tara Beiter-Fluhr
Littleton Mayor Kyle Schlachter
...and dozens more!

And that’s not all: Since launching our campaign, hundreds of grassroots supporters like you have stepped up and endorsed Jason!

We are so proud to build this campaign from the ground up — power by the people of Colorado. Now, we’re hoping to get your endorsement, as well:

Will you become a Day One Endorser of Jason today? He’s rolling up his sleeves to bring Colorado values to Washington, but he can’t do it alone. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-01-endorsement]

ENDORSE JASON » [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-01-endorsement]

Thank you!

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

body:
Your response is critical.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: 👊 Congress advances impeachment
body:
Anyone who prioritizes the Far Left's Open Border agenda over our country's security can't be allowed to stay in office. |
---
| | Peter, did you see the news this week?

Republicans just voted to send articles of impeachment against Biden's Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to the floor of Congress.

**_This news came the same day that a group of illegal immigrants assaulted two New York police officers and were released without bail!_**

We have good, legitimate people patiently waiting in line to come into our country LEGALLY while Mayorkas, Biden and Democrats hand a free pass to these thugs??
---
|
---
| I called on Congress to impeach Mayorkas months ago and I want to be clear:****_**I would absolutely vote for these impeachment articles without hesitation.**_

Anyone who so flagrantly prioritizes the Far Left's Open Borders agenda over our country's security _**can't be allowed to stay in office.**_** **

We have to put America First.
---
| [ENDORSE MAX](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0f86e7b0ec&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX")
---
| **Here's what scares me though: Washington Democrats - including our own radical liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter - will vote to protect Mayorkas!!**

They are content to sit around and do nothing while Joe Biden lets millions of illegal immigrants break our laws and enter our country!

It's truly twisted and sickening that our leaders would allow this to happen.

**That's why we absolutely have to win this Election.**

[**> >> If you're with me on this, please ADD YOUR NAME and endorse my campaign for Congress today. **](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0350adb16a&e=86e91e802d)

Securing our border is my top priority. I even visited the border myself to learn how we can fix it. If we don't have a border, we don't have a country.

**I will be more than a Republican vote for border security in Congress. I will be a FIGHTER for it. **I will work with anyone in Washington who believes, like I do, that we have to secure our border by any means necessary.

We have to start putting America First. That requires bold leadership.

I hope I can earn your support and your vote,

\- Max Ukropina
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: VIDEO: New Ad Spotlights How Joanna Weiss Is Personally Funding Her Campaign With Money Made From Defending Child Molesters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f89d031918b7/video-new-ad-spotlights-how-joanna-weiss-is-personally-funding-her-campaign-with-money-made-from-defending-child-molesters-15669828?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For immediate release:** February 2, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**VIDEO: New Ad Spotlights How Joanna Weiss Is Personally Funding Her Campaign With Money Made From Defending Child Molesters**

_“At no point in her statement did Weiss deny funding her campaign with money that the Catholic Church used to try to deprive sexual abuse survivors of restitution.”_
**_\- The Daily Beast, 1.18.24_**
**IRVINE, CA** — In response to a bevy of negative advertising from corporate attorney Joanna Weiss, the Dave Min campaign released a new campaign ad which highlights the [horrifying news reports](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=53bf68376a&e=7017cc100e) by the Daily Beast which exposes the personal fortune Joanna Weiss and her family have made representing the Catholic Church in sex abuses cases against victims of assault and molestation by pedophile priests. Money which Weiss is now using to fund her campaign for California’s 47th Congressional District.
**[Watch The Video Titled “Hide”](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=12ba4880f6&e=7017cc100e)**
**[](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=7b49dd9c29&e=7017cc100e)**
**“These news reports are as disgusting as they are disqualifying,”** said Campaign Manager Dan Driscoll. **“In its investigation, the Daily Beast reports Jason Weiss’ legal tactics as being described as ‘hurtful to survivors’. Joanna Weiss has run a 100% negative campaign to hide the fact that she is funding her campaign with money made through truly despicable means. State Senator Dave Min stands with survivors of sexual abuse and assault and is proud to have 8 bills signed into law providing them greater means of protection and justice.”**

Min is endorsed by outgoing Rep. Katie Porter, Attorny General Rob Bonta, Lt Governor Eleni Kounalakis, as well as the California Democratic Party, Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the National Education Association, the American Federation of Teachers, California Environmental Voters, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions, and he is the only candidate endorsed in this race by the California Labor Federation or the AFL-CIO. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=383740e644&e=7017cc100e). ###
_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

Happy Groundhog Day, co-pilot! 🎩 Punxsutawney Phil, a legendary Pennsylvanian, has predicted... spring is on its way. **Now that we've got Phil's forecast, we know we have to hit the ground running.** In 2024, we’re ready to go all out to unseat fake moderate Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick. That means springing into action and meeting PA-01 voters where they are. It means making sure they know Fitzpatrick's record of being a fake moderate and someone who is afraid of his own shadow. All while sharing my record as a strong leader and “hole-istic” vision to help working families. And, yes, that also means fundraising to make sure we can compete against an entrenched, incumbent member of Congress. **So, I wanted to extend a thank you to everyone who continues to chip in to support this campaign.** The $5, $10, and $25 donations supporters like you make are the cornerstone of this campaign. Put another way? Your support is what makes all of this possible. And for that, I just want to say _thank you_. Ashley Ehasz 🚁 [P.S. Want to help us get started on February's fundraising goal? clean_body: | = Happy Groundhog Day, co-pilot! 🎩 Punxsutawney Phil, a legendary Pennsylvanian, has predicted... spring is on its way. Now that we've got Phil's forecast, we know we have to hit the ground running. In 2024, we’re ready to go all out to unseat fake moderate Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick. That means springing into action and meeting PA-01 voters where they are. It means making sure they know Fitzpatrick's record of being a fake moderate and someone who is afraid of his own shadow. All while sharing my record as a strong leader and “hole-istic” vision to help working families. And, yes, that also means fundraising to make sure we can compete against an entrenched, incumbent member of Congress. So, I wanted to extend a thank you to everyone who continues to chip in to support this campaign. The $5, $10, and $25 donations supporters like you make are the cornerstone of this campaign. Put another way? Your support is what makes all of this possible. And for that, I just want to say thank you. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT2L3DAQQH-N3NmMPizvFi6WOIYUF45wkFLI0tgr0IeR5IT998HJbuprZ948eMzPN_WmnXdx-64DjjVXlYuKWmnjWu8WzPWhGDDRAmuBKdrYUQzMctngSAeQVxg4XJr7KBbLmBXrQntzoeYqQfbUmnW48ivtUTZuPD3AgDGgQEUH_WAulPYce4SLWIgA7THX0tU7ZtyPxTujY0UdOpNC48d7rXsh_EbYTNic1hVz6XTAfHIm5Yi51BSxS3kjbM7o3ebSUV4lbTnyL3yc53w-alBGh127LRI-_Yef7AuVJ1fSkQ0SPu05lR1NdXF7rgJadwTCJwza-efQpFgxVsKn91v78eOjfaUTJv-5lEn2FN6-fGMcxNd3ANrk0e6_nfeuyIEI2E7j3_T6ic_8CQAA__9cDZZk)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT2L3DAQQH-N3NmMPizvFi6WOIYUF45wkFLI0tgr0IeR5IT998HJbuprZ948eMzPN_WmnXdx-64DjjVXlYuKWmnjWu8WzPWhGDDRAmuBKdrYUQzMctngSAeQVxg4XJr7KBbLmBXrQntzoeYqQfbUmnW48ivtUTZuPD3AgDGgQEUH_WAulPYce4SLWIgA7THX0tU7ZtyPxTujY0UdOpNC48d7rXsh_EbYTNic1hVz6XTAfHIm5Yi51BSxS3kjbM7o3ebSUV4lbTnyL3yc53w-alBGh127LRI-_Yef7AuVJ1fSkQ0SPu05lR1NdXF7rgJadwTCJwza-efQpFgxVsKn91v78eOjfaUTJv-5lEn2FN6-fGMcxNd3ANrk0e6_nfeuyIEI2E7j3_T6ic_8CQAA__9cDZZk) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT2L3DAQQH-N3NmMPizvFi6WOIYUF45wkFLI0tgr0IeR5IT998HJbuprZ948eMzPN_WmnXdx-64DjjVXlYuKWmnjWu8WzPWhGDDRAmuBKdrYUQzMctngSAeQVxg4XJr7KBbLmBXrQntzoeYqQfbUmnW48ivtUTZuPD3AgDGgQEUH_WAulPYce4SLWIgA7THX0tU7ZtyPxTujY0UdOpNC48d7rXsh_EbYTNic1hVz6XTAfHIm5Yi51BSxS3kjbM7o3ebSUV4lbTnyL3yc53w-alBGh127LRI-_Yef7AuVJ1fSkQ0SPu05lR1NdXF7rgJadwTCJwza-efQpFgxVsKn91v78eOjfaUTJv-5lEn2FN6-fGMcxNd3ANrk0e6_nfeuyIEI2E7j3_T6ic_8CQAA__9cDZZk)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT2L3DAQQH-N3NmMPizvFi6WOIYUF45wkFLI0tgr0IeR5IT998HJbuprZ948eMzPN_WmnXdx-64DjjVXlYuKWmnjWu8WzPWhGDDRAmuBKdrYUQzMctngSAeQVxg4XJr7KBbLmBXrQntzoeYqQfbUmnW48ivtUTZuPD3AgDGgQEUH_WAulPYce4SLWIgA7THX0tU7ZtyPxTujY0UdOpNC48d7rXsh_EbYTNic1hVz6XTAfHIm5Yi51BSxS3kjbM7o3ebSUV4lbTnyL3yc53w-alBGh127LRI-_Yef7AuVJ1fSkQ0SPu05lR1NdXF7rgJadwTCJwza-efQpFgxVsKn91v78eOjfaUTJv-5lEn2FN6-fGMcxNd3ANrk0e6_nfeuyIEI2E7j3_T6ic_8CQAA__9cDZZk)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Dr. Ben Carson

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Campaign News and Views Nevada Caucus is 6 Days Away With less than a week to go until the Caucus, Ryan is reaching out to his supporters. That includes you! Will you help () him make an impact in Nevada? In the News Then There Were Two KTVN 2News covers Ryan's efforts in Nevada. With only two contestants on the ballot, Binkley stands to gain significant national attention. Watch here () Goodness Gracious Ryan and Ellie helped out Goodness Gracious ministries this week. Goodness Gracious provides meals for the homeless in Las Vegas, NV. Preserving the Dollar In this impassioned speech, Ryan calls out the Republicans for getting distracted by pop culture. We should be focused on strengthening the US dollar, which is facing a threat from the BRICS nations. Watch here () Coming Up Fallon Meet and Greet Ryan will host a meet and greet at Jerry's Restaurant, where he'll talk about his plans to restore American prosperity. The event starts at 8:30 am on February 6th, at 1801 W Williams Ave, Fallon, NV 89406. Nevada Zoom Meeting Join our live Zoom call with Ryan. He will share an update and answer your questions. The meeting will be on Feb 6 at 7:30 pm PT. Reserve a spot here () How Can I Help? Call for Donations Ryan is the only candidate on the ballot opposing Donald Trump in Nevada, but the national media is still not covering his campaign. If we're going to spread his message across Nevada, Ryan needs your help more than ever. Donate Today! () • LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way! • Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow • Lastly, DONATE & SHARE the link with everyone you know! Coming up: Click here () to stay up to date with events. ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () PAID FOR BY BINKLEY FOR PRESIDENT 2024 Copyright © 2024 Binkley for President 2024, All rights reserved.

body:
This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but we unfortunately fell short of our January fundraising goal.

| _Susan represents a battleground district in Pennsylvania that could determine control of the House of Representatives. We need you on board to keep Susan’s seat blue in 2024. However, if you no longer wish to receive updates from us, you can[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oXa0KqHLu06uVRbnPe5v5Q2?unsubscribedata=LbhmIB68%2BN44vert4OB%2BM%2FiNqRu%2FgBjqrwsnIU7Z7h8jdgYwZB0w56kqMA3BINXoNimErF3QQYbdQEu%2BFKUC1f8C%2BZcj%2F8TTx5MMKv9sbWnAliIQFJvT11JoSdgbNrksTUzysU77%2F%2BhJCWU1Wh1QtQnlHNMYiNFP6vEVM0QPtcCaACaeKrYPV4G33L5CFC4y6kaKiK4rMM%2FVLWoRzSFfPxesLN14LfTA5fn7iGM9vWfmFca0I5vQj8L%2FK62jnW7sVAOef7V%2Blthd1h6LAbkUzJbUuHkOC%2BrGKigy%2F%2Bp1OEg9%2Bc3O0czWD7Rl07AIg%2Bk%2FwADNVsPkh4vy4elbtilyk7xoj8KZgBjlzfDCaAu4yY8WYyf%2FG7V6H7bw%2Bcg4mVKj%2BOa4hn5q87MjZdjbs1%2FenozWjnZvbC%2F1zAKuAzIFNXg%3D) at any time. _

| Peter,

This isn't the email I wanted to send today, but we unfortunately fell short of our January fundraising goal.

I know our team and our many supporters gave it their all, but when we set ambitious goals, we run the risk of coming up short.

**With experts across the country already calling this race one of the most competitive in the country – we can't afford to miss a single goal from now until Election Day.**

And if we want to win back the House majority in 2024, it starts with keeping vulnerable seats like mine **BLUE**.

[_**This just means we'll have to really step up our game in February to make up for it. clean_body: This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but we unfortunately fell short of our January fundraising goal. | Susan represents a battleground district in Pennsylvania that could determine control of the House of Representatives. We need you on board to keep Susan’s seat blue in 2024. However, if you no longer wish to receive updates from us, you can at any time. = | Peter, This isn't the email I wanted to send today, but we unfortunately fell short of our January fundraising goal. I know our team and our many supporters gave it their all, but when we set ambitious goals, we run the risk of coming up short. With experts across the country already calling this race one of the most competitive in the country – we can't afford to miss a single goal from now until Election Day. And if we want to win back the House majority in 2024, it starts with keeping vulnerable seats like mine BLUE. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | Fellow Conservative,

It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now?

[**COMPLETE QUESTION 3 ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1865a3e5366d416ababc4200b87837fb&_e=oJR2T13TiRT5mCfeYfOvBp8TGh9gr6Ds-b46lGc7WclK-eF9rEqxipsCE-axkcPp1tH5HNRdkIQNBLvWCMtixFMQZ3m6_SvhyO08s29sv-ruOEcEx11wPAo2FfYY-QZFOYgdRWOG1t9p1SEkfYdo9V5EQKmUUEszV1wMM7BbxD2Fy9JUoWpwWjxzud7I4lh8rhMHHadvksh0L7tl6IfWpv8nyIRzw5s2wxwWxvzQcWPFZyH2ftBm-4liaJsFqlxqlRYIn5ZQTM2NJZR6adc5RdsVQOKShDBLx_gqRa90lwY_I81dUVMeZn-dbgxbOuVAxR3f7pByCveNBr7VFixL9N8TtJ5RlCqqNySMN1fcFuFeYGV_nar5ydXL8CVuvrebPL9BEIOBfUL-FBs8cXg5BmIwLIJEXGfDoEMXYTc-XLw04JIuwyecOisEdI9d1nTRO8fP8gaYlTh87zED829u5dhjiyVV29OG-yJGLVcRyw4SfIzJdqx7oiPYXWYNlCYnLkNxeMl_dbe_lcCNxKwzbQ%3D%3D)

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

They are pulling out ALL the stops.

But clearly, it’s not working. **New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1865a3e5366d416ababc4200b87837fb&_e=oJR2T13TiRT5mCfeYfOvBp8TGh9gr6Ds-b46lGc7WclK-eF9rEqxipsCE-axkcPp1tH5HNRdkIQNBLvWCMtixFMQZ3m6_SvhyO08s29sv-ruOEcEx11wPAo2FfYY-QZFOYgdRWOG1t9p1SEkfYdo9V5EQKmUUEszV1wMM7BbxD2Fy9JUoWpwWjxzud7I4lh8rhMHHadvksh0L7tl6IfWpv8nyIRzw5s2wxwWxvzQcWPFZyH2ftBm-4liaJsFqlxqlRYIn5ZQTM2NJZR6adc5RdsVQOKShDBLx_gqRa90lwY_I81dUVMeZn-dbgxbOuVAxR3f7pByCveNBr7VFixL9N8TtJ5RlCqqNySMN1fcFuFeYGV_nar5ydXL8CVuvrebLQsGBQ8GLm6It51pNKdsdjb4Hnj0yM54-Ph5a58SnXbbm0wa0GS30mAseFyDb-z-ESuo7J6Ch6b597QmHLNdwNZ-ucNQclFvKHnEclX82XBjUxfS59Szk10z9iDcgm4986y5jhXNlPSL4WckHtq8cA%3D%3D)
**I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one** , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW.

**I’ve set a goal of identifying 1,776 conservatives in the next 30 minutes who stand ready and willing to help put President Trump back in office.[Will you join our coalition today by signing your name?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1865a3e5366d416ababc4200b87837fb&_e=oJR2T13TiRT5mCfeYfOvBp8TGh9gr6Ds-b46lGc7WclK-eF9rEqxipsCE-axkcPp1tH5HNRdkIQNBLvWCMtixFMQZ3m6_SvhyO08s29sv-ruOEcEx11wPAo2FfYY-QZFOYgdRWOG1t9p1SEkfYdo9V5EQKmUUEszV1wMM7BbxD2Fy9JUoWpwWjxzud7I4lh8rhMHHadvksh0L7tl6IfWpv8nyIRzw5s2wxwWxvzQcWPFZyH2ftBm-4liaJsFqlxqlRYIn5ZQTM2NJZR6adc5RdsVQOKShDBLx_gqRa90lwY_I81dUVMeZn-dbgxbOuVAxR3f7pByCveNBr7VFixL9N8TtJ5RlCqqNySMN1fcFuFeYGV_nar5ydXL8CVuvrebZl0TqJ4FYZCX3CCZpV-X1_V0gBmQdRHoHjD_LnHdXNzdzqYZy3BltRiFB5LsU_YjQEI970ZiUEpr-olBVt02A3ulGMZBqb-iLI0XDk4v75dzIljX-K2CspWSswTieHvvv-3mp5ko3zbCH_ltWY65eA%3D%3D)**

[**SIGN HERE ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1865a3e5366d416ababc4200b87837fb&_e=oJR2T13TiRT5mCfeYfOvBp8TGh9gr6Ds-b46lGc7WclK-eF9rEqxipsCE-axkcPp1tH5HNRdkIQNBLvWCMtixFMQZ3m6_SvhyO08s29sv-ruOEcEx11wPAo2FfYY-QZFOYgdRWOG1t9p1SEkfYdo9V5EQKmUUEszV1wMM7BbxD2Fy9JUoWpwWjxzud7I4lh8rhMHHadvksh0L7tl6IfWpv8nyIRzw5s2wxwWxvzQcWPFZyH2ftBm-4liaJsFqlxqlRYIn5ZQTM2NJZR6adc5RdsVQOKShDBLx_gqRa90lwY_I81dUVMeZn-dbgxbOuVAxR3f7pByCveNBr7VFixL9N8TtJ5RlCqqNySMN1fcFuFeYGV_nar5ydXL8CVuvrebMqYwGQ0dcbKAEVywNYW0T_PYVAGmFx68-FZoN2PLbS45wb9B3N8kElONvq-w1AYQzJHVsEIj76sAzCYfuxMZ-uC4VtpWkKz9JBGdFYyUB1V1VInFqWLAPbDC8fQQ2TaKW6dPgDxkk9HTJff1CjTEBA%3D%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: The Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election. | | Fellow Conservative, It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now? Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him. They are pulling out ALL the stops. But clearly, it’s not working. New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states. I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW. I’ve set a goal of identifying 1,776 conservatives in the next 30 minutes who stand ready and willing to help put President Trump back in office. America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast.America can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden, but we must act fast. I’m counting on you to join me in this - President Trump needs our help today - President Trump needs our help today. body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1937%2E35263%2EjxSgXM)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-rosen.SC53au&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1937%2E35263%2EjxSgXM) Peter, I'm incredibly grateful. Not everyone opens these messages, and even fewer people read them all the way through. So your dedication to this grassroots team means the world to me. That's why I wish I had better news to share with you today. **But I just met with my finance team, and unfortunately, we fell short of our crucial end-of-month goal.** With polling showing me neck and neck with my extremist opponent, every dollar is crucial to our efforts to surge ahead, reach more voters, and fight back against the GOP's attacks. So while I won't beg you for a donation, I'd really appreciate it if you could help make up the difference. [**Peter, will you please pitch in $10 – or even $20 – to my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to get us back on track so we can win in Nevada and defend the Senate for Democrats? A special surprise awaits!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78292698/452958164/1328794144?refcode=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOTFlYmRhLTA5YzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3UTMvYZ6YTV0unP6_Kw5LZqG40N6b1OECR5_EXrLhlk=&emci=4880506f-f6c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)

Did you catch yesterday’s big news? I just can’t contain my excitement! **We're bringing back the magic of Grace and Frankie for a special Galentine's Day Live Reunion event! Yes, you read that right — a live virtual get-together with all the excitement of our beloved show. And you’re invited!** I'd be absolutely thrilled if you could join the incredible Lily Tomlin and me on this special evening. We've set the ticket price at just $24, and the funds will go to a cause near and dear to my heart: electing bold climate champions up & down the ballot this year (ok, and taking on Big Oil). **_[So, what do you say? Will you join me and some surprise guests, including the amazing Lily Tomlin, for this unforgettable virtual reunion?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78292699/452958165/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOTFlYmRhLTA5YzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3UTMvYZ6YTV0unP6_Kw5LZqG40N6b1OECR5_EXrLhlk=)_** | [**🩷 GET YOUR TICKET 🩷**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78292700/452958166/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOTFlYmRhLTA5YzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3UTMvYZ6YTV0unP6_Kw5LZqG40N6b1OECR5_EXrLhlk=)

Jane

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Jane Fonda
**Date:** Feb 1, 2024
**Subject:** 💌 Grace, Frankie, & You. It's a Date! 💌
> Hi there. It’s Jane Fonda reaching out with an exciting invitation for you!
> Mark your calendars for **Tuesday, February 13th** , because we're turning Galentine’s Day into a **Grace and Frankie** live reunion celebrating laughter, friendship, and the power of collective action.
> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78292701/452958167/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOTFlYmRhLTA5YzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3UTMvYZ6YTV0unP6_Kw5LZqG40N6b1OECR5_EXrLhlk=)
> [**GET TICKETS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78292702/452958168/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.fa91ebda-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOTFlYmRhLTA5YzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3UTMvYZ6YTV0unP6_Kw5LZqG40N6b1OECR5_EXrLhlk=)
> ---
> **That’s right. The Grace and Frankie family is getting back together for a virtual table read of some of your favorite episodes that promise to spark a laugh-out-loud moment or two in your living room.**
> Being a part of that show with my dear friend Lily Tomlin was one of the great joys in my career, and I hope you can join us for a trip down memory lane. But, oh, it’s so much more than that!
> **Every ticket purchased and every dollar you donate will support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s critical mission to elect true climate champions at every level of government.**
> So, what's the plan?

clean_body: A special surprise awaits! | Did you catch yesterday’s big news? I just can’t contain my excitement! We're bringing back the magic of Grace and Frankie for a special Galentine's Day Live Reunion event! Yes, you read that right — a live virtual get-together with all the excitement of our beloved show. And you’re invited! I'd be absolutely thrilled if you could join the incredible Lily Tomlin and me on this special evening. We've set the ticket price at just $24, and the funds will go to a cause near and dear to my heart: electing bold climate champions up & down the ballot this year (ok, and taking on Big Oil). = | = Can't wait to see you there! Jane \----Original Message---- From: Jane Fonda Date: Feb 1, 2024 Subject: 💌 Grace, Frankie, & You. It's a Date! 💌 Hi there. It’s Jane Fonda reaching out with an exciting invitation for you! Mark your calendars for Tuesday, February 13th , because we're turning Galentine’s Day into a Grace and Frankie live reunion celebrating laughter, friendship, and the power of collective action. = = --- That’s right. The Grace and Frankie family is getting back together for a virtual table read of some of your favorite episodes that promise to spark a laugh-out-loud moment or two in your living room. Being a part of that show with my dear friend Lily Tomlin was one of the great joys in my career, and I hope you can join us for a trip down memory lane. But, oh, it’s so much more than that! Every ticket purchased and every dollar you donate will support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s critical mission to elect true climate champions at every level of government. So, what's the plan? = = --- I can’t wait to share this evening with you. Warmly, Jane Fonda | = | = Follow the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Robby Starbuck
subject: The War On Children Out Now!
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
**Hey it's Robby! I have some very exciting news to share with you today. Because you're a dedicated subscriber, you get to see the trailer for my new documentary "The War On Children" FIRST!****
** **There’s a war being waged on our kids from every front. It’s on their TV screens, in their classrooms, on their devices and on nearly every app known to man. The war is everywhere. People have busy lives so they see one news story here, one there but in the end they fail to connect the dots. This film connects those dots and when you see it all in one place... It’s nothing short of frightening and startling. It makes it clear that NOW is the time for adults to take a stand to end this war on children. This film can prove to anyone just how extreme the political left in America has become. For anyone who doesn’t realize just how vast this war is, this is a MUST SEE film.**
**
****
****How do you watch? ** **RUMBLE: [https://www.rumble.com/TheWarOnChildren](https://xgpeop.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1MDI2MCxcImxcIjoxMTIwOTkwNTc3MDc1MTc4NjEsXCJyXCI6MTEyMDk5MDU5NDc4NTYyNDY2fSIsInMiOiI4NzAwMTlkZjlmNDM2NjRiIn0)****
****MOVIES PLUS: [mymoviesplus.com/thewaronchildren](https://xgpeop.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1MDI2MCxcImxcIjoxMTIwOTkwNTc3MTU5MDY0NzAsXCJyXCI6MTEyMDk5MDU5NDc4NTYyNDY2fSIsInMiOiJlNGVhN2JmZTZiMDUyZjk2In0) **
**Website: [https://thewaronchildren.com/](https://xgpeop.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1MDI2MCxcImxcIjoxMTIwOTkwNTc3MjExNDkzNTMsXCJyXCI6MTEyMDk5MDU5NDc4NTYyNDY2fSIsInMiOiI0MDRiY2U3MDkyM2Y2M2ZmIn0)****
****X: [x/robbysubscriberform](https://xgpeop.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1MDI2MCxcImxcIjoxMTIwOTkwNTc3MjYzOTIyMzQsXCJyXCI6MTEyMDk5MDU5NDc4NTYyNDY2fSIsInMiOiJmYjAwYjFjNDE3YzVjZjAzIn0)** **
******Instructions to watch on TV:** If you want to watch on your TV you can download either the MoviesPlus app or the Rumble app. These apps are available on Apple TV, Roku, Android TV, Google Store, XBOX One, Smart TV’s, Fire TV and more. Once you download either of these apps just open them up and search The War On Children
**

**
****I created this film with my wife Landon Starbuck, founder of** [**Freedom Forever**](https://xgpeop.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1MDI2MCxcImxcIjoxMTIwOTkwNTc3MzI2ODM2OTEsXCJyXCI6MTEyMDk5MDU5NDc4NTYyNDY2fSIsInMiOiIyMDk5NDNkNzlkOWEzYjJjIn0), **a non-profit fighting child sexual exploitation. ** **TWOC takes you on a cinematic journey while featuring exclusive interviews with whistleblowers, a detransitioner, trafficking survivor, U.S. Senator Rand Paul, Riley Gaines, Online sensation Libs of Tik Tok and many more. ** **Senator Rand Paul had this to say about our film:** **"The War On Children" is soul searing and often hard to watch, but all Americans need to open their eyes to the evils our kids face so we can take the steps needed to fix it."******

We couldn't agree more with Senator Paul. **It's my hope you will help fight this war with us. Here are a few ways you can help!
** **
****1\. Stream the film on Rumble or Movies Plus or subscribe to me on X.
** **2. **Please share the trailer, reels, and help us spread the word to combat censorship and open more eyes to the truth about the war on children. You can even comment with the link to the trailer in the feeds of people who deny the war is happening. You can even host a screening! **
** **3\. Download the free PARENTING REVOLUTION manual by subscribing to Freedom Forever. This manual is a blue print for how families can fight back.
** **4\. If you would like to support our work and future films you can donate at www.TheWarOnChildren.com
** **I'm so grateful for your ongoing support and I'd love to hear your thoughts on the film on social media. ** **
****In strength,
** **Robby Starbuck
**

clean_body: | | | Peter, we are in the midst of the most important election in history to take back our Senate majority. Right now we’re being outraised at every turn, and if we don’t catch up I’m worried about what will happen. Peter, we are blessed to live in America. Republicans are working around the clock to take back our majority, but we can’t do it without your help. We don’t have the DC swamp, Hollywood MEGA Donors, or the mainstream media on our side. Our mission is truly fueled by grassroots supporters like you. That’s why your support is so critical. Thank you,Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
Every poll released over the last few months has had one thing in common: Kari Lake is leading Ruben.
#

A fresh poll just leaked in Arizona.
**It’s bad news for Ruben.**
Kari Lake: 46% (+2)
Ruben Gallego: 44%
Every poll released over the last few months has had one thing in common: Kari Lake is leading Ruben in Arizona.
We have to take this seriously because if we don’t take the lead in Arizona it could be a complete disaster for our chances at holding the Senate.
[**We need you to rush $5 to Ruben Gallego right now to help us take back the lead. Our majority in the Senate is at extreme risk if these polls are right.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-feb24.-zvZm_&refcode=em240202-1-120&t=1&akid=1923%2E734936%2EVQlnWi)**

| WEEKLY NEWSLETTERFebruary 2nd, 2024
---
|
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)** This week, I was heartbroken to hear that three U.S. troops were killed and more than 40 more were injured during a missile strike in Jordan. The Biden administration sees our military as pawns, placing them in harms way through inept their leadership. These brave Americans have done what Joe Biden and Tim Kaine have never done: put their lives on the line for this Republic. I got into this race to give Virginia the leader it deserves. After seeing career politicians on the left ignore the people they claim to represent, I’m more convinced than ever that I’ve been called to replace them. Our country is in more turmoil than ever and it’s time for a change in Washington. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)
---
|
---

subject: EXCLUSIVE: Councilman McBroom's Letter to Texas Gov. Abbott
body:
In an exclusive shared with IR, Naperville City Councilman Josh McBroom sends a letter to Texas Gov. Greg Abbott about his migrant crisis plan.

EXCLUSIVE: Naperville City Councilman Exposes Democratic Hypocrisy When He Asked Residents to House Migrants, Sends Letter to Texas Gov. Greg Abbott (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/02/exclusive-naperville-city-councilman-exposes-democratic-hypocrisy-when-he-asked-residents-to-house-migrants-sends-letter-to-texas-gov-greg-abbott.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c1e6894a66-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday, Naperville city councilman Josh McBroom joined Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk as a guest on the Charlie Kirk Show to discuss his viral moment during a recent city council meeting where he challenged local residents and colleagues who support Illinois’ sanctuary state status – to house the illegal immigrants in their own homes – creating an immediate backlash that generated instant local and national media attention.

Earlier in the day – just hours before his appearance on the Charlie Kirk Show, McBroom sent a letter to Texas Republican Gov. Gregg Abbott, and shared it exclusively with Illinois Review.

Peter,

Earlier this week, my team and I reached out to you about our first critical end-of-month fundraising deadline of the election year.

Thanks to your support and this incredible grassroots team we've built up together – I'm excited to share that we reached our goal.

**So I'm reaching out personally to thank you, Peter.**

While the fight ahead of us looks more challenging and demanding each day, together we can and will protect this seat and retake the House majority.

Thank you again,

Kim
Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. clean_body: Thank you for your support Peter, Earlier this week, my team and I reached out to you about our first critical end-of-month fundraising deadline of the election year. Thanks to your support and this incredible grassroots team we've built up together – I'm excited to share that we reached our goal. So I'm reaching out personally to thank you, Peter. While the fight ahead of us looks more challenging and demanding each day, together we can and will protect this seat and retake the House majority. Thank you again, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. | = ** Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: American Update
subject: ‘Walgreens Isn’t A Welfare Agency’: Jesse Watters Mocks ‘Squad’ Member Who Called Store Closure Racist
body:
And Biden’s Favorite Morning News Host Urges White House To ‘Let Him Out More’

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c682448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=czvup8VBwyTYwsofk6uAAA&sysid=1 ‘Walgreens Isn’t A Welfare Agency’: Jesse Watters Mocks ‘Squad’ Member Who Called Store Closure Racist

Fox News host Jesse Watters roasted Democratic Rep. Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts Thursday for claiming the closure of a Walgreens in the Roxbury neighborhood of Boston was due to racism. Walgreens closed the store, citing changes in consumer buying habits and the market, according to NBC Boston. | I can’t thank you enough. When the California Republican Party needs to close a budget gap or expand their operations, they can turn to corporate interests like Chevron to fund their operations. But we rely on our grassroots supporters. And once again, you’ve delivered. **_Thank you._** **Every day it becomes clearer and clearer how crucial California is going to be in the 2024 elections.** _It’s essentially conventional wisdom now that control of the U.S. House will come down to swing seats here in the Golden State._ Fortunately, we have some amazing candidates who can get the job done by flipping key districts from red to blue. Your generous donations ensure that the California Democratic Party can back them up through regional offices, paid advertising, organizers, voter outreach, and more. When the U.S. House flips blue this November, it will be because of you. Appreciatively,

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Friend, I want to take a moment to say thank you. My team filed our year-end report to the FEC this week, and I’m happy to report that our fundraising numbers were _amazing_! We raised nearly $2 million in just 6 months, and **96% of our donations came from small-dollar donors like you who chipped in $5 to $10 at a time.** I can’t thank you enough for your support. I started Fight Like Hell PAC to take Michigan’s fight for fundamental rights and basic freedoms nationwide. And the fact that hardworking people like you decided to chip in $5 or $10 at a time means the world to me. When I say that your donations really matter regardless of the amount, **this is exactly what I mean.** Taken individually, they may seem small. **But taken together they showcase the strength of a grassroots movement that is just getting started.** I look forward to continuing to fight like hell alongside you for our fundamental freedoms. For our children’s future. For lower costs for families and better-paying jobs for hardworking Americans. And trust me, you’ll be hearing from us _a lot_ over the next several months about our plans to continue this fight in Michigan and nationwide. But today, I just want to take a step back and recognize you for all you’ve done. So thank you, and let’s continue to fight like hell for what we know is right in the weeks and months ahead. — Gretchen | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78295265/452966986/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFhMWJmOTUtMTBjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ag20kOzW-qsX3SAnYAqBi671Y_Izc29JAkdn6DTFFo8=)

But taken together they showcase the strength of a grassroots movement that is just getting started. I look forward to continuing to fight like hell alongside you for our fundamental freedoms. For our children’s future. For lower costs for families and better-paying jobs for hardworking Americans. And trust me, you’ll be hearing from us a lot over the next several months about our plans to continue this fight in Michigan and nationwide. But today, I just want to take a step back and recognize you for all you’ve done. So thank you, and let’s continue to fight like hell for what we know is right in the weeks and months ahead. — Gretchen | = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

| Peter,

It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now?

[**COMPLETE QUESTION 3 ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=220d20cbe1dd4548b2ac924dacc24ef4&_e=TIXhItQqFZ87ZzN0CF1vtDarmvjYHmTJ0WSSgexSh5Spaiu6cuaA_XRVJbs0o9hat7buOt4rmJM4RWiH10il0HFT84UYV2re99MK4wwoIAQJBlf2DFSBmT4LqIrjcz0NaNcsdixCNuUXl_92e_8VtBn-gMH8J3seCJa7WwvJq6wWxhlQMGvqUAxEP1slIZhrkksOLqVTBKLVbc-6aSHg0pXAWDVDQXju9xDEr8hyWjdrtoNsWtVLAilUyFXHNmOM2ZVxmNz7advCbRQPjHzlOHWt_RNxYUk0wdERlWKeE6xGkGGOfwckd6UNBHxf22_UNjIYEafwMGvT24DI8OAZW7HzxvkYfTCx9hLDlqYC_TOjzobVS96wInAYkaeYvkLAUtgVYJ9NfehU3Qf7psGYxf8QF27RZDGnOtsfdRtp9bQ3OelAIzqmRuGI3bXwGrzN611vX_wrRpn_6Aq74COGq7-UDNtfrvNu3-qu3AYLYVPBEb-1Ps6-oNuZU9BRMxzHGopF70yq80pnrglwmypGww%3D%3D)

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

They are pulling out ALL the stops.

But clearly, it’s not working. **New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=220d20cbe1dd4548b2ac924dacc24ef4&_e=TIXhItQqFZ87ZzN0CF1vtDarmvjYHmTJ0WSSgexSh5Spaiu6cuaA_XRVJbs0o9hat7buOt4rmJM4RWiH10il0HFT84UYV2re99MK4wwoIAQJBlf2DFSBmT4LqIrjcz0NaNcsdixCNuUXl_92e_8VtBn-gMH8J3seCJa7WwvJq6wWxhlQMGvqUAxEP1slIZhrkksOLqVTBKLVbc-6aSHg0pXAWDVDQXju9xDEr8hyWjdrtoNsWtVLAilUyFXHNmOM2ZVxmNz7advCbRQPjHzlOHWt_RNxYUk0wdERlWKeE6xGkGGOfwckd6UNBHxf22_UNjIYEafwMGvT24DI8OAZW7HzxvkYfTCx9hLDlqYC_TOjzobVS96wInAYkaeYvkLAa76l1AD4p0T7rdk3qqsswmdkiu98p2gR91MGR5UUV3zuH7_36y7im5pdZH96uhyoEEvXwrtCbPVF4ifwZJ89TjFyMKx2NBdI2olZCESDcapUDQ_XTT6I3W-yUb0x6CcM3SLMNM6pIL3Yo8BgP0Y2rw%3D%3D)
**I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one** , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW.

In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: RCV Repeal Update and Timeline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bda65d9676f410d188e6ce&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65bda4860e80b13f51b54ba9%26ss_email_id%3D65bda65d9676f410d188e6ce%26ss_campaign_name%3DRCV%2BRepeal%2BUpdate%2Band%2BTimeline%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-02-03T02%253A35%253A27Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65bda4860e80b13f51b54ba9&l=en-US&s=MyVBn4aE_RZVOS9s83yV17K6rmE%3D)
---
| **The State has already done an initial count and have accepted 41,895 Signatures, we turned in nearly 43,000.****Now they are verifying that we have 30/40 House Districts, which is 75% of the total House Districts with at least 7% of the voters from the most recent Election.****Part 1: Minimum 10% of the total amount of voters from the most recent election, Minimum 26,700 signatures. We turned in 41,895, so this part is finished.****Part 2: We need to get 30/40 House Districts with at least 7% of the total number of voters from the last election. This process will take the State 60 days and they intend to take the entire 60 days, so we will know if we are on the ballot in March. We believe we have 35/40 House Districts.****Stay Tuned for our next steps, which is GOTV, and Education. Be sure to tell all your friends and family to get out and vote.**
---
---
|
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
#### **How did we get here?**
---
**October / November 2022, Before the November 2022 election, we initiated a petition, bravely submitting it on November 23rd, a day marked with anticipation for election results. Our action was more than just timely; it was a testament to our foresight and commitment to our cause. We submitted our signatures to remove**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bda65d9676f410d188e6ce&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65bda4860e80b13f51b54ba9&l=en-US&s=fDjdQCE4bvB8b8tSH2o25n_30O4%3D)**prior to knowing the results. Why? We like most of Alaska knew what the results would be. Alaskans didn't show up to vote. Alaska had disheartening voter turnout in 2022 (44.38%), which was the lowest in state history and coincided with the first use of ranked choice voting. Our group, though underfunded and inexperienced, was driven by a belief in our mission, standing as true underdogs in the face of daunting opposition. Our adversaries were formidable, backed by immense "dark money" interests. Yet, each attack, each challenge only strengthened our resolve. Even when faced with espionage and false narratives, our spirit remained unbroken, fueled by an unwavering determination. Now, a year later, we stand stronger and more knowledgeable. We've unraveled the complexities of the "RCV Dragon," understanding its foundation in dark political maneuvers. We see ranked choice voting as a threat to the very fabric of our Alaskan Republic, an obstacle that must be overcome. This story is not just about a struggle; it's a call to action. It's an invitation to join a movement to protect and uplift the democratic process. The incredible effort of over 700 volunteers, gathering over 40,000 signatures – far exceeding the required 26,000 – is a testament to what can be achieved through collective effort and unwavering dedication. Join this crusade to remove ranked choice voting in 2024. Be a part of this historic moment, and help steer Alaska towards a future where every vote truly counts, and our republic thrives in its purest form. Your voice, your support, can be the difference in this pivotal chapter of Alaskan history.**
---
#### **Where We Go From Here?**
---
---
|
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon
---
---
#### **550+ Petition Books Returned Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:**
**Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need help**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)

#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

| [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bda65d9676f410d188e6ce&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F12%2F07%2Felection-commission-rejects-ranked-choice-groups-attempt-to-halt-signature-gathering-campaign-to-repeal-rcv%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65bda4860e80b13f51b54ba9&l=en-US&s=0AVb06dRz8KmvRc3-fnZjeV7iyQ%3D)
---
**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65bda65d9676f410d188e6ce&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65bda4860e80b13f51b54ba9&l=en-US&s=4uAZM0cz11aLapFls-78PGMCi4U%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**
