clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | The State has already done an initial count and have accepted 41,895 Signatures, we turned in nearly 43,000.Now they are verifying that we have 30/40 House Districts, which is 75% of the total House Districts with at least 7% of the voters from the most recent Election.Part 1: Minimum 10% of the total amount of voters from the most recent election, Minimum 26,700 signatures. We turned in 41,895, so this part is finished.Part 2: We need to get 30/40 House Districts with at least 7% of the total number of voters from the last election. This process will take the State 60 days and they intend to take the entire 60 days, so we will know if we are on the ballot in March. We believe we have 35/40 House Districts.Stay Tuned for our next steps, which is GOTV, and Education. Be sure to tell all your friends and family to get out and vote. | Press Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEAlaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting Anchorage, Alaska– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans."This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger)."We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state."We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon. | | | | We Did The Impossible We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024 How did we get here? October / November 2022, Before the November 2022 election, we initiated a petition, bravely submitting it on November 23rd, a day marked with anticipation for election results. Our action was more than just timely; it was a testament to our foresight and commitment to our cause. We submitted our signatures to remove to knowing the results. Why? We like most of Alaska knew what the results would be. Alaskans didn't show up to vote. Alaska had disheartening voter turnout in 2022 (44.38%), which was the lowest in state history and coincided with the first use of ranked choice voting. Our group, though underfunded and inexperienced, was driven by a belief in our mission, standing as true underdogs in the face of daunting opposition. Our adversaries were formidable, backed by immense "dark money" interests. Yet, each attack, each challenge only strengthened our resolve. Even when faced with espionage and false narratives, our spirit remained unbroken, fueled by an unwavering determination. Now, a year later, we stand stronger and more knowledgeable. We've unraveled the complexities of the "RCV Dragon," understanding its foundation in dark political maneuvers. We see ranked choice voting as a threat to the very fabric of our Alaskan Republic, an obstacle that must be overcome. This story is not just about a struggle; it's a call to action. It's an invitation to join a movement to protect and uplift the democratic process. The incredible effort of over 700 volunteers, gathering over 40,000 signatures – far exceeding the required 26,000 – is a testament to what can be achieved through collective effort and unwavering dedication. Join this crusade to remove ranked choice voting in 2024. Be a part of this historic moment, and help steer Alaska towards a future where every vote truly counts, and our republic thrives in its purest form. Your voice, your support, can be the difference in this pivotal chapter of Alaskan history. Where We Go From Here? | The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon 550+ Petition Books Returned Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to: Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need helptel:+19078028116 Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Then "Article Four from Virginia" Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." | | | | | | The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska. | PSA: We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms. Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information. | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

Dear Friend, **[Please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help me win...](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=883215d2e2704926b76320ea88955e81&_e=qRVo8yW__He0TsN1zed0lFkoXL8m7cK6b3gJ8s9Imbh59AAvPj4v-j_17p6kRIOCqW-f3uvU7Ao9iHf7SSub4Ri0vktqWCT-bIxP101K-fW4qcN2a6DxDA1YXVVk0JlBQgqqXTdiKoMM6QupofK_kmF3uC3dKOiD7vQ5tZIhPE_9Dg76pLj3TAmUjjgo9RPe5DMKvgUOOAlvZMJ0rNl3DQKkamMjSMJT9g4O3nCevtLJsSGg_tI7-tf-opuTvPsoFhNHc8h-Qg4V4yrPRtdKnCc4aT001Mj1pTVHvKrcRDk_CR9KoR-XKnSKynzwgY0PnBOq5i1SusUv78uyhtNU6wfXFl1sEHlVuqrolZzVE1OtDemvbMgFZKeUQRRpj_R4K8GmgjrfhxYp_cWF4hxEVg%3D%3D)** ...a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992... ...a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades... ...and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future. I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=883215d2e2704926b76320ea88955e81&_e=qRVo8yW__He0TsN1zed0lFkoXL8m7cK6b3gJ8s9Imbh59AAvPj4v-j_17p6kRIOCqW-f3uvU7Ao9iHf7SSub4Ri0vktqWCT-bIxP101K-fW4qcN2a6DxDA1YXVVk0JlBQgqqXTdiKoMM6QupofK_kmF3uC3dKOiD7vQ5tZIhPE_9Dg76pLj3TAmUjjgo9RPe5DMKvgUOOAlvZMJ0rNl3DQKkamMjSMJT9g4O3nCevtI2b2QblzT7713S6OZKInjwFJMDddArhLVAitLpPLxkdsmCs2d6DBp7UOtIddoZOG4QbC10-01pBEYYxTPhnNbemmAzBPiQQSpl7rwDKVhNX6N-n93-63NKpaZtYeJEmOD8e5cuSWtRzD4y2UpEHxON5wYr6H2MaMAna-cFUlHmoA%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=883215d2e2704926b76320ea88955e81&_e=qRVo8yW__He0TsN1zed0lFkoXL8m7cK6b3gJ8s9Imbh59AAvPj4v-j_17p6kRIOCqW-f3uvU7Ao9iHf7SSub4Ri0vktqWCT-bIxP101K-fW4qcN2a6DxDA1YXVVk0JlBQgqqXTdiKoMM6QupofK_kmF3uC3dKOiD7vQ5tZIhPE_9Dg76pLj3TAmUjjgo9RPe5DMKvgUOOAlvZMJ0rNl3DQKkamMjSMJT9g4O3nCevtITRQvvG3c1vMPFErYQG62SZvkLzGs8rqzQU_1pWYXY_Wrp4ZlQfAW748ra4ndsZHdPMKJFJjQe_fsE64frcw2jAugDREARzdjtwYy3Mv69dOAy4GGsXb_vAKzsXavYUa-s4DK2J3Yb0vsPVJpj09ghMx1OGM7oBLxiOxk0850AGA%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its _final inning_ , its _final out,_ or its _final strike_ and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today.
---
[**DONATE $35**](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=883215d2e2704926b76320ea88955e81&_e=qRVo8yW__He0TsN1zed0lFkoXL8m7cK6b3gJ8s9Imbh59AAvPj4v-j_17p6kRIOCqW-f3uvU7Ao9iHf7SSub4Ri0vktqWCT-bIxP101K-fW4qcN2a6DxDA1YXVVk0JlBQgqqXTdiKoMM6QupofK_kmF3uC3dKOiD7vQ5tZIhPE_9Dg76pLj3TAmUjjgo9RPe5DMKvgUOOAlvZMJ0rNl3DQKkamMjSMJT9g4O3nCevtI72EqaKJbVFDCXgJp3OeYWVQcaTWZdHpGyyJiv4BoK2IYRSv11sSTwdj0GV6oILIyx5hbjbAePLCRlF6RQj0bBAu15O-4jth3OPgySwSig3a-KKuUHrD8tpUWkcXpOrgEuwT1V-_3iE80DpQqj--6MPYWuImgZpSw8ooJfhwAKmA%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://links.gopstateallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=883215d2e2704926b76320ea88955e81&_e=qRVo8yW__He0TsN1zed0lPO3xGHwfuSei6QTR8ILWv0pm4XrYypDUKF94n9WH2eEyJa8wB9U7NMG0IdsAo-qURUM-Q05ors83BFiZhz7awd8uM0jsnyTZDumePfF55kS8cZH4o2WAuVbB5Vfk4bXm8gokzbbSgQOoJP2_Tb2wn0K8bvxopI3iMtPOn-GnM424s0ZBsrSWUWeAEDTv4YJErWY6PagPh3OKq5NXpwRDsNngwJdOICuk-o6gRZgnOgj)

I pray you'll stand with me today. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its final inning , its final out, or its final strike and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today. | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

Friend, I was raised by a military veteran turned school teacher. Needless to say, my brothers and I were raised to respect our neighbors and serve our community.

I held these values close during my time in the United States Army, as a federal law enforcement agent, and as a member of Congress.

And when I was blessed to become a father myself, I instilled these same values in my kids.

My son went on to become a fourth-generation serviceman and enlisted in the military himself, and my daughter signed up to serve in the Americorps and do the hard work to build and uplift communities right here at home.

I couldn’t be more proud of my kids and all that they have accomplished in their young lives. But the unfortunate reality is that when it comes to their generation and the ones after, they’ve become the exception — not the rule.

Speaking broadly, young people today just don’t have the same sense of patriotism that folks like you and I grew up with.

As it stands, we are heading down a dangerous path where our flag is stomped on, our national anthem is either outright ignored or blatantly protested, and the feeling of patriotism is at an all-time low. **[And I think it’s about time we turn that around. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3c581ed8ccee452f8c7b2d561954bc9c&_e=ygLpHdbmcPWAWBrqHbbMJCdYdfaSOimE8A4Zamqr88577DdWdoYV-mWHHx9zTFJQcgfioNMGc6tqaBmH49ao-HSSfjTi33gA9yIRjGo8Qe9jx7kmN82KFw1FqRuHzXPw8UZFpL06O-OIiOGpicy3WEXojLYo6-PKijtBM1Kl6DG-5SJVMjILR_Kp5XwnFxyfF_OHptfrA9wpt41i4rMkRPSDjpiAWhZiddJxceG9rV6eaJQoNCVIWk-MBzB6JpglqDJdz1Bj_2ow8AcLlGtgPTutbPwCc1cTJU7i2hmSIF5VXy0fpZFgfJmHZv-_czRWczyaGpXZL20C4UyaA2L1KuZodbbV5-95J0kwCxtWrRptpk7yVLionZEYtrliU1TTmly8i6hhbAs9iiQFkAN0bGvHXRiXVGkYNh9Evz9sI80%3D)** That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate.

Because I believe in leading by example. I believe in being the change that you want to see. I believe that this nation is worth fighting for. **[AND I BELIEVE IN AMERICA.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3c581ed8ccee452f8c7b2d561954bc9c&_e=ygLpHdbmcPWAWBrqHbbMJCdYdfaSOimE8A4Zamqr88577DdWdoYV-mWHHx9zTFJQcgfioNMGc6tqaBmH49ao-HSSfjTi33gA9yIRjGo8Qe9jx7kmN82KFw1FqRuHzXPw8UZFpL06O-OIiOGpicy3WEXojLYo6-PKijtBM1Kl6DG-5SJVMjILR_Kp5XwnFxyfF_OHptfrA9wpt41i4rMkRPSDjpiAWhZiddJxceG9rV6eaJQoNCVIWk-MBzB6JpglqDJdz1Bj_2ow8AcLlGtgPdcy0emiQ7QDmX7mg5-HGK7EWCFrcBcAGj6mZ8cy1ojfhj8hHSJolPm7YfJA5jKGSoveE-SlJN_Fhs4p3DJzGhpRMkIqVdSL-I9DKl_YCI7oQqFnFc2PGKG1D5jd1cjnP10JpSHefT9_7xFxmyD-16Y%3D)**

To some, this might sound cliche. But to the Rogers family, it’s our way of life. Faith, family, and service to our community. It’s what has always kept us grounded — **[and it’s what I’m fighting for. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3c581ed8ccee452f8c7b2d561954bc9c&_e=ygLpHdbmcPWAWBrqHbbMJCdYdfaSOimE8A4Zamqr88577DdWdoYV-mWHHx9zTFJQcgfioNMGc6tqaBmH49ao-HSSfjTi33gA9yIRjGo8Qe9jx7kmN82KFw1FqRuHzXPw8UZFpL06O-OIiOGpicy3WEXojLYo6-PKijtBM1Kl6DG-5SJVMjILR_Kp5XwnFxyfF_OHptfrA9wpt41i4rMkRPSDjpiAWhZiddJxceG9rV6eaJQoNCVIWk-MBzB6JpglqDJdz1Bj_2ow8AcLlGtgPWAETgsrhIbs7LTXej29VBCLzca1qlWEMKwHiL---2rn50J_uaAwDslZdpb7qbzOOXoBO7gCOrNYDnlIWp9yPBUyg_Apg-iBWOjeraNmXZAuaN-QjmJ1u9HoKHo4OEC7pGoADVtPmMsq4XeG9CyOP2Y%3D)** Thank you for your time,

clean_body: It runs in my blood.| | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click unsubscribe. Friend, I was raised by a military veteran turned school teacher. Needless to say, my brothers and I were raised to respect our neighbors and serve our community. I held these values close during my time in the United States Army, as a federal law enforcement agent, and as a member of Congress. And when I was blessed to become a father myself, I instilled these same values in my kids. My son went on to become a fourth-generation serviceman and enlisted in the military himself, and my daughter signed up to serve in the Americorps and do the hard work to build and uplift communities right here at home. I couldn’t be more proud of my kids and all that they have accomplished in their young lives. But the unfortunate reality is that when it comes to their generation and the ones after, they’ve become the exception — not the rule. Speaking broadly, young people today just don’t have the same sense of patriotism that folks like you and I grew up with. As it stands, we are heading down a dangerous path where our flag is stomped on, our national anthem is either outright ignored or blatantly protested, and the feeling of patriotism is at an all-time low. That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate. Because I believe in leading by example. I believe in being the change that you want to see. I believe that this nation is worth fighting for. To some, this might sound cliche. But to the Rogers family, it’s our way of life. Faith, family, and service to our community. It’s what has always kept us grounded — Thank you for your time, Mike Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

subject: Peter, will you let me know what's on your mind?
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78297885/452976593/-1148169163?contactdata=UV/kLI9DYUEDpnO2L0PnkKhgxuC61x5tCudPdd20xubEhuATGpgNx0rV2xWEXN/vu0bFUZ+0ErcShpDNpvqukwMF/J0Jhk8X8hlpy6Mn/9zWK6Fk6fDl5B8PPMDP04caUsBQe5FIlc7XUASjf1tUcWcD/jnRVEFzG+8MsAAApZg=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZmNDY4My0xOGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixSEZc_6xurADE8qeCXFZeGCH3FNVDbp4QyGuqiyD68=&emci=bd985082-10c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e7ff4683-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=23190490) Aloha Peter, First, I want to thank this team for chipping in ahead of our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year. Winning re-election, protecting our Senate majority, and sending President Biden back to the White House will only be possible through months of hard work — and I was proud to see this team step up to our first big challenge this year. As we enter February, I’m looking forward to continuing the fight for our working families, our planet, and our future. As usual, I know that we will be facing a heavy dose of GOP obstruction, but I am determined to push through and stay the course. I’m also looking forward to ushering in the Lunar New Year with my family and friends, and I can’t wait to bring my colleagues into the festivities! **[I know you’re getting ready to enjoy the weekend, but before you log off, would you please take a moment to complete my February Priorities Survey so I can know what issues are top of mind for you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78297886/452976594/-1148169163?contactdata=UV/kLI9DYUEDpnO2L0PnkKhgxuC61x5tCudPdd20xubEhuATGpgNx0rV2xWEXN/vu0bFUZ+0ErcShpDNpvqukwMF/J0Jhk8X8hlpy6Mn/9zWK6Fk6fDl5B8PPMDP04caUsBQe5FIlc7XUASjf1tUcWcD/jnRVEFzG+8MsAAApZg=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZmNDY4My0xOGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixSEZc_6xurADE8qeCXFZeGCH3FNVDbp4QyGuqiyD68=&emci=bd985082-10c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e7ff4683-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=23190490)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78297887/452976595/-1148169163?contactdata=UV/kLI9DYUEDpnO2L0PnkKhgxuC61x5tCudPdd20xubEhuATGpgNx0rV2xWEXN/vu0bFUZ+0ErcShpDNpvqukwMF/J0Jhk8X8hlpy6Mn/9zWK6Fk6fDl5B8PPMDP04caUsBQe5FIlc7XUASjf1tUcWcD/jnRVEFzG+8MsAAApZg=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZmNDY4My0xOGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixSEZc_6xurADE8qeCXFZeGCH3FNVDbp4QyGuqiyD68=&emci=bd985082-10c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e7ff4683-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=23190490)
---
I wish that I could meet with each and every one of you to discuss our thoughts and ideas together, but these surveys are the next best thing for us.
My work has always been guided by folks like you, so I appreciate you taking a moment to complete my survey so I can better represent you in Washington. I look forward to reading your responses.
Mahalo and enjoy your weekend,
Mazie
Friends of Mazie Hirono

clean_body: | Aloha Peter, First, I want to thank this team for chipping in ahead of our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year. Winning re-election, protecting our Senate majority, and sending President Biden back to the White House will only be possible through months of hard work — and I was proud to see this team step up to our first big challenge this year. As we enter February, I’m looking forward to continuing the fight for our working families, our planet, and our future. As usual, I know that we will be facing a heavy dose of GOP obstruction, but I am determined to push through and stay the course. I’m also looking forward to ushering in the Lunar New Year with my family and friends, and I can’t wait to bring my colleagues into the festivities! | | I wish that I could meet with each and every one of you to discuss our thoughts and ideas together, but these surveys are the next best thing for us. My work has always been guided by folks like you, so I appreciate you taking a moment to complete my survey so I can better represent you in Washington. I look forward to reading your responses. Mahalo and enjoy your weekend, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Susan Wild
subject: I’ll cut right to chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-fetterman-2024?refcode=em20240202-1&recurring=1&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)
Hey Derek, it’s Susan Wild here, Congresswoman from Pennsylvania’s Seventh Congressional District (PA-07).
**I’ll cut right to chase – my seat is one of just a handful that’s been rated a toss-up by national experts for the 2024 election.**
That means all eyes are on us. The NRCC has announced my district as a top target to flip in order to hold onto their fragile House majority. **[So, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and John Fetterman’s?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-fetterman-2024?refcode=em20240202-1-8780&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)**
**[Contribute »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-fetterman-2024?amount=5&refcode=em20240202-8780&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)**
My friend John knows better than anyone how to win a tough race. In 2022, our races here in Pennsylvania were some of the most competitive in the country.
My race came down to **_JUST 2%_** , and this year, we’re estimating an even closer race.
**With a race this close, we know Republicans are going to pull out all the stops. We know because we’ve seen it before -- the NRCC and their dark money groups will spend big on attack ads lying about my record in an attempt to protect their slim majority.**
That’s why I need your help. We must protect vulnerable seats like mine if we want to take back the House and keep me in Congress fighting for hardworking Pennsylvanians alongside my friend John.
**[Unlike my opponents, I’m relying on grassroots support. I’ll need ample resources to fight back against National Republican attacks. Will you help me by making a split contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-fetterman-2024?refcode=em20240202-1-8780&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-swc-fetterman-2024?amount=5&refcode=em20240202-8780&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)**
Thank you for your support,
Susan Wild (PA-07)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240202-8780-footer&t=1&refcode2=8780_434096_E9RxwN&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8780%2E434096%2EE9RxwN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Will you fill out my team’s quick Issues Survey today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78298298/452977305/-145563991?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGM4YzgyNy0xYWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ_CF4RZt09zfBBUfHisB6WRXNqb2aOnFaIe-lDzzzQ=&emci=1baa633b-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=24c8c827-1ac2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78298299/452977306/-145563991?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGM4YzgyNy0xYWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ_CF4RZt09zfBBUfHisB6WRXNqb2aOnFaIe-lDzzzQ=&emci=1baa633b-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=24c8c827-1ac2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=252045)

While our campaign has ramped up in the past month, my work in the Senate hasn’t slowed down either. I’m fighting every day to build a better future for New Mexico and our country, like working to lower the cost of childcare and advocating for my legislation to take action on gun violence.
As I take on these fights and my campaign runs on all cylinders to keep New Mexico blue, it’s important to hear what issues matter most to you. **[I hope you’ll spend just a few minutes filling out our survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78298300/452977307/-145563991?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGM4YzgyNy0xYWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ_CF4RZt09zfBBUfHisB6WRXNqb2aOnFaIe-lDzzzQ=&emci=1baa633b-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=24c8c827-1ac2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=252045)**
Thank you,
Martin

clean_body: Will you help guide our strategy for the months ahead? I’m fighting every day to build a better future for New Mexico and our country, like working to lower the cost of childcare and advocating for my legislation to take action on gun violence. As I take on these fights and my campaign runs on all cylinders to keep New Mexico blue, it’s important to hear what issues matter most to you. name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Tony refuses to stand with Governor Abbott.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Supporter,
Every Texas Republican Congressmember signed a letter of support for Governor Abbott in his fight against the Biden administration -- except Tony Gonzales.
He represents the largest border district in the country, and he is refusing to stand with Texas in its fight against Biden's open borders policies. This is no surprise, as Tony has fought Republicans on border security before.
My campaign needs to raise $300,000 before February 15 so that I can inform Republican voters about Tony's refusal to stand up for Texas' sovereignty. So please help us reach that goal by donating at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg/lLWjplVVbhQFLIYA65Fy1Q).
The Biden administration's open borders agenda is endangering Americans, and our border is wide open to lethal drugs and human trafficking. Instead of standing with Greg Abbott in his fight, Tony Gonzales is caving to the Democrats.
Can you help me out by chipping in a contribution at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg/lLWjplVVbhQFLIYA65Fy1Q)?
My campaign needs to get the message out about Tony's failure to defend Texans. He has demonstrated repeatedly that he cannot be trusted to fight for secure borders.
Please make a donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg/lLWjplVVbhQFLIYA65Fy1Q).
I stand with the Governor of Texas in his fight to secure our border. We need real leadership, and March 5 is our chance to replace Tony Gonzales.
Thanks for all your help.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera
PS: Every $5 you donate gives you one chance to win my AKG Built Tantal AK-47. Please chip in what you can today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg/lLWjplVVbhQFLIYA65Fy1Q).

name: Team AOC
subject: Fiscally irresponsible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A lot of people out there are not paying the bill.
#
Here’s a comment we hear a lot: ‘I agree with progressives on a lot of issues, but I don’t believe in wasteful government spending.’
Well, neither do we. **Progressives believe in making investments that actually have returns.**
It means **investing in education** , so that people are actually able to participate in an economy that will pay higher wages — **which in turn yields higher revenues** — rather than making 80% cuts to the Dept. of Education for low-income schools.
It also means taxing the rich. **Because there are billionaires out there who are not paying the bill.** What they _are_ doing is taking Supreme Court Justices on private jets in order to facilitate rulings that further aggregate their wealth.
Taxing the rich is where we’re going to find the budget so that kids can go to good schools and so that we can make progress on policies like guaranteed healthcare in the United States of America.
[If you’d like to help power our movement this year, can you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to keep us pushing forward? Every dollar goes to our campaign for systemic change for working people in this country.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240202.d6cDO5&refcode=em20240202-5754-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240202.d6cDO5&refcode=em20240202-5754-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240202?refcode=em20240202-5754-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5754_2526796__Sqg2u&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240202-5754-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=5754%2E2526796%2E_Sqg2u)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This means the world
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5327%2E5257348%2EJQMDkT)
Derek, I have some _extraordinary,**breaking news**_ to share with you:
**California’s iconic U.S. Senator Barbara Boxer JUST endorsed our campaign for U.S. Senate.**
Senator Boxer was a trailblazer in the U.S. Senate. She was a champion for reproductive rights and a fierce defender of our public lands.
For decades, she delivered results for California — and she became a mentor and friend to me. **Her endorsement means the world.**
**[Derek, your support means the world to me too. Can I count on you to pitch in $10 to help us let people know of this pivotal endorsement, build on our momentum, and finish strong through the final weeks of this March 5 U.S. Senate primary?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5327%2E5257348%2EJQMDkT)**

I’m truly humbled to have Sen. Boxer’s support, and I can’t wait to build on her long legacy of getting things done for the Golden State in the U.S. Senate.
And I couldn’t be more proud to have a grassroots team like this one to help us get there.
Thank you.

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3117d5acf4174d6487cca364d9946e31&_e=0lqh19TYDfAnAP6EOIq9ea5rwIKRj9xOsy0CcZDIYuPN1f5wRGJdTHTzCJ3ciQt6y2zhqbW1FiRKs0v-QqmfTqIwOacNdxSqUm8sKazldqz3fDsmJ5fqelGVHgtqA7r0NON2XwSZP_9MV5Jl1iwtehY6SveyM2t7C_6P-fPynW1gGWfuYXyAifrPcPjWAXzHvpOGPFdnQoq5bg_deH6f3PUhSm2QkHJbNz0x6fQ20CmFfRl6xhswhAyB2E_l4TnT8asvem8lgMskaAMZJWnHvY5337v-9YrKlvn3mnh9ydBPMyF4llfB9m4_mOCuh-xBWwLk4y2KVBDCKeHLd_DvzV1iCiSJLZCV7bLwqyj5fZD8IA1k_3qTrF6-I2kSEHIFO1sMw0N1ORtHuGdGPBmEfw%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3117d5acf4174d6487cca364d9946e31&_e=0lqh19TYDfAnAP6EOIq9ea5rwIKRj9xOsy0CcZDIYuPN1f5wRGJdTHTzCJ3ciQt6y2zhqbW1FiRKs0v-QqmfTqIwOacNdxSqUm8sKazldqz3fDsmJ5fqelGVHgtqA7r0NON2XwSZP_9MV5Jl1iwtehY6SveyM2t7C_6P-fPynW1gGWfuYXyAifrPcPjWAXzHvpOGPFdnQoq5bg_deH6f3PUhSm2QkHJbNz0x6fQ20CmStNjJyzi4951UvbXnbs8nVyygr_mGEbJ3zFD5nnOhBTvjzjkXdRsjVXvPGA8kimTLrId-GVnbArrnxySVe6Atf6KXs9uR5d1cGUceMttqY_L9KxykFK-SH0GHBMAaC8C6M4KEhjIADxfgAURuFzObdhgYg7jgzROLsLwfVEv5NQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3117d5acf4174d6487cca364d9946e31&_e=0lqh19TYDfAnAP6EOIq9ea5rwIKRj9xOsy0CcZDIYuPN1f5wRGJdTHTzCJ3ciQt6y2zhqbW1FiRKs0v-QqmfTqIwOacNdxSqUm8sKazldqz3fDsmJ5fqelGVHgtqA7r0NON2XwSZP_9MV5Jl1iwtehY6SveyM2t7C_6P-fPynW1gGWfuYXyAifrPcPjWAXzHvpOGPFdnQoq5bg_deH6f3PUhSm2QkHJbNz0x6fQ20Ckx-UXKPqOrtP_LNbB9s_FQBD1JEdo1gEyDg8bddz4MT5ll6Eh7FqDtaHb2Z4R273YB347YyGI6C1GfaVLATEgYvLRKc1BOkr6gOFzE7xNMJiQ3FNWLnWE1puR_MbfN3viLu6CGrpAQmYAoJKPqds2xb-Dfv5StJAZ2nIIsOmyDIg%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3117d5acf4174d6487cca364d9946e31&_e=0lqh19TYDfAnAP6EOIq9ea5rwIKRj9xOsy0CcZDIYuPN1f5wRGJdTHTzCJ3ciQt6y2zhqbW1FiRKs0v-QqmfTqIwOacNdxSqUm8sKazldqz3fDsmJ5fqelGVHgtqA7r0NON2XwSZP_9MV5Jl1iwtehY6SveyM2t7C_6P-fPynW1gGWfuYXyAifrPcPjWAXzHvpOGPFdnQoq5bg_deH6f3PUhSm2QkHJbNz0x6fQ20CkJUyax8WKnNl2DhYcLfkNiNbHJiDat6UNTaKqoXxAwVBRGWWpXkCNXU-gahdQ4tBBZEIuJSx-AdR9rm7WbIKpRHn5VOG_APQ7LiFyxIeXuFkVC9k75sqR_Alp5sPrKFYwEXQ1Ld7vC2itAPOUy13__kgbuFnQripIndmsqpSAbzA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

From making sure the USPS improves delivery times to helping secure vital funding to repair the Blatnik Bridge, I’m doing all I can to make a real difference for Minnesotans.
I’m also focused on issues on the federal level, like protecting reproductive rights and finding out how artificial intelligence can be used in the housing sector.
The best way for me to do my job is by hearing from you. I wish I could meet each and every one of you in person — but filling out our survey is a great way for me to get your input!
**[Thank you for taking a moment to fill out our latest survey. I look forward to reviewing your responses with my team!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78299007/452979669/1988582157?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM1ZTAzMS0xZWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FV8stZDMXCUyFKN4hTQxRDMlGlz-CaRAOy5bO9R6ito=&emci=7f92d12a-1ec2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=04c5e031-1ec2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6227932)**

clean_body: | Folks, To make sure I’m best representing you in the Senate and fighting for the issues that matter most to you and your family, my team and I like to send around priorities surveys every once in a while. | From making sure the USPS improves delivery times to helping secure vital funding to repair the Blatnik Bridge, I’m doing all I can to make a real difference for Minnesotans. I’m also focused on issues on the federal level, like protecting reproductive rights and finding out how artificial intelligence can be used in the housing sector. The best way for me to do my job is by hearing from you. I wish I could meet each and every one of you in person — but filling out our survey is a great way for me to get your input! Thanks so much for participating in our survey. Stay tuned for updates on your priorities. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: An All-Or-Nothing Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUmW41s0hHt0fHVUo5xOaC7ASuMQV4d3ye9Ragyl9vNLtb6YMkpdPJe0-wEfCeTkKs2mAcN5H-Xv6JooN9Hj6qWVd-taVsp7cpWtz55tWuzchz8wDD6ne5Ry4sOtDh50yaINrcRfANhPNUCO4wIR5UuDXP4g5EQsiKtRWRC9fckn2pMYV05bEcsFBA20Ux-ZlnuBZm9xIkd8s5s3uW-hH-zRz5NWVIMGzY8Tta2RkihYks-yst1uguXgck8ayZHkrnUGceIeHAkVcqJ35VTA6q-zqxjr_JFAgC5hldZloEipVCGBWQDW4I3Z8ALhs02-_E7n2mWDCUfnSFMO4JwYAXdc%3D)
---
| | ****An All-Or-Nothing Moment****
---
---
| | If you showed up at the airport without an ID, you’d be waiting until hell freezes over to get on a plane. We’re talking about folks who won’t let you bring a dadgum water bottle through the security line. But rules for everyday honest Americans are much different than they are for illegal aliens who have already broken the law coming here in the first place. New TSA signs claim the agency is working with Customs and Border Protection to _“validate adult non-US citizen travel documentation when the traveler does not otherwise have an acceptable form of identification.” _ Well, what in the world does that actually mean? From what I’m told, the 45,000 migrants a month who have moseyed in here using the [CBP One app](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUmvB5U6T4VL4t9svP6NsXugCwA5PedbFNol32GGDRCIej3hP7snGlCVKTqnFSOeIwvXxrMqZ_68sFSXBWZAFVBpNxE2B678qQkRbPxPawy8mHykNi26A61s7_9hdx_H_SXbzndjMXDzfYKVQVrw8xWSxRHLrZVK2NyUTMSELOZac4_wKkaBfxAD6qhhbRgOj8prHG5AfEG9pJ925RJI9jayEz4S9uOAzczPT0vaelbEda97aFnD05aq2amcE1txqHFmHdUyxY6R55NDMcfsoQh6DWSmzRu75gUY8Yr9cgH-s) can use it as their ticket to [anywhere](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUtUfW1S-nwKI9DwAMeZo_6_c2DxNF6983kX7LuI4UEXvE6UyyDR8eoGkSbV7wI5EJh0ScGOZHxy9nVGOTn0zGw5bxaeL1ib2NE2OdzLrYMZfo3pPELB74MVCeK73sXkBqbdT71_TZm4h2YBgCO2IcSkTwas2_weshRYOZJNk36quBm3Mei0Utlotbh9Ay3kLUvenKiRar9npwC47ySXHONTUJ3JF6_5MFvZ1wkbiGzMD_ZZMVcex0w69m3ECnUAUiUtICQEe4oObeN_5pw4d8c5VEdFwHGlmhhHu6f0diO7_), USA. But get a load of this: illegal immigrants are also being allowed to use their [arrest warrants](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUmvB5U6T4VL4t9svP6NsXuitc0HDPA6b4SYchacQNAwDGCvFXWXx92PKoTN0ZkJd4EyBlZXZR03Rkj_34sIFv0U31EaebKQxvFmQGfhz_4YISgT9FgzTQQLnYAXpimRwIrUUJTX55g4nvrCTa4v_ylVIg69ZVGnicf9bu1hoF1Xq7UWVr3XFBqsyW0u_16GMmCPZmf8io1TocNtwV26t_X00-E_HsQnuwuNtJyD7v-9OZk2t3NDQrPpo8YcYc8CeMOSF1NZ0Sr_t8IngR5kyJUA%3D) as identification to board a flight. It’s as if the Democrats are willing another [catastrophic event](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUm9onxDTS4FI-XzXg84fBCCPYbTw-sQg7ZpEyBl2wOcQmBsDTOyQ9qkRL0Mp_oA0bXFAF42cfsfsmaTYaqTJ56I5QrpkEMUp7Q-EdlS9SNG7gS3egKS96wDNX801U5KiRolGkVZ4gnvrV1BNs5WMVy0Fu_6YaPgjXBptwayKTAUcIREsLVNMun_AWxsy0fC8nWZgwWTIrS8PmKrsE3PFBJpZT4Cm8_lfG4f_T45q1-AuZ49jfjZQNLFjRZXdzcBLDeRPGMcbL64XpKnxfa1DeaE04PXeMmFS2FqlXo4VPrv3) like 9/11 into existence. Where is Mr. President as this madness continues to spiral out of hand? Passing the buck as usual! This week, he had the audacity to say, and I quote, [“I’ve done all I can do.”](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUm9onxDTS4FI-XzXg84fBCDn2uKOnL6T7yYoZ3y3qYUTb6psMEahtQk7uTAMckdsFq26__QQph54tTs1PF_mPIb67XZ1duFc4qooO-IP5ncwkLcPs8d_ArstssA0BiHd02oHX5oP8V_mV-Awwm-1o3PADyMAf_Qdyyudrb63wEDahqTIJ_QYJRBqCKQjQHNS6l7puXggmidMmyqYwNIftmSUCK79Y0WGx0oeN3yJTLZbOYT57DgluD_RzWHuCZN_-A7Wqf0AlGE7C-WjIoo0XYD7v_KIYAzFi04pf5NzA2A2) Yes, you read that right. The man who has the executive power to shut the border down and protect our country is claiming he’s tried it all. But you and I know better. President Biden is lying to cover up the total fiasco that has gone on right under his nose. Per the usual, Democrats want to put a Band-Aid on a bullet hole with a [watered-down “deal”](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUmvB5U6T4VL4t9svP6NsXui0Fc2Sywn7h11pxmQUjID71zt3ZW_0WPQ-eECnh8xk_q4ymiUGYO5rZg95buw_yuOZPfMqRJHouFbCKkQUD7rkhOYzFHxemRjSCCH8ssK9vJ-bFRxbjyrpKwwyVXjjvgCdE8c1s8-H7JCdhME4bgLXhl63bsjEDMcPVGhK9oXuU_SKfu8Qn-pl6MVPJ1HbKTIXzFmZr_T4PBgfjfHzWtJBqtsMQxl08koU3M2JnOFmy5yo0FNuZNRop94zfXR-HXe5BPwuzNC_11e2wymaAjQi) that does very little to stop this catastrophe from going any further. As our new speaker of the House put it, we need [transformational policy changes](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUnOhP-vfzYgdEyVh-53ycnIi6rM7vpJYmYTeTTmITCaaFALfZ6QfZ685Re7ElDZd-MQIfXZ5ClsSoOs86OgKrG1WxQvwWfS0WgDYxJAK0SPhxD6w1T0aFvV-pp-jMTlNx1j3AQjTZKw2PJOTBkMGLhJKKGaoOgSec0RVXEg4LpBar8ltXWwzP_HojLbQIHinSfFG1Cvq26IG13ezO8KIO_NBZOzoPYpcArt6m2y9IUo6vjuc9jsZcDNktkgONWD1E7Nwls_lGF_4b80J6GD4oYw%3D), and that’s why this legislation is likely to be dead before it even sees the light of day. This is an all-or-nothing moment for our national security, and I’m prepared to stand up and demand it all to protect our country from this mayhem.
---
| | |
---
| | **You’re Invited 🇺🇲**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=52b3b10d25ae4e3f9cbe1aa280160654&_e=gCMn2ovvL7gpySJ5Py1UUuW0Ujp97gc_imHTgJCwUirKZZxJCvqTDmHgFxX0OTlyL2FfoeKdZdvVM4OMpbBWGecXJ1vthLb_q8rhBmgJEXiJ5VeJ7uegweCrhb1h_E40j4jesJqj7SUuERrq76c7zB5-j6zCdW94qkVLoevNIwnZTHM_SvfCYXSZ6Zlcd6B9zq6_1z72lZafpbiw7ZVfLy7NVNtTg5OSukpdDF6wU_fGbx5Qpr9YckJQ3lXR7VxirvaEumyjX8JRzVxPJwbKziHg3N-v3THK-52WW-Cr2NDGJVtBxszQzQmS77SdoSpYcM9B89lW59CUdV5JNCmZBg%3D%3D)
---
I’d like to personally invite all of you loyal folks to a lunch fundraiser for my campaign for reelection. I’m honored to say that Speaker Mike Johnson will be in attendance as a special guest, which just goes to show the strength of this conservative movement you’ve helped build. **Friday, February 9, 2024** **The Press Room** 730 North BroadwayKnoxville, TN **11:30 a.m. Host Reception** $1,000 per couple/person**

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | **An All-Or-Nothing Moment | | If you showed up at the airport without an ID, you’d be waiting until hell freezes over to get on a plane. We’re talking about folks who won’t let you bring a dadgum water bottle through the security line. But rules for everyday honest Americans are much different than they are for illegal aliens who have already broken the law coming here in the first place. New TSA signs claim the agency is working with Customs and Border Protection to “validate adult non-US citizen travel documentation when the traveler does not otherwise have an acceptable form of identification.” Well, what in the world does that actually mean? From what I’m told, the 45,000 migrants a month who have moseyed in here using the can use it as their ticket to , USA. But get a load of this: illegal immigrants are also being allowed to use their as identification to board a flight. It’s as if the Democrats are willing another like 9/11 into existence. Where is Mr. President as this madness continues to spiral out of hand? Passing the buck as usual! This week, he had the audacity to say, and I quote, Yes, you read that right. The man who has the executive power to shut the border down and protect our country is claiming he’s tried it all. But you and I know better. President Biden is lying to cover up the total fiasco that has gone on right under his nose. Per the usual, Democrats want to put a Band-Aid on a bullet hole with a that does very little to stop this catastrophe from going any further. As our new speaker of the House put it, we need , and that’s why this legislation is likely to be dead before it even sees the light of day. This is an all-or-nothing moment for our national security, and I’m prepared to stand up and demand it all to protect our country from this mayhem. | | | | | You’re Invited 🇺🇲 | | I’d like to personally invite all of you loyal folks to a lunch fundraiser for my campaign for reelection. I’m honored to say that Speaker Mike Johnson will be in attendance as a special guest, which just goes to show the strength of this conservative movement you’ve helped build. Friday, February 9, 2024 The Press Room 730 North BroadwayKnoxville, TN 11:30 a.m. Host Reception $1,000 per couple/person **12 p.m. Lunch $250 per person Reservations are required, and we expect limited seating, so please take a moment to RSVP today! Thank you for your support, and I look forward to this chance to spend time with my brothers and sisters from East Tennessee. | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Sign of spring 🌷 () → Just like my cowgirl 🐴 ()→ Airman’s best friend 🐶 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Happy Black History Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Black history is American history — and when Black history is under attack, American history is under attack.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240202-3465-footer&t=1&akid=3465%2E420207%2EIeAIyJ)
Peter, Happy Black History Month!
As we celebrate Black leaders and visionaries and their contributions to building an American democracy rooted in equity and justice for all —**we must also acknowledge the very real injustices being committed in our country today.**
**Led by far-right extremists like Ron DeSantis, we are seeing an orchestrated attempt to rewrite our history _right in front of our eyes._** [**Add your name to urge Congress and the Department of Education to denounce racist legislation from the far-right and protect African American History.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect_AA_history_sign_on/?source=em20240202-3465&t=2&akid=3465%2E420207%2EIeAIyJ)
**Teachers have been silenced and fired as DeSantis makes good on his promises to ban schools from discussing African American history and LGBTQ+ rights._It’s shameful._**
**Black history is American history — and when Black history is under attack, American history is under attack.**
**This Black History Month, let’s commit to fighting back against extremist Republican attacks on our kids' education.**[**Add your name to urge Congress and the Department of Education to protect African American History.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect_AA_history_sign_on/?source=em20240202-3465&t=3&akid=3465%2E420207%2EIeAIyJ)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/protect_AA_history_sign_on/?source=em20240202-3465&t=4&akid=3465%2E420207%2EIeAIyJ)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240202-3465-footer&t=5&refcode2=3465_420207_IeAIyJ&akid=3465%2E420207%2EIeAIyJ)**

**I’m happy to report that we met our very first fundraising goal of the year — and are in a strong position to defend OH-13 from extreme Republicans!**

[**_This wouldn’t have been possible without the strong grassroots team we’re growing for 2024. Please, Peter, if you haven’t yet, will you chip in just $5 to join our team today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78299750/452982086/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.02_b2_es_nd-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjI2Nzc4Zi0xZmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0L2NNIJZfqfW3fClOdos9Ots2ul_31NQ-MTV9H8oiQ=)

Since day one in Congress, my service to this district has been guided by the principle of **doing right by my hometown and the community that raised me.**

It’s this same principle that has guided me throughout my career and the fight to create jobs in our community, increase access to affordable healthcare, protect our democracy, and so much more.

**But while I’ve been hard at work in Congress, our work to defend Ohio’s 13th Congressional District is only just getting started.** This election is only going to get tougher, and your grassroots support — [**$5, $10, $15 at a time**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78299753/452982094/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.02_b2_es_nd-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjI2Nzc4Zi0xZmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0L2NNIJZfqfW3fClOdos9Ots2ul_31NQ-MTV9H8oiQ=) — will only become more important the closer we get to November.

I’m proud to represent our community in Congress, and I’m honored to fight for it alongside each and every one of you.

Thank you so much for your support,

_Emilia_
---
**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

Folks, **Securing the border isn 't quantum physics. _We 've done it before._**

But President Biden keeps fighting us every step of the way.
It's no secret that Biden has fallen short of his responsibilities as president to keep our country secure and safe.

Instead of prioritizing the American people, he seems to be more concerned with appeasing the Mexican Government.

_It 's concerning._

**[We cannot stand idly by while our nation's security is compromised for the benefit of a corrupt cartel-run government.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0969fd4e22b940f48c2d28d591aaee88&_e=2AlnjP5cIhew15q-FRsedcw5l4fr46vW-M6qk5cNuiSAgoQMGc_YGLCjG3xGKcUJPm3y460h0bIPFt6nKHzWTARQfuEMZ4e5pLSX0YB4iJg7p9-4y3GCTB5ajFyj0dnQ7NYlvlPs_Ka-8v2ZEJwoW2CTtib2e6CtxGcB0ZfsGacSzRic0YBB1847SigcfG7ndjpU-c-mUPonu1NLhTigcvLNUQaITgx8PlodS0upmQxP7ioMdoVP0UXEFfsF1kj19D6twmF0pq-9zeYZZcFGE2_5lUp45E21e-CIVCYJ13PYp8S_G_m_z6q59VPhlDSvI5oYxltZVA-UwnGWMPqe_BbiiY2Fpe44fXZZVh5elrUVeVbqb4c1HMMRcyuNT8u7)**

| Peter,

I wanted to reach out to say **thank you** for your overwhelming support of our campaign for Congress.

Thanks to your generous contributions, we were able to reach our January fundraising goal. But we still have so much work to do to defeat my extremist opponent, Anthony D’Esposito.

I am counting on your support as we continue to strengthen our campaign to flip the #1 most flippable seat in the country.

Thank you again, and let’s flip our district blue,

Laura Gillen

clean_body: I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your overwhelming support of our campaign for Congress. | Because of your past interest in Democratic candidates and causes, we thought you would be interested in learning about Laura Gillen's campaign for Congress in NY-04. This is one of the most flippable House districts in the country, and experts agree it is one of a handful of seats that will determine the House majority. If you do not want to receive email updates about Laura's historic campaign, you can click here to. = | Peter, I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your overwhelming support of our campaign for Congress. Thanks to your generous contributions, we were able to reach our January fundraising goal. But we still have so much work to do to defeat my extremist opponent, Anthony D’Esposito. I am counting on your support as we continue to strengthen our campaign to flip the #1 most flippable seat in the country. Thank you again, and let’s flip our district blue, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300259/452983735/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)_ **** _One Week Left: Run for Office and Bring Balance to Indiana_ We’ve seen how Republicans are leaving our state behind. From childcare and healthcare to wage growth and more, this supermajority is failing Hoosiers. Change starts by running for office this year! There’s over 1,100 races on the ballot in Indiana this year. [Learn more and sign up here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300261/452983737/581112596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300263/452983739/-885256678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)**[_Share INDems_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300266/452983742/-885256678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535) _Indiana AG Race Moved to ‘Lean Republican’_ [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300267/452983744/728276889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)[_Share INDems_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300269/452983745/728276889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535) This week, Sabato’s Crystal Ball moved Indiana’s Attorney General race from ‘Safe Republican’ to ‘Lean Republican’. We have a real shot to retire Todd Rokita, and return respect for the rule of law to the AG’s office this November. Hoosiers are tired of his constant grandstanding and his using of the office for his own personal political gain. **** _Republican State Rep. Jim Lucas Flashes Gun at Students_ Republican State Rep. Jim Lucas was caught this week flashing his handgun at a group of high school students who visited the Statehouse to call for action on gun violence. The incident, first reported by [_The Statehouse File_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300270/452983747/-1153036716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535), shows Lucas opening his jacket to reveal his handgun to the students, which made many feel unsafe. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300271/452983748/163525491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78300272/452983749/163525491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQ1NThjZS0yMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiFF439G4wkEAk0KumwjNu-loB4YnyVwR7ZNwcp4qrg=&emci=d423c146-10c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c1d558ce-21c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4925535) It’s also a double standard that Lucas gets to carry a handgun in the Statehouse, despite the fact that the public cannot and because he was convicted of DUI charges just this past year. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** One Week Left: Run for Office and Bring Balance to Indiana We’ve seen how Republicans are leaving our state behind. From childcare and healthcare to wage growth and more, this supermajority is failing Hoosiers. Change starts by running for office this year! There’s over 1,100 races on the ballot in Indiana this year. Indiana AG Race Moved to ‘Lean Republican’ This week, Sabato’s Crystal Ball moved Indiana’s Attorney General race from ‘Safe Republican’ to ‘Lean Republican’. We have a real shot to retire Todd Rokita, and return respect for the rule of law to the AG’s office this November. Hoosiers are tired of his constant grandstanding and his using of the office for his own personal political gain. Republican State Rep. Jim Lucas Flashes Gun at Students Republican State Rep. Jim Lucas was caught this week flashing his handgun at a group of high school students who visited the Statehouse to call for action on gun violence. The incident, first reported by , shows Lucas opening his jacket to reveal his handgun to the students, which made many feel unsafe. It’s also a double standard that Lucas gets to carry a handgun in the Statehouse, despite the fact that the public cannot and because he was convicted of DUI charges just this past year. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Rep. Blake Johnson (Indianapolis) that passed committee this week that allows children to set neighborhood lemonade stands without the fear of being shut down. His bill now goes to the full House for further consideration. Now that’s sweet! ** Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Thinking About Running For Office in 2024? In 2024, we're looking to have a record number of Democrats running for office up and down the ballot all across Indiana. Having Democrats on the ballot for statewide, district, and local offices next year will ensure Hoosiers have as many choices as possible at the ballot box. If you're thinking about running for office, or just want to learn more, and a member of our team will be touch. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! The 2024 campaign season is getting started, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, February 5th: 1 p.m. ET: So You Want to Run for Office: Black History Month Edition. Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free training on how to run as a candidate in the Democratic Party. Discuss getting started, best practices, and how to run a successful campaign. It’s time to close the gap and increase Black representation in Indiana politics. Allen County Obama Dinner Set For March 21 Join Allen County Dems as they listen to Evansville Mayor Stephanie Terry and Lawrence Mayor Deb Whitfield as they energize and mobilize Democrats and remind all of us that we can win in 2024! = Save the Dates! Hoosier Hospitality Dinner 2024: July 12 at the Indiana Roof Ballroom Indiana State Democratic Convention: July 13 at the Indiana Convention Center IDEA French Lick: August 1-4 Democratic National Conevntion Chicago: August 19-22 INDems IN the News My Wabash Valley: Indiana Capital Chronicle: IndyStar: USNews: NWI Times: FOX59: NWI Times: Read this week’s by Sabrina Haake. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Tell it like it is:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President.

|
---
| | | **Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. spent a lifetime battling corruption and, most importantly, fighting for working men and women who don’t have the backing of special interest organizations or globalists.
It's the globalists and special interest orgs who are crushing the Middle Class and Working Poor in America.
And RFK Jr. knows this. And America knows he will be a President who prioritizes each and every American—not for the big-money donors and lobbyists.
RFK Jr. understands too many people today are living lives of desperation and loneliness, and they feel marginalized and taken advantage of. The policies enacted in Washington by our elected officials have zero to do with the Working Poor or the Middle Class.
That's why RFK Jr. left the Democrat Party, the party of his father and his uncles, as they have abandoned the working people.
That’s one reason why he is running.
_RFK, Jr. tells it like it is. His honesty is refreshing. A rarity these days._
And that’s why he is the candidate with the highest favorability rating among all the candidates including the front-runners for the DNC and GOP, leading them by 11 and 10 points, respectively.
He is also the leading candidate among Independents and Americans under 45. As more and more Americans hear his voice, his ideals, and his platform, his popularity continues to grow. He represents the ideals the American people long for—from protecting our Working Poor, expanding the Middle Class, and making the United States the most competitive country in the world.
He will not send our brave men and women to fight never-ending wars sacrificing precious blood and treasure. He will confront the Military Industrial Complex, and the corruption of Deep State actors at the FBI, DOJ, CIA, and NSA.
RFK Jr. will address corporate greed and our corrupt health agencies--NIH, CDC, FDA, and HHS.
He will end the cozy, _special_ relationships between our government and American oligarchs like Blackrock. He will hold Washington accountable to the taxpayers.
He will protect our border and not let the cartels control our immigration.
He has a history of standing up for those who need a voice and winning for them. His grit and determination to fight corruption and the assault on our Bill of Rights needs your support.
To do this, [we need your help](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2) to get RFK Jr. on the ballot in all 50 states. With your support, he will be on each and every ballot and will win in November.
He is up against two political parties that have more in common with one another than most care to admit. The Rs and Ds continue to serve up the same-old, same-old, year in and year out. It's no wonder someone rightly said, "_There's not a dime's worth of difference between the two major political parties._ "
The Ds and Rs will each spend $2 billion dollars to win in November. This is outrageous--and frankly, voters deserve better.
This is a team effort. [Join Team Kennedy with your gift of $10, $25, $50, or $100, whatever you can afford, and we will achieve the goal of having RFK, Jr. on all 50 ballots and become our next President](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3).

[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=5)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=7)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1_1_nd&n=9)
Declare your Independence.
**Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President.**

body:
We missed another one

|
