[](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e71fd4f4eab4d4893f8efa52fda88ec&_e=7GhJ5VZ_aWl2k4bX05Tr-iexycU0G-WPBYBhmBkBdrXTVfr7sf8RmzqK3hJCGnx_HThUQh0OpO2rZvpXhUB32kj4pGBUOEQU0snM4n_qWqHpoQR90J4hCDZpJle4mWcHYg2An9sKc0hOkM5NvcPTe_XcBuSZpC1l2-bW_5zIiii9jm7wKmqf8nImRXvO-IXwBJIhgTrU8f-LDrxwDreFYBZsjG3UzMI8NZ6NBfMrnh35T8xG046HpJ4v7UEN3tAb6ei59PYRvcIBODWN1uE8jt_EGvXHMm0MopggcJiA7zSjMObInk2k7DRQg6K-934djMSfu32sSg1w1QQHbVvaQg%3D%3D)

Hello...

This could be the last email I send you this year, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**As we head into Election Year, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. We missed our most recent fundraising deadline, and if we keep missing these, my campaign could be done.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. **Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana.**
**The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**
Joe Biden and his Leftist allies are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today. I have decided to extend our deadline until midnight tonight, so I am humbly asking for your immediate support.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e71fd4f4eab4d4893f8efa52fda88ec&_e=7GhJ5VZ_aWl2k4bX05Tr-iexycU0G-WPBYBhmBkBdrXTVfr7sf8RmzqK3hJCGnx_HThUQh0OpO2rZvpXhUB32kj4pGBUOEQU0snM4n_qWqHpoQR90J4hCDZpJle4mWcHYg2An9sKc0hOkM5NvcPTe_XcBuSZpC1l2-bW_5zIiiiWnn7P0GcbIXDLDDGSKkm3FqKpCDxm2Gl-F90VPaTEt2Sal-UU4BOPx7o8ihGA38os53RtoV701BAcmx38QMwsCITGKw0ZikZgYy2dEzWbKEEeMxiuGLzRo4nOBY8BkYq2unkCUz_g-Msagb1KxNYBC1efsYX0NEbZUUK8PS93tA%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Hoosiers are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it [**if I don 't reach this critical fundraising goal.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e71fd4f4eab4d4893f8efa52fda88ec&_e=7GhJ5VZ_aWl2k4bX05Tr-iexycU0G-WPBYBhmBkBdrXTVfr7sf8RmzqK3hJCGnx_HThUQh0OpO2rZvpXhUB32kj4pGBUOEQU0snM4n_qWqHpoQR90J4hCDZpJle4mWcHYg2An9sKc0hOkM5NvcPTe_XcBuSZpC1l2-bW_5zIiigb_kSe8bMmllkVxPhFtRjZIluoiXCHPi4J2pyHmbvUOQpxSpEc7qTumFwov52bM01kderhMEgXQahmGHfe7NSBFlsdjJYbDvdfye7MxWin6VdRfHIihppcRaIxS7q9sxMjhdkKn7BWL1eaApCKLOZ2dmwOQlVT-3GJz3nt4w1ZDQ%3D%3D)

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend. The future of my campaign depends on it:**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5e71fd4f4eab4d4893f8efa52fda88ec&_e=7GhJ5VZ_aWl2k4bX05Tr-iexycU0G-WPBYBhmBkBdrXTVfr7sf8RmzqK3hJCGnx_HThUQh0OpO2rZvpXhUB32kj4pGBUOEQU0snM4n_qWqHpoQR90J4hCDZpJle4mWcHYg2An9sKc0hOkM5NvcPTe_XcBuSZpC1l2-bW_5zIiijxCTWtAo8Zvrj1LI8tBt-94M3pkOHZE079AsuOw6S99Wy6CfHZqT0eOfG_husi8FZSVKjeLG2Z8leD1w2pUlzgqI-XqpdQMz6Nr1OhdlugDc1MgPOBk6cLBLm98M8YiF0Knmboe6B7BUzI_tBunfT672IbV9HrFQS60bM1yb2VBA%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I won't make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: We missed another one | Hello... This could be the last email I send you this year, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. As we head into Election Year, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. We missed our most recent fundraising deadline, and if we keep missing these, my campaign could be done. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist allies are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Hoosiers are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I won't make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: All eyes are on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
It's Trump v. Haley in the Virgin Islands. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2e09185829c4/re-hey-9345161?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

With the 2024 caucus just a few days away, all eyes are on the Virgin Islands as we choose between Nikki Haley and Donald Trump.

As a [TV reporter said](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=c5f2c4d2de&e=d30db4cde8), _“Trump and Haley have put in a lot of time and effort into wooing Republican voters on the islands.”_

[](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=caca18ce44&e=d30db4cde8)The February 8 caucus is our one and only vote for president in 2024.

Let's use that vote to make the voice of our islands heard loud and clear.

If you haven't already done so, please [pre-register to vote by going to this website](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=7da7a3c658&e=d30db4cde8).

I'm told there will be more in-person and virtual campaign events in the coming days. Any events will be announced with little notice.

I'm also told that mailers and ads have been dropping. So. keep your eyes and ears open for activity by the candidates.

At the end of the day, it doesn't matter who you support. You just need to vote on Thursday, February 8.

Forward,

Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **2024 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAUCUS**
Thursday, February 8 (all voting in-person)
Pre-register to vote by [clicking here](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=6d7c2bfbdc&e=d30db4cde8)
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. Atlantic at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at Bluebeard's Castle, Charlotte Amalie
---
| **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: Here's your Team Alsobrooks Newsletter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)

| | Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks, It was another great week on the campaign trail! We are so honored and amazed by the ever growing support we receive from people all over Maryland. Thank you to everyone who came out to support our campaign. Take a look below for some highlights from the campaign trail and beyond!
### **THIS WEEK ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL**
We were up bright and early, for a great coffee meeting with folks in Annapolis, where we discussed health care, reproductive rights, affordable housing, and so many other important issues for Marylanders. Thank you to Annapolis’ Eastport Democratic Club for inviting us to join for a tasty breakfast, some much needed coffee, and a great conversation! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=7&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=8&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) We were joined by an incredible crowd for our Baltimore office opening party. Thank you to everyone who joined us for a wonderful evening to kick-off our Baltimore organizing efforts. Special thanks to Comptroller Brooke Lierman, Senator Cory McCray, and Delegate Stephanie Smith for giving such empowering remarks, and thank you to all our friends on Team Alsobrooks for coming! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=9&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=10&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) We had a great crowd in Kensington, where we had a wonderful discussion about increasing access to jobs, providing mental health care to our youth, and ensuring youth involvement in the democratic process. Thank you to Eden Durbin for opening your home to us and thank you to Former Attorney General Brian Frosh for joining us! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=11&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) We had a blast at the Crimson and Cream Meet & Greet in Mitchellville! Thank you to Ola Hill, Jackie Dunmore-Griffith, and the other fabulous hosts for gathering this group of super bad ladies. [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=12&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) What a truly remarkable visit to Kingdom Kare in Odenton with Anne Arundel County Executive Steuart Pittman! Affordable childcare is too often treated as a luxury. Thank you to Apostle Antonio Palmer and Dr. Barbara Palmer at Kingdom Kare, who are empowering children, youth, and families to thrive. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=13&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
### [****](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=14&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
Last Sunday, Angela had the pleasure of attending church services at St. John Baptist Church in Columbia and Greater Mt. Nebo in Bowie. She had a fantastic time participating in fellowship and worship with the congregation. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=15&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=16&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
### **NEWS OF THE WEEK**
[7 News sit down with Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10164?t=17&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) _Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks joins 7News anchor Megan Clarke to discuss the local county Fire and Rescue department and the county budget. (7News)_ [Senator Cory Booker and Senator Laphonza Butler endorse Angela Alsobrooks](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10165?t=18&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) _“I am honored to be endorsed by two tremendous Senators and trailblazers - CoryBooker and Laphonza Butler. I am ready to partner with them in the U.S. Senate to fight to codify Roe, lower the cost of education, and defend our democracy.”_ [Prince George’s County Executive Alsobrooks officially filed her candidacy to be Maryland’s next Senator](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10166?t=19&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) _“Today, I filed my candidacy to be Maryland’s next Senator. Although, the work doesn't end here. We’re going to need all hands on deck to win on May 14th. That means knocking on doors, making calls, and using all our people-power to get the job done!”_ **CAMPAIGN UPDATES** We’re extremely excited to announce that we’re accepting applications for our Fellowship Program aimed at high school and college students. If you know a young person looking to get some hands-on experience in politics, encourage [**them to apply here**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9750?t=20&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD). We have campaign offices now open in Baltimore, Largo and Silver Spring! We’d love to have you join Team Alsobrooks and volunteer to help us get out the vote - [**sign-up here if you’d like to join!** ](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=21&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD) Here on Team Alsobrooks, we’re proud to be a campaign powered by grassroots donors. We believe in Angela's ability to go further and do better for our communities, and we know you do too! It’s going to take all of us working together to get Angela over the finish line this November. | | | [Volunteer](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=22&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
| | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10163?t=28&amount=25&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
**Socials**
While we'll keep sending emails keeping you updated, the best way to keep up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail!
| | [Facebook](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8814?t=23&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
| | [Twitter](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8815?t=24&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
| | [Instagram](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8816?t=25&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
Sincerely,
Team Alsobrooks

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=4&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
| | [ Chip in a one-time donation ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=5&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---
| | [ Chip in a monthly recurring donation! ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=6&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD)
---

| If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click [here to unsubscribe](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=1015%2E52803%2EV2FuWD).
| Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate

Largo, MD 20792

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DDKMEUHQmwDzrd8MS_lB0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoAYiP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi9jYTJmNzZhYjY3ZWRkZWJlNTVkZjI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjAyX0JER19MRUxERl9XQUcxX1JFTl9QQS1VU0NOVwNzcGNCCmW6I4G9ZXH7Dd5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. | Good afternoon!

I want to take a moment to thank you for your support. With your help, we hit our January fundraising goal and are starting the year off strong!

I am truly grateful for your contribution to my campaign and our work, and I wanted to give you a quick update on our campaign thus far:
* Since we launched, we’ve received support from all across the Commonwealth, including donations from all 133 Virginia localities — all counties and cities!

* We’ve received ringing endorsements from elected local, state, and federal officials from across Virginia!

* And we’ve had 500+ grassroots supporters sign up to volunteer for our campaign!

Winning back the governorship in Virginia will be a challenge. It will require a pitch-perfect campaign, extraordinary fundraising, and tireless campaigning across our Commonwealth. In the off-year election of 2025, all eyes will be on Virginia. We know what is coming, and we are preparing now, which is why we keep asking for your support.

I have only ever won tough races, and my growing campaign team is ready for the challenges ahead of us. Since we launched this campaign in November, we’ve been doing everything we can to build a strong foundation for what lies ahead.

With your support over the years, we flipped VA-07 to help usher in the Democratic House majority, and we held my seat through tough re-election cycles. I know we can – and must – carry this momentum into the Governor’s race.

[_**Will you contribute to our campaign today to help us win in 2025?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78301435/452986108/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1YTFmZDMtMjZjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1J2KGH7MBHuLxCaJX1-zNit_-WtelG4dI6eb0K8kG7A=)
